    23	type SearchParams = { date?: string }
    24	
    25	function inferTrainingDay(protocolDay: Record<string, unknown> | null): boolean {
    26	  if (!protocolDay) return false
    27	  const name = String(protocolDay.name ?? '').toLowerCase()
    28	  const cycle = String(protocolDay.carb_cycle_type ?? '').toLowerCase()
    29	  return (
    30	    name.includes('entraînement') ||
    31	    name.includes('entrainement') ||
    32	    name.includes('training') ||
    33	    cycle.includes('high')
    34	  )
    35	}
    36	
    37	function svc() {
    38	  return createServiceClient(
    39	    process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL!,
    40	    process.env.SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY!,
    41	  )
    42	}
    43	
    44	export default async function ClientNutritionPage({ searchParams }: { searchParams: SearchParams }) {
    45	  const supabase = createClient()
    46	  const { data: { user } } = await supabase.auth.getUser()
    47	  if (!user) return null
    48	
    49	  const client = await resolveClientFromUser(user.id, user.email, svc(), 'id, gender')
    50	  if (!client) return null
    51	  const isFemale = (client as { gender?: string | null }).gender === 'female'
    52	  const timezone = await resolveClientTimezone(svc(), client.id)
    53	
    54	  const date = searchParams.date ?? computePhysiologicalDate(new Date(), timezone)
    55	  const { start: physiologicalStart, end: physiologicalEnd } = utcRangeForPhysiologicalDate(date, timezone)
    56	  const clientId = client.id
    57	
    58	  // ── Parallel fetches (all direct Supabase, no loopback HTTP) ──────────────
    59	  const [protoResult, mealsResult, prepsResult, waterResult, weightResult, checkinWeightResult, trendResult, streakResult, prefsResult, cycleResult, cycleLogsResult, dayOverrideResult] = await Promise.allSettled([
    60	    svc()
    61	      .from('nutrition_protocols')
    62	      .select('cycle_sync_enabled, tdee_adaptive, tdee_data_source, schedule_start_date, nutrition_protocol_days(position, name, calories, protein_g, carbs_g, fat_g, hydration_ml, carb_cycle_type, cycle_sync_phase, recommendations), nutrition_protocol_schedule_slots(week_index, dow, protocol_day_position)')
    63	      .eq('client_id', clientId)
    64	      .eq('status', 'shared')
    65	      .order('updated_at', { ascending: false })
    66	      .limit(1)
    67	      .maybeSingle(),
    68	
    69	    // Meals with full entries for the journal list
    70	    svc()
    71	      .from('nutrition_meals')
    72	      .select(`
    73	        id, meal_type, title, logged_at, physiological_date,
    74	        total_calories, total_protein_g, total_carbs_g, total_fat_g, total_fiber_g,
    75	        photo_urls, notes,
    76	        nutrition_entries (
    77	          id, quantity_g, calories_kcal, protein_g, carbs_g, fat_g, fiber_g,
    78	          input_mode, confidence_score,
    79	          food_items (id, name_fr, category_l1, item_key, kcal_per_100g)
    80	        )
    81	      `)
    82	      .eq('client_id', clientId)
    83	      .eq('physiological_date', date)
    84	      .neq('meal_type', 'drinks')
    85	      .order('logged_at', { ascending: true }),
    86	
    87	    svc()
    88	      .from('client_nutrition_preps')
    89	      .select('id, physiological_date, title, meal_type, meal_slot, variant_group_id, scenario_key, scenario_label, is_active, status, entries, total_calories, total_protein_g, total_carbs_g, total_fat_g, total_fiber_g, planned_for, created_at, updated_at')
    90	      .eq('client_id', clientId)
    91	      .eq('physiological_date', date)
    92	      .eq('status', 'planned')
    93	      .order('created_at', { ascending: false }),
    94	
    95	    svc()
    96	      .from('client_water_logs')
    97	      .select('amount_ml, caffeine_mg, logged_at')
    98	      .eq('client_id', clientId)
    99	      .gte('logged_at', physiologicalStart.toISOString())
   100	      .lte('logged_at', physiologicalEnd.toISOString()),
   101	
   102	    // Latest body weight from assessments
   103	    svc()
   104	      .from('assessment_responses')
   105	      .select('numeric_value')
   106	      .eq('client_id', clientId)
   107	      .eq('field_key', 'weight_kg')
   108	      .not('numeric_value', 'is', null)
   109	      .order('created_at', { ascending: false })
   110	      .limit(1)
   111	      .maybeSingle(),
   112	
   113	    // Latest body weight from client check-ins (preferred when available)
   114	    svc()
   115	      .from('client_daily_checkins')
   116	      .select('weight_kg')
   117	      .eq('client_id', clientId)
   118	      .not('weight_kg', 'is', null)
   119	      .order('date', { ascending: false })
   120	      .limit(1)
   121	      .maybeSingle(),
   122	
   123	    // Weekly trend: last 7 days — full macros for grid
   124	    (async () => {
   125	      const today = new Date()
   126	      const days: string[] = []
   127	      for (let i = 6; i >= 0; i--) {
   128	        const d = new Date(today)
   129	        d.setDate(today.getDate() - i)
   130	        days.push(d.toISOString().slice(0, 10))
   131	      }
   132	      return svc()
   133	        .from('nutrition_meals')
   134	        .select('physiological_date, total_calories, total_protein_g, total_carbs_g, total_fat_g')
   135	        .eq('client_id', clientId)
   136	        .neq('meal_type', 'drinks')
   137	        .in('physiological_date', days)
   138	    })(),
   139	
   140	    // 90-day logged dates for streak + calendar
   141	    (async () => {
   142	      const d90ago = new Date()
   143	      d90ago.setDate(d90ago.getDate() - 89)
   144	      const from90 = d90ago.toISOString().slice(0, 10)
   145	      return svc()
   146	        .from('nutrition_meals')
   147	        .select('physiological_date')
   148	        .eq('client_id', clientId)
   149	        .neq('meal_type', 'drinks')
   150	        .gte('physiological_date', from90)
   151	        .order('physiological_date', { ascending: true })
   152	    })(),
   153	
   154	    // Client language preference
   155	    svc()
   156	      .from('client_preferences')
   157	      .select('language')
   158	      .eq('client_id', clientId)
   159	      .maybeSingle(),
   160	
   161	    // Last period date for cycle sync (female only)
   162	    // assessment_responses has no client_id — join via assessment_submissions
   163	    isFemale
   164	      ? (async () => {
   165	          const { data: subs } = await svc()
   166	            .from('assessment_submissions')
   167	            .select('id')
   168	            .eq('client_id', clientId)
   169	            .order('submitted_at', { ascending: false })
   170	            .limit(3)
   171	          const subIds = (subs ?? []).map((s: { id: string }) => s.id)
   172	          if (subIds.length === 0) return { data: null, error: null }
   173	          return svc()
   174	            .from('assessment_responses')
   175	            .select('value_text, numeric_value')
   176	            .eq('field_key', 'menstrual_cycle')
   177	            .in('submission_id', subIds)
   178	            .not('value_text', 'is', null)
   179	            .order('created_at', { ascending: false })
   180	            .limit(1)
   181	            .maybeSingle()
   182	        })()
   183	      : Promise.resolve({ data: null, error: null }),
   184	
   185	    // Cycle logs for gold-standard engine (female only)
   186	    isFemale
   187	      ? svc()
   188	          .from('menstrual_cycle_logs')
   189	          .select('period_start_date, period_end_date, computed_cycle_length_days')
   190	          .eq('client_id', clientId)
   191	          .order('period_start_date', { ascending: false })
   192	          .limit(7)
   193	      : Promise.resolve({ data: null, error: null }),
   194	
   195	    fetchClientDayOverride(svc(), clientId, date),
   196	  ])
   197	
   198	  // ── Body weight ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   199	  const bodyWeightRow = weightResult.status === 'fulfilled' ? weightResult.value.data : null
   200	  const checkinWeightRow = checkinWeightResult.status === 'fulfilled' ? checkinWeightResult.value.data : null
   201	  const bodyWeightKg = checkinWeightRow?.weight_kg != null
   202	    ? Number(checkinWeightRow.weight_kg)
   203	    : (bodyWeightRow?.numeric_value ? Number(bodyWeightRow.numeric_value) : null)
   204	
   205	  // ── Protocol day ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   206	  const protoData = protoResult.status === 'fulfilled' ? protoResult.value.data : null
   207	  const baseProtocolDay = resolveProtocolDayByDate(
   208	    date,
   209	    (protoData as any)?.schedule_start_date ?? null,
   210	    (protoData?.nutrition_protocol_days as any) ?? [],
   211	    (protoData?.nutrition_protocol_schedule_slots as any) ?? [],
   212	  )
   213	  const dayOverride = dayOverrideResult.status === 'fulfilled' ? dayOverrideResult.value : null
   214	  const protocolDay = dayOverride?.kind === 'off'
   215	    ? resolveRestProtocolDay(((protoData?.nutrition_protocol_days as any[]) ?? [])) ?? baseProtocolDay
   216	    : baseProtocolDay
   217	  const tdeeAdaptive = (protoData as any)?.tdee_adaptive ?? null
   218	  const tdeeDataSource = (protoData as any)?.tdee_data_source ?? null
   219	  const cycleSyncEnabled: boolean = (protoData as any)?.cycle_sync_enabled ?? false
   220	  const protocolDays: Array<{ name: string; kcal: number; protein_g: number; carbs_g: number; fat_g: number; carb_cycle_type?: string | null; recommendations?: string | null }> =
   221	    ((protoData?.nutrition_protocol_days as any[]) ?? []).map((d: any) => ({
   222	      name:            String(d.name ?? ''),
   223	      kcal:            Number(d.calories ?? 0),
   224	      protein_g:       Number(d.protein_g ?? 0),
   225	      carbs_g:         Number(d.carbs_g ?? 0),
   226	      fat_g:           Number(d.fat_g ?? 0),
   227	      carb_cycle_type: d.carb_cycle_type ?? null,
   228	      recommendations: d.recommendations ?? null,
   229	    }))
   230	
   231	  // Map schedule slots to day names for the protocol tab
   232	  const rawSlots: any[] = (protoData?.nutrition_protocol_schedule_slots as any[]) ?? []
   233	  const rawDays: any[]  = (protoData?.nutrition_protocol_days as any[]) ?? []
   234	  const scheduleSlots: Array<{ dow: number; dayName: string; carbCycleType: string | null }> =
   235	    rawSlots.map((slot: any) => {
   236	      const day = rawDays.find((d: any) => d.position === slot.protocol_day_position)
   237	      return {
   238	        dow:           Number(slot.dow),
   239	        dayName:       String(day?.name ?? ''),
   240	        carbCycleType: day?.carb_cycle_type ?? null,
   241	      }
   242	    })
   243	
   244	  const td = protocolDay
   245	  let target: NutritionMacros = {
   246	    kcal:      Number(td?.calories     ?? 0),
   247	    protein_g: Number(td?.protein_g    ?? 0),
   248	    carbs_g:   Number(td?.carbs_g      ?? 0),
   249	    fat_g:     Number(td?.fat_g        ?? 0),
   250	    water_ml:  Number(td?.hydration_ml ?? 2500),
   251	  }
   252	
   253	  // ── Consumed today ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   254	  const rawMeals = mealsResult.status === 'fulfilled' ? (mealsResult.value.data ?? []) : []
   255	  const meals: NutritionMeal[] = rawMeals.map((m: any) => ({
   256	    ...m,
   257	    total_calories: computeMacroEnergy({
   258	      protein_g: Number(m.total_protein_g ?? 0),
   259	      carbs_g: Number(m.total_carbs_g ?? 0),
   260	      fat_g: Number(m.total_fat_g ?? 0),
   261	      fiber_g: Number(m.total_fiber_g ?? 0),
   262	    }),
   263	    entries: m.nutrition_entries ?? [],
   264	    nutrition_entries: undefined,
   265	  }))
   266	  const water = waterResult.status === 'fulfilled' ? (waterResult.value.data ?? []) : []
   267	  const preps: SmartNutritionPrep[] = prepsResult.status === 'fulfilled'
   268	    ? ((prepsResult.value.data ?? []) as any[]).map((prep) => ({
   269	        ...prep,
   270	        meal_slot: prep.meal_slot ?? prep.meal_type ?? 'snack',
   271	        variant_group_id: prep.variant_group_id ?? prep.meal_slot ?? prep.meal_type ?? 'snack',
   272	        scenario_key: prep.scenario_key ?? 'default',
   273	        scenario_label: prep.scenario_label ?? "Scénario principal",
   274	        is_active: prep.is_active === true,
   275	        entries: Array.isArray(prep.entries) ? prep.entries : [],
   276	        total_calories: Number(prep.total_calories ?? 0),
   277	        total_protein_g: Number(prep.total_protein_g ?? 0),
   278	        total_carbs_g: Number(prep.total_carbs_g ?? 0),
   279	        total_fat_g: Number(prep.total_fat_g ?? 0),
   280	        total_fiber_g: Number(prep.total_fiber_g ?? 0),
   281	      }))
   282	    : []
   283	
   284	  const consumedBase = meals.reduce(
   285	    (acc, m) => ({
   286	      kcal:      acc.kcal      + Number(m.total_calories  ?? 0),
   287	      protein_g: acc.protein_g + Number(m.total_protein_g ?? 0),
   288	      carbs_g:   acc.carbs_g   + Number(m.total_carbs_g   ?? 0),
   289	      fat_g:     acc.fat_g     + Number(m.total_fat_g     ?? 0),
   290	    }),
   291	    { kcal: 0, protein_g: 0, carbs_g: 0, fat_g: 0 },
   292	  )
   293	  const water_ml = water.reduce((s, w) => s + Number(w.amount_ml ?? 0), 0)
   294	  const caffeine_mg = water.reduce((s, w) => s + Number(w.caffeine_mg ?? 0), 0)
   295	  const consumed: NutritionMacros = { ...consumedBase, water_ml, caffeine_mg }
   296	
   297	  // ── IA alerts (pure fn, no HTTP) ──────────────────────────────────────────
   298	  const hasLunchLog = meals.some(m => m.meal_type === 'lunch')
   299	  const rawAlerts = computeNutritionAlerts({
   300	    consumed: { ...consumedBase, water_ml, caffeine_mg },
   301	    target,
   302	    currentHour: new Date().getHours(),
   303	    hasLunchLog,
   304	  })
   305	  const alerts: GenericAlert[] = rawAlerts.map(a => ({
   306	    code: a.code,
   307	    severity: a.severity,
   308	    title: a.title,
   309	    body: a.body,
   310	  }))
   311	
   312	  // ── Weekly trend ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   313	  const today = new Date()
   314	  const days: string[] = []
   315	  for (let i = 6; i >= 0; i--) {
   316	    const d = new Date(today)
   317	    d.setDate(today.getDate() - i)
   318	    days.push(d.toISOString().slice(0, 10))
   319	  }
   320	  const trendMeals = trendResult.status === 'fulfilled' ? (trendResult.value.data ?? []) : []
   321	  type DayTotals = { kcal: number; protein_g: number; carbs_g: number; fat_g: number }
   322	  const trendTotals: Record<string, DayTotals> = {}
   323	  for (const d of days) trendTotals[d] = { kcal: 0, protein_g: 0, carbs_g: 0, fat_g: 0 }
   324	  for (const m of trendMeals) {
   325	    const key = (m as any).physiological_date as string
   326	    if (!trendTotals[key]) continue
   327	    trendTotals[key].kcal      += computeMacroEnergy({
   328	      protein_g: Number((m as any).total_protein_g ?? 0),
   329	      carbs_g: Number((m as any).total_carbs_g ?? 0),
   330	      fat_g: Number((m as any).total_fat_g ?? 0),
   331	    })
   332	    trendTotals[key].protein_g += Number((m as any).total_protein_g ?? 0)
   333	    trendTotals[key].carbs_g   += Number((m as any).total_carbs_g   ?? 0)
   334	    trendTotals[key].fat_g     += Number((m as any).total_fat_g     ?? 0)
   335	  }
   336	  const trend = days.map(d => ({
   337	    date:      d,
   338	    consumed:  trendTotals[d].kcal,
   339	    protein_g: trendTotals[d].protein_g,
   340	    carbs_g:   trendTotals[d].carbs_g,
   341	    fat_g:     trendTotals[d].fat_g,
   342	    target:    target.kcal,
   343	    targetProtein: target.protein_g,
   344	    targetCarbs:   target.carbs_g,
   345	    targetFat:     target.fat_g,
   346	  }))
   347	
   348	  // ── Streak / logged dates ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
   349	  const streakMeals = streakResult.status === 'fulfilled' ? (streakResult.value.data ?? []) : []
   350	  const loggedDatesSet = new Set<string>(
   351	    streakMeals.map((m: any) => m.physiological_date as string)
   352	  )
   353	
   354	  // ── Language ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   355	  const rawLang = prefsResult.status === 'fulfilled' ? (prefsResult.value as any)?.data?.language : null
   356	  const lang: ClientLang = ['fr', 'en', 'es'].includes(rawLang) ? (rawLang as ClientLang) : 'fr'
   357	
   358	  // ── Cycle Sync (female only) ──────────────────────────────────────────────
   359	  let cycleSyncPhase: CyclePhase | null = null
   360	  let cycleSyncAdjustment: CycleSyncAdjustment | null = null
   361	  let cycleDay: number | null = null
   362	
   363	  if (isFemale) {
   364	    const cycleRow = cycleResult.status === 'fulfilled' ? (cycleResult.value as any)?.data : null
   365	    if (cycleRow) {
   366	      // value_text may be ISO date (last period) or numeric day string
   367	      const raw = cycleRow.value_text ?? null
   368	      const numericDay = cycleRow.numeric_value ? Number(cycleRow.numeric_value) : null
   369	
   370	      if (numericDay && numericDay >= 1) {
   371	        cycleDay = numericDay
   372	      } else if (raw && /^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}/.test(raw)) {
   373	        // Compute cycle day from last period date
   374	        const lastPeriod = new Date(raw)
   375	        const todayDate = new Date(date)
   376	        const diffMs = todayDate.getTime() - lastPeriod.getTime()
   377	        const diffDays = Math.floor(diffMs / (24 * 60 * 60 * 1000))
   378	        cycleDay = diffDays >= 0 ? (diffDays % 28) + 1 : null
   379	      }
   380	    }
   381	    if (cycleDay !== null) {
   382	      cycleSyncPhase = detectCurrentPhase(cycleDay)
   383	      cycleSyncAdjustment = getCycleSyncAdjustment(cycleSyncPhase)
   384	    }
   385	  }
   386	
   387	  // ── CycleState v2 (gold-standard engine) ─────────────────────────────────
   388	  let cycleState: CycleState | null = null
   389	  if (isFemale) {
   390	    const rawCycleLogs = cycleLogsResult.status === 'fulfilled' ? ((cycleLogsResult.value as any)?.data ?? []) : []
   391	    const cycleLogs: CycleLog[] = rawCycleLogs
   392	    const bilanRow = cycleResult.status === 'fulfilled' ? (cycleResult.value as any)?.data : null
   393	    const bilanValue: string | null = bilanRow?.value_text ?? null
   394	    cycleState = getCycleStateFromLogs(cycleLogs, bilanValue)
   395	  }
   396	
   397	  // Runtime cycle sync adjustment — applied only when coach enabled it and client has active phase
   398	  if (cycleSyncEnabled && cycleState?.currentPhase) {
   399	    const adj = getCycleSyncAdjustment(cycleState.currentPhase)
   400	    target = {
   401	      kcal:      Math.max(0, target.kcal      + adj.caloriesDelta),
   402	      protein_g: Math.max(0, target.protein_g + adj.proteinDelta),
   403	      carbs_g:   Math.max(0, target.carbs_g   + adj.carbsDelta),
   404	      fat_g:     Math.max(0, target.fat_g     + adj.fatDelta),
   405	      water_ml:  Math.max(0, target.water_ml  + adj.hydrationDeltaMl),
   406	    }
   407	  }
   408	
   409	  // Day type badge for TopBar
   410	  const isTrainingDay = dayOverride?.kind === 'off'
   411	    ? false
   412	    : inferTrainingDay((protocolDay as Record<string, unknown>) ?? null)
   413	  const dayTypeLabel = String((protocolDay as Record<string, unknown> | null)?.name ?? 'Repos')
   414	  const dayTypeBadge = (
   415	    <span
   416	      className="text-[9px] font-barlow-condensed font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.14em] px-2 py-1 rounded-lg"
   417	      style={{
   418	        background: isTrainingDay ? NUTRITION_UI_COLORS.trainingDayBg : NUTRITION_UI_COLORS.restDayBg,
   419	        color: isTrainingDay ? NUTRITION_UI_COLORS.trainingDay : NUTRITION_UI_COLORS.restDay,
   420	        border: `0.5px solid ${isTrainingDay ? NUTRITION_UI_COLORS.trainingDayBorder : NUTRITION_UI_COLORS.restDayBorder}`,
   421	      }}
   422	    >
   423	      {dayTypeLabel}
   424	    </span>
   425	  )
   426	
   427	  return (
   428	    <NutritionClientPage
   429	      date={date}
   430	      target={target}
   431	      consumed={consumed}
   432	      meals={meals}
   433	      preps={preps}
   434	      alerts={alerts}
   435	      trend={trend}
   436	      loggedDates={loggedDatesSet}
   437	      tdeeAdaptive={tdeeAdaptive}
   438	      tdeeDataSource={tdeeDataSource}
   439	      bodyWeightKg={bodyWeightKg}
   440	      gender={(client as { gender?: string | null }).gender ?? null}
   441	      protocolDay={protocolDay}
   442	      lang={lang}
   443	      dayTypeBadge={dayTypeBadge}
   444	      cycleSyncPhase={cycleSyncPhase}
   445	      cycleSyncAdjustment={cycleSyncAdjustment}
   446	      cycleDay={cycleDay}
   447	      cycleState={cycleState}
   448	      protocolDays={protocolDays}
   449	      scheduleSlots={scheduleSlots}
   450	      cycleSyncEnabled={cycleSyncEnabled}
   451	    />
   452	  )
   453	}

------------------------------------------------------------
FILE: components/client/CaffeineGlyph.tsx
------------------------------------------------------------
     1	"use client"
     2	
     3	import { DRINK_PRESETS, type DrinkType } from "@/lib/client/nutrition/drinks"
     4	
     5	type GlyphSize = "sm" | "md" | "lg"
     6	
     7	interface Props {
     8	  drinkType: DrinkType
     9	  active?: boolean
    10	  size?: GlyphSize
    11	  className?: string
    12	  color?: string
    13	}
    14	
    15	const SIZE_MAP: Record<GlyphSize, { glyph: number; gap: number; chip: string }> = {
    16	  sm: { glyph: 11, gap: 4, chip: "h-6 px-1.5" },
    17	  md: { glyph: 13, gap: 4, chip: "h-7 px-2" },
    18	  lg: { glyph: 15, gap: 5, chip: "h-8 px-2.5" },
    19	}
    20	
    21	function BeanGlyph({ size, color }: { size: number; color: string }) {
    22	  return (
    23	    <svg width={size} height={size} viewBox="0 0 16 16" aria-hidden="true">
    24	      <path
    25	        d="M8 1.5c2.9 0 5 2.2 5 5.5S10.9 14.5 8 14.5 3 12.3 3 9 5.1 1.5 8 1.5Z"
    26	        fill="none"
    27	        stroke={color}
    28	        strokeWidth="1.7"
    29	        strokeLinecap="round"
    30	        strokeLinejoin="round"
    31	      />
    32	      <path
    33	        d="M7.9 2.5c.7 1.2 1.1 2.6 1.1 4.2 0 2.3-.8 4.3-2.3 5.8"
    34	        fill="none"
    35	        stroke={color}
    36	        strokeWidth="1.4"
    37	        strokeLinecap="round"
    38	      />
    39	    </svg>
    40	  )
    41	}
    42	
    43	function LeafGlyph({ size, color }: { size: number; color: string }) {
    44	  return (
    45	    <svg width={size} height={size} viewBox="0 0 16 16" aria-hidden="true">
    46	      <path
    47	        d="M12.8 2.8c-3.6-.7-7 .9-8.8 4.4C2.6 10 2.8 12.5 3.2 13.7c1.2.4 3.7.6 6.5-.9 3.5-1.8 5.1-5.2 4.4-8.8-.1-.5-.7-.9-1.3-1Z"
    48	        fill="none"
    49	        stroke={color}
    50	        strokeWidth="1.7"
    51	        strokeLinecap="round"
    52	        strokeLinejoin="round"
    53	      />
    54	      <path
    55	        d="M4.8 11.2c1.9-2.4 4.3-4.3 7.2-5.6"
    56	        fill="none"
    57	        stroke={color}
    58	        strokeWidth="1.4"
    59	        strokeLinecap="round"
    60	      />
    61	    </svg>
    62	  )
    63	}
    64	
    65	export function CaffeineGlyph({ drinkType, active = false, size = "md", className = "", color }: Props) {
    66	  const preset = DRINK_PRESETS[drinkType]
    67	  const dims = SIZE_MAP[size]
    68	  const count = preset.cupCount
    69	  const iconColor = color ?? (active ? "#111111" : preset.accent)
    70	  const isTea = drinkType === "tea"
    71	
    72	  return (
    73	    <div
    74	      className={`inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-xl border ${dims.chip} ${className}`}
    75	      style={{
    76	        background: active ? preset.accent : "rgba(255,255,255,0.04)",
    77	        borderColor: active ? `${preset.accent}55` : "rgba(255,255,255,0.08)",
    78	        boxShadow: active ? `0 0 0 1px ${preset.accent}22 inset` : "none",
    79	      }}
    80	      aria-hidden="true"
    81	    >
    82	      <div className="flex items-center justify-center" style={{ gap: dims.gap }}>
    83	        {isTea ? (
    84	          <LeafGlyph size={dims.glyph + 2} color={iconColor} />
    85	        ) : (
    86	          Array.from({ length: count }).map((_, index) => (
    87	            <BeanGlyph
    88	              key={`${drinkType}-${index}`}
    89	              size={dims.glyph}
    90	              color={iconColor}
    91	            />
    92	          ))
    93	        )}
    94	      </div>
    95	    </div>
    96	  )
    97	}

------------------------------------------------------------
FILE: components/client/QuickCaffeineModal.tsx
------------------------------------------------------------
     1	"use client"
     2	
     3	import { useEffect, useMemo, useState } from "react"
     4	import { useRouter } from "next/navigation"
     5	import { motion, AnimatePresence } from "framer-motion"
     6	import { Minus, Plus, Trash2, X } from "lucide-react"
     7	import { DRINK_PRESETS, estimateCaffeineMg, type DrinkType } from "@/lib/client/nutrition/drinks"
     8	import { CaffeineGlyph } from "@/components/client/CaffeineGlyph"
     9	
    10	type CaffeineLog = {
    11	  id: string
    12	  amount_ml: number
    13	  caffeine_mg: number
    14	  drink_type: DrinkType
    15	  logged_at: string
    16	}
    17	
    18	interface Props {
    19	  open: boolean
    20	  onClose: () => void
    21	  date?: string
    22	  onLogged?: (mg: number) => void
    23	  onDeleted?: (mg: number) => void
    24	}
    25	
    26	function formatTime(iso: string): string {
    27	  return new Date(iso).toLocaleTimeString("fr-FR", { hour: "2-digit", minute: "2-digit" })
    28	}
    29	
    30	export default function QuickCaffeineModal({ open, onClose, date, onLogged, onDeleted }: Props) {
    31	  const router = useRouter()
    32	  const [drinkType, setDrinkType] = useState<DrinkType>("coffee")
    33	  const [ml, setMl] = useState(DRINK_PRESETS.coffee.baseAmountMl)
    34	  const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false)
    35	  const [done, setDone] = useState(false)
    36	  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null)
    37	  const [logs, setLogs] = useState<CaffeineLog[]>([])
    38	  const [deletingId, setDeletingId] = useState<string | null>(null)
    39	
    40	  useEffect(() => {
    41	    if (!open) return
    42	    const url = new URL("/api/client/water", window.location.origin)
    43	    url.searchParams.set("kind", "caffeine")
    44	    if (date) url.searchParams.set("date", date)
    45	    fetch(url)
    46	      .then(r => r.json())
    47	      .then(d => setLogs(d.logs ?? []))
    48	      .catch(() => {})
    49	  }, [open, date])
    50	
    51	  useEffect(() => {
    52	    if (!open) return
    53	    const preset = DRINK_PRESETS[drinkType]
    54	    setMl(preset.baseAmountMl)
    55	  }, [drinkType, open])
    56	
    57	  const caffeineMg = useMemo(() => estimateCaffeineMg(drinkType, ml), [drinkType, ml])
    58	  const totalMl = logs.reduce((s, l) => s + l.amount_ml, 0)
    59	  const totalMg = logs.reduce((s, l) => s + l.caffeine_mg, 0)
    60	
    61	  async function log() {
    62	    if (saving) return
    63	    setSaving(true)
    64	    setError(null)
    65	    onLogged?.(caffeineMg)
    66	
    67	    try {
    68	      const res = await fetch("/api/client/water", {
    69	        method: "POST",
    70	        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
    71	        body: JSON.stringify({
    72	          amount_ml: ml,
    73	          caffeine_mg: caffeineMg,
    74	          drink_type: drinkType,
    75	          date,
    76	        }),
    77	      })
    78	
    79	      if (!res.ok) {
    80	        const json = await res.json().catch(() => ({}))
    81	        setError(json.error ?? "Impossible d'enregistrer la boisson.")
    82	        setSaving(false)
    83	        return
    84	      }
    85	
    86	      const payload = await res.json().catch(() => ({}))
    87	      const newLog: CaffeineLog = {
    88	        id: payload.id ?? crypto.randomUUID(),
    89	        amount_ml: ml,
    90	        caffeine_mg: caffeineMg,
    91	        drink_type: drinkType,
    92	        logged_at: payload.logged_at ?? new Date().toISOString(),
    93	      }
    94	      setLogs(prev => [...prev, newLog])
    95	      setDone(true)
    96	      setTimeout(() => {
    97	        setDone(false)
    98	        setSaving(false)
    99	        router.refresh()
   100	      }, 700)
   101	    } catch {
   102	      setError("Impossible d'enregistrer la boisson.")
   103	      setSaving(false)
   104	    }
   105	  }
   106	
   107	  async function deleteLog(log: CaffeineLog) {
   108	    setDeletingId(log.id)
   109	    try {
   110	      const res = await fetch(`/api/client/water/${log.id}`, { method: "DELETE" })
   111	      if (res.ok) {
   112	        setLogs(prev => prev.filter(l => l.id !== log.id))
   113	        onDeleted?.(log.caffeine_mg)
   114	        router.refresh()
   115	      }
   116	    } finally {
   117	      setDeletingId(null)
   118	    }
   119	  }
   120	
   121	  const options: DrinkType[] = ["espresso", "coffee", "lungo", "tea"]
   122	
   123	  return (
   124	    <AnimatePresence>
   125	      {open && (
   126	        <>
   127	          <motion.div
   128	            initial={{ opacity: 0 }}
   129	            animate={{ opacity: 1 }}
   130	            exit={{ opacity: 0 }}
   131	            onClick={onClose}
   132	            className="fixed inset-0 z-[80] bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-[2px]"
   133	          />
   134	          <motion.div
   135	            initial={{ y: "100%" }}
   136	            animate={{ y: 0, transition: { type: "spring", stiffness: 300, damping: 30 } }}
   137	            exit={{ y: "100%", transition: { duration: 0.2, ease: "easeIn" } }}
   138	            className="fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 z-[90] rounded-t-2xl"
   139	            style={{ background: "#0d0d0d", maxHeight: "88vh", display: "flex", flexDirection: "column" }}
   140	          >
   141	            <div className="relative flex items-center justify-between px-5 pt-5 pb-4 shrink-0">
   142	              <div className="absolute top-2.5 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 w-10 h-1 rounded-full bg-white/[0.10]" />
   143	              <p className="text-[15px] font-barlow-condensed font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.12em] text-white">
   144	                Café & thé
   145	              </p>
   146	              <button
   147	                onClick={onClose}
   148	                className="h-8 w-8 flex items-center justify-center rounded-xl bg-white/[0.06] text-white/40 hover:text-white/70 transition-colors"
   149	              >
   150	                <X size={14} />
   151	              </button>
   152	            </div>
   153	
   154	            <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto min-h-0 px-5 pb-8">
   155	              {logs.length > 0 && (
   156	                <div className="mb-4">
   157	                  <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-2">
   158	                    <p className="text-[9px] font-barlow-condensed font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-white/30">Aujourd'hui</p>
   159	                    <p className="text-[11px] font-bold tabular-nums" style={{ color: DRINK_PRESETS[drinkType].accent }}>
   160	                      {totalMg}mg cumulés · {totalMl}ml
   161	                    </p>
   162	                  </div>
   163	                  <div className="space-y-1.5 max-h-[160px] overflow-y-auto">
   164	                    {logs.map(log => {
   165	                      const label = DRINK_PRESETS[log.drink_type]?.label ?? "Boisson"
   166	                      const entryUnit = log.drink_type === "tea" ? "théine" : "caféine"
   167	                      return (
   168	                        <div
   169	                          key={log.id}
   170	                          className="flex items-center justify-between bg-white/[0.03] rounded-xl px-3 py-2"
   171	                        >
   172	                          <div className="flex items-center gap-2 min-w-0">
   173	                            <CaffeineGlyph drinkType={log.drink_type} active={false} size="sm" color={DRINK_PRESETS[log.drink_type]?.accent ?? "#c08457"} className="shrink-0" />
   174	                            <span className="text-[13px] font-bold text-white tabular-nums">{log.amount_ml} ml</span>
   175	                            <span className="text-[10px] text-white/25 truncate">{label} · {log.caffeine_mg}mg {entryUnit}</span>
   176	                            <span className="text-[10px] text-white/20 shrink-0">{formatTime(log.logged_at)}</span>
   177	                          </div>
   178	                          <button
   179	                            onClick={() => deleteLog(log)}
   180	                            disabled={deletingId === log.id}
   181	                            className="h-7 w-7 flex items-center justify-center rounded-lg bg-white/[0.06] text-white/40 hover:text-white/70 active:scale-95 transition-all disabled:opacity-40"
   182	                          >
   183	                            <Trash2 size={12} />
   184	                          </button>
   185	                        </div>
   186	                      )
   187	                    })}
   188	                  </div>
   189	                  <div className="h-px bg-white/[0.06] mt-3 mb-4" />
   190	                </div>
   191	              )}
   192	
   193	              <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-2 mb-4">
   194	                {options.map((type) => {
   195	                  const preset = DRINK_PRESETS[type]
   196	                  const active = drinkType === type
   197	                  const density = Math.round((preset.baseCaffeineMg / preset.baseAmountMl) * 100)
   198	                  return (
   199	                    <button
   200	                      key={type}
   201	                      onClick={() => setDrinkType(type)}
   202	                      className={`rounded-2xl px-3 py-3 text-left transition-all active:scale-[0.98] ${
   203	                        active ? "bg-white/[0.08] border border-white/10" : "bg-white/[0.03]"
   204	                      }`}
   205	                      style={active ? { boxShadow: `0 0 0 1px ${preset.accent}22 inset` } : undefined}
   206	                    >
   207	                      <CaffeineGlyph drinkType={type} active={active} size="lg" className="mx-auto" color={active ? "#111111" : preset.accent} />
   208	                      <div className="mt-2 flex items-center justify-between">
   209	                        <span className="text-[12px] font-bold text-white">{preset.label}</span>
   210	                        <span className="text-[10px] text-white/30 tabular-nums">{preset.baseAmountMl}ml</span>
   211	                      </div>
   212	                      <p className="text-[10px] text-white/35 leading-tight mt-1">
   213	                        {preset.baseCaffeineMg}mg · {density}mg/100ml · {preset.strengthLabel}
   214	                      </p>
   215	                    </button>
   216	                  )
   217	                })}
   218	              </div>
   219	
   220	              <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-5">
   221	                <button
   222	                  onClick={() => setMl(m => Math.max(20, m - 20))}
   223	                  className="h-10 w-10 flex items-center justify-center bg-white/[0.06] rounded-xl text-white active:scale-95 shrink-0"
   224	                >
   225	                  <Minus size={15} />
   226	                </button>
   227	                <div className="flex-1 text-center">
   228	                  <p className="text-[28px] font-black text-white leading-none tabular-nums">{ml}</p>
   229	                  <p className="text-[10px] text-white/30 font-barlow-condensed uppercase tracking-wider mt-0.5">millilitres</p>
   230	                </div>
   231	                <button
   232	                  onClick={() => setMl(m => Math.min(600, m + 20))}
   233	                  className="h-10 w-10 flex items-center justify-center bg-white/[0.06] rounded-xl text-white active:scale-95 shrink-0"
   234	                >
   235	                  <Plus size={15} />
   236	                </button>
   237	              </div>
   238	
   239	              <div className="mb-4 rounded-2xl bg-white/[0.03] px-4 py-3">
   240	                <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
   241	                  <span className="text-[10px] uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-white/35 font-bold">Charge active</span>
   242	                  <span className="text-[14px] font-black text-white tabular-nums">{caffeineMg} mg</span>
   243	                </div>
   244	                <div className="mt-2 h-1.5 bg-white/[0.06] rounded-full overflow-hidden">
   245	                  <div
   246	                    className="h-full rounded-full"
   247	                    style={{
   248	                      width: `${Math.min(100, (caffeineMg / 160) * 100)}%`,
   249	                      background: DRINK_PRESETS[drinkType].accent,
   250	                      transition: "width 0.25s ease",
   251	                    }}
   252	                  />
   253	                </div>
   254	                <p className="mt-2 text-[10px] text-white/30">
   255	                  {drinkType === "tea" ? "théine estimée" : "caféine estimée"} à partir du volume choisi.
   256	                </p>
   257	              </div>
   258	
   259	              {error && <p className="text-[11px] text-red-400 text-center mb-3">{error}</p>}
   260	
   261	              <button
   262	                onClick={log}
   263	                disabled={saving && !done}
   264	                className={`w-full h-12 flex items-center justify-center gap-2 rounded-xl font-barlow-condensed font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-[12px] transition-all active:scale-[0.98] ${
   265	                  done ? "bg-white/[0.06] text-white/50" : "disabled:opacity-60"
   266	                }`}
   267	                style={done ? undefined : { background: DRINK_PRESETS[drinkType].accent, color: "#080808" }}
   268	              >
   269	                {done ? "Boisson loguée" : saving ? "Enregistrement..." : `Loguer ${DRINK_PRESETS[drinkType].label}`}
   270	              </button>
   271	            </div>
   272	          </motion.div>
   273	        </>
   274	      )}
   275	    </AnimatePresence>
   276	  )
   277	}

FILE: components/client/QuickLogSheet.tsx
------------------------------------------------------------
     1	"use client";
     2	
     3	import { useEffect, useState } from "react";
     4	import { motion, AnimatePresence } from "framer-motion";
     5	import { X, Drop, ForkKnife, Lightning } from "@phosphor-icons/react";
     6	import dynamic from "next/dynamic";
     7	import type { CycleState } from "@/lib/cycle/cycleEngine";
     8	import type { NutritionMacros } from "@/components/client/smart/SmartNutritionWidget";
     9	import { CaffeineGlyph } from "@/components/client/CaffeineGlyph";
    10	
    11	const QuickWaterModal   = dynamic(() => import("@/components/client/QuickWaterModal"),           { ssr: false });
    12	const QuickCaffeineModal = dynamic(() => import("@/components/client/QuickCaffeineModal"),       { ssr: false });
    13	const FreeActivitySheet = dynamic(() => import("@/components/client/smart/FreeActivitySheet"),   { ssr: false });
    14	const LogPeriodSheet    = dynamic(() => import("@/components/client/cycle/LogPeriodSheet"),      { ssr: false });
    15	const MealLogSheet      = dynamic(() => import("@/components/client/smart/MealLogSheet"),        { ssr: false });
    16	const VoiceLogSheet     = dynamic(() => import("@/components/client/smart/VoiceLogSheet"),       { ssr: false });
    17	
    18	interface Props {
    19	  open: boolean;
    20	  onClose: () => void;
    21	}
    22	
    23	type BalanceContext = {
    24	  consumed: NutritionMacros
    25	  target: NutritionMacros
    26	}
    27	
    28	type SubSheet = "water" | "caffeine" | "activity" | "cycle" | "meal" | "meal-voice" | null;
    29	
    30	const BASE_ACTIONS = [
    31	  {
    32	    key: "water" as const,
    33	    Icon: Drop,
    34	    label: "Eau",
    35	    sub: "Logger ma consommation d'eau",
    36	  },
    37	  {
    38	    key: "caffeine" as const,
    39	    Icon: Drop,
    40	    label: "Café & thé",
    41	    sub: "Espresso, normal, lungo",
    42	  },
    43	  {
    44	    key: "meal" as const,
    45	    Icon: ForkKnife,
    46	    label: "Repas",
    47	    sub: "Ajouter un repas ou aliment",
    48	  },
    49	  {
    50	    key: "activity" as const,
    51	    Icon: Lightning,
    52	    label: "Activité",
    53	    sub: "Course, marche, sport libre…",
    54	  },
    55	];
    56	
    57	export default function QuickLogSheet({ open, onClose }: Props) {
    58	  const [sub, setSub] = useState<SubSheet>(null);
    59	  const [cycleState, setCycleState] = useState<CycleState | null>(null);
    60	  const [balanceContext, setBalanceContext] = useState<BalanceContext | null>(null);
    61	
    62	  useEffect(() => {
    63	    if (!open) return;
    64	    // Cycle state
    65	    fetch("/api/client/cycle/status")
    66	      .then(r => r.ok ? r.json() : null)
    67	      .then(data => { if (data?.cycleState) setCycleState(data.cycleState); })
    68	      .catch(() => {});
    69	    // Nutrition balance du jour pour les jauges live
    70	    fetch("/api/client/nutrition/today-progress")
    71	      .then(r => r.ok ? r.json() : null)
    72	      .then(data => {
    73	        if (!data?.target) return;
    74	        const toMacros = (d: { calories: number; protein_g: number; carbs_g: number; fat_g: number }): NutritionMacros => ({
    75	          kcal: d.calories,
    76	          protein_g: d.protein_g,
    77	          carbs_g: d.carbs_g,
    78	          fat_g: d.fat_g,
    79	          water_ml: 0,
    80	        });
    81	        setBalanceContext({ consumed: toMacros(data.consumed), target: toMacros(data.target) });
    82	      })
    83	      .catch(() => {});
    84	  }, [open]);
    85	
    86	  function handleClose() {
    87	    setSub(null);
    88	    onClose();
    89	  }
    90	
    91	  function handleAction(key: string) {
    92	    if (key === "water")    { setSub("water"); return; }
    93	    if (key === "caffeine") { setSub("caffeine"); return; }
    94	    if (key === "activity") { setSub("activity"); return; }
    95	    if (key === "cycle")    { setSub("cycle"); return; }
    96	    // "meal" → ouvrir directement MealLogSheet standard, pas de sélecteur intermédiaire
    97	    if (key === "meal")     { setSub("meal"); return; }
    98	  }
    99	
   100	  const actions = [
   101	    ...BASE_ACTIONS,
   102	    ...(cycleState?.hasActiveCycle ? [{
   103	      key: "cycle" as const,
   104	      Icon: Drop,
   105	      label: "Cycle",
   106	      sub: "Début ou fin de règles",
   107	    }] : []),
   108	  ];
   109	
   110	  return (
   111	    <>
   112	      {/* Main quick-log sheet */}
   113	      <AnimatePresence>
   114	        {open && sub === null && (
   115	          <>
   116	            <motion.div
   117	              key="overlay"
   118	              className="fixed inset-0 z-[60] bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-[2px]"
   119	              initial={{ opacity: 0 }}
   120	              animate={{ opacity: 1 }}
   121	              exit={{ opacity: 0 }}
   122	              onClick={handleClose}
   123	            />
   124	            <motion.div
   125	              key="sheet"
   126	              className="fixed left-0 right-0 bottom-0 z-[70] rounded-t-2xl"
   127	              style={{ background: '#0d0d0d', maxHeight: '88vh', display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', paddingBottom: "max(env(safe-area-inset-bottom), 16px)" }}
   128	              initial={{ y: "100%" }}
   129	              animate={{ y: 0 }}
   130	              exit={{ y: "100%" }}
   131	              transition={{ type: "spring", stiffness: 300, damping: 30 }}
   132	            >
   133	              {/* Header */}
   134	              <div className="relative flex items-center justify-between px-5 pt-5 pb-4 shrink-0">
   135	                <div className="absolute top-2.5 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 w-10 h-1 rounded-full bg-white/[0.10]" />
   136	                <p className="text-[15px] font-barlow-condensed font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.12em] text-white">
   137	                  Logger
   138	                </p>
   139	                <button
   140	                  onClick={handleClose}
   141	                  className="w-8 h-8 flex items-center justify-center rounded-xl bg-white/[0.06] text-white/40 active:bg-white/[0.08]"
   142	                >
   143	                  <X size={15} />
   144	                </button>
   145	              </div>
   146	
   147	              {/* Actions */}
   148	              <div className="px-4 pb-4 flex flex-col gap-2">
   149	                <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-2">
   150	                  {actions.filter(action => action.key === "water" || action.key === "caffeine").map(({ key, Icon, label, sub: subLabel }) => (
   151	                    <button
   152	                      key={key}
   153	                      onClick={() => handleAction(key)}
   154	                      className="flex items-center gap-3 px-3 h-[64px] rounded-xl bg-white/[0.03] active:bg-white/[0.06] transition-colors text-left"
   155	                    >
   156	                      <div className="w-10 h-10 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center shrink-0 bg-white/[0.06]">
   157	                        {key === "caffeine" ? <CaffeineGlyph drinkType="coffee" active size="sm" color="#111111" /> : <Icon size={18} className="text-white/70" />}
   158	                      </div>
   159	                      <div className="flex flex-col min-w-0">
   160	                        <span className="text-[13px] font-barlow font-semibold text-[#e0e0e0] leading-tight">
   161	                          {label}
   162	                        </span>
   163	                        <span className="text-[10px] font-barlow text-white/40 leading-tight truncate">
   164	                          {subLabel}
   165	                        </span>
   166	                      </div>
   167	                    </button>
   168	                  ))}
   169	                </div>
   170	                <div className="flex flex-col gap-2">
   171	                  {actions.filter(action => action.key !== "water" && action.key !== "caffeine").map(({ key, Icon, label, sub: subLabel }) => (
   172	                    <button
   173	                      key={key}
   174	                      onClick={() => handleAction(key)}
   175	                      className="flex items-center gap-4 px-4 h-[60px] rounded-xl bg-white/[0.03] active:bg-white/[0.06] transition-colors text-left"
   176	                    >
   177	                      <div className="w-9 h-9 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center shrink-0 bg-white/[0.06]">
   178	                        <Icon size={18} className="text-white/70" />
   179	                      </div>
   180	                      <div className="flex flex-col min-w-0">
   181	                        <span className="text-[14px] font-barlow font-semibold text-[#e0e0e0] leading-tight">
   182	                          {label}
   183	                        </span>
   184	                        <span className="text-[11px] font-barlow text-white/40 leading-tight truncate">
   185	                          {subLabel}
   186	                        </span>
   187	                      </div>
   188	                    </button>
   189	                  ))}
   190	                </div>
   191	              </div>
   192	            </motion.div>
   193	          </>
   194	        )}
   195	      </AnimatePresence>
   196	
   197	      {/* Sub-sheets */}
   198	      <QuickWaterModal
   199	        open={sub === "water"}
   200	        onClose={() => { setSub(null); onClose(); }}
   201	      />
   202	      <QuickCaffeineModal
   203	        open={sub === "caffeine"}
   204	        onClose={() => { setSub(null); onClose(); }}
   205	      />
   206	      <FreeActivitySheet
   207	        open={sub === "activity"}
   208	        onClose={() => { setSub(null); onClose(); }}
   209	        onSaved={() => { setSub(null); onClose(); }}
   210	      />
   211	      <LogPeriodSheet
   212	        open={sub === "cycle"}
   213	        cycleState={cycleState}
   214	        onClose={() => { setSub(null); onClose(); }}
   215	        onUpdated={(newState) => { setCycleState(newState); setSub(null); onClose(); }}
   216	      />
   217	      {/* Repas → surface unifiée avec jauges live */}
   218	      <MealLogSheet
   219	        open={sub === "meal"}
   220	        composerMode="standard"
   221	        intent="track"
   222	        balanceContext={balanceContext ?? undefined}
   223	        onClose={() => { setSub(null); onClose(); }}
   224	        onSuccess={() => { setSub(null); onClose(); }}
   225	      />
   226	      <VoiceLogSheet
   227	        open={sub === "meal-voice"}
   228	        onClose={() => { setSub(null); onClose(); }}
   229	        onSuccess={() => { setSub(null); onClose(); }}
   230	        initialInputMode="voice"
   231	      />
   232	    </>
   233	  );
   234	}

------------------------------------------------------------
FILE: components/client/QuickWaterModal.tsx
------------------------------------------------------------
     1	'use client'
     2	
     3	import { useState, useEffect } from 'react'
     4	import { useRouter } from 'next/navigation'
     5	import { motion, AnimatePresence } from 'framer-motion'
     6	import { X, Droplets, Plus, Minus, Trash2 } from 'lucide-react'
     7	import { useClientT } from '@/components/client/ClientI18nProvider'
     8	import { NUTRITION_UI_COLORS } from '@/lib/nutrition/ui-colors'
     9	
    10	const QUICK_AMOUNTS = [150, 250, 330, 500]
    11	
    12	type WaterLog = { id: string; amount_ml: number; logged_at: string }
    13	
    14	interface Props {
    15	  open: boolean
    16	  onClose: () => void
    17	  onLogged?: (ml: number) => void
    18	  onDeleted?: (ml: number) => void
    19	  date?: string
    20	}
    21	
    22	function formatTime(iso: string): string {
    23	  return new Date(iso).toLocaleTimeString('fr-FR', { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' })
    24	}
    25	
    26	export default function QuickWaterModal({ open, onClose, onLogged, onDeleted, date }: Props) {
    27	  const { t } = useClientT()
    28	  const router = useRouter()
    29	  const [ml, setMl] = useState(250)
    30	  const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false)
    31	  const [done, setDone] = useState(false)
    32	  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null)
    33	  const [logs, setLogs] = useState<WaterLog[]>([])
    34	  const [deletingId, setDeletingId] = useState<string | null>(null)
    35	
    36	  useEffect(() => {
    37	    if (!open) return
    38	    const url = new URL('/api/client/water', window.location.origin)
    39	    if (date) url.searchParams.set('date', date)
    40	    url.searchParams.set('kind', 'water')
    41	    fetch(url)
    42	      .then(r => r.json())
    43	      .then(d => setLogs(d.logs ?? []))
    44	      .catch(() => {})
    45	  }, [open, date])
    46	
    47	  async function log() {
    48	    if (saving) return
    49	    setSaving(true)
    50	    setError(null)
    51	    onLogged?.(ml)
    52	
    53	    try {
    54	      const res = await fetch('/api/client/water', {
    55	        method: 'POST',
    56	        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
    57	        body: JSON.stringify({ amount_ml: ml, date }),
    58	      })
    59	
    60	      if (!res.ok) {
    61	        const json = await res.json().catch(() => ({}))
    62	        setError(json.error ?? t('water.error'))
    63	        setSaving(false)
    64	        return
    65	      }
    66	
    67	      const payload = await res.json().catch(() => ({}))
    68	      const newLog: WaterLog = {
    69	        id: payload.id ?? crypto.randomUUID(),
    70	        amount_ml: ml,
    71	        logged_at: payload.logged_at ?? new Date().toISOString(),
    72	      }
    73	      setLogs(prev => [...prev, newLog])
    74	      setDone(true)
    75	      setTimeout(() => {
    76	        setDone(false)
    77	        setSaving(false)
    78	        router.refresh()
    79	      }, 700)
    80	    } catch {
    81	      setError(t('water.error'))
    82	      setSaving(false)
    83	    }
    84	  }
    85	
    86	  async function deleteLog(log: WaterLog) {
    87	    setDeletingId(log.id)
    88	    try {
    89	      const res = await fetch(`/api/client/water/${log.id}`, { method: 'DELETE' })
    90	      if (res.ok) {
    91	        setLogs(prev => prev.filter(l => l.id !== log.id))
    92	        onDeleted?.(log.amount_ml)
    93	        router.refresh()
    94	      }
    95	    } finally {
    96	      setDeletingId(null)
    97	    }
    98	  }
    99	
   100	  const totalMl = logs.reduce((s, l) => s + l.amount_ml, 0)
   101	
   102	  return (
   103	    <AnimatePresence>
   104	      {open && (
   105	        <>
   106	          <motion.div
   107	            initial={{ opacity: 0 }}
   108	            animate={{ opacity: 1 }}
   109	            exit={{ opacity: 0 }}
   110	            onClick={onClose}
   111	            className="fixed inset-0 z-[80] bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-[2px]"
   112	          />
   113	          <motion.div
   114	            initial={{ y: '100%' }}
   115	            animate={{ y: 0, transition: { type: 'spring', stiffness: 300, damping: 30 } }}
   116	            exit={{ y: '100%', transition: { duration: 0.2, ease: 'easeIn' } }}
   117	            className="fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 z-[90] rounded-t-2xl"
   118	            style={{ background: '#0d0d0d', maxHeight: '88vh', display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column' }}
   119	          >
   120	            {/* Header */}
   121	            <div className="relative flex items-center justify-between px-5 pt-5 pb-4 shrink-0">
   122	              <div className="absolute top-2.5 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 w-10 h-1 rounded-full bg-white/[0.10]" />
   123	              <p className="text-[15px] font-barlow-condensed font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.12em] text-white">
   124	                {t('water.title')}
   125	              </p>
   126	              <button
   127	                onClick={onClose}
   128	                className="h-8 w-8 flex items-center justify-center rounded-xl bg-white/[0.06] text-white/40 hover:text-white/70 transition-colors"
   129	              >
   130	                <X size={14} />
   131	              </button>
   132	            </div>
   133	
   134	            {/* Scrollable content */}
   135	            <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto min-h-0 px-5 pb-8">
   136	
   137	              {/* Log history */}
   138	              {logs.length > 0 && (
   139	                <div className="mb-4">
   140	                  <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-2">
   141	                    <p className="text-[9px] font-barlow-condensed font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-white/30">Aujourd'hui</p>
   142	                    <p className="text-[11px] font-bold tabular-nums" style={{ color: NUTRITION_UI_COLORS.water }}>
   143	                      {(totalMl / 1000).toFixed(1)} L total
   144	                    </p>
   145	                  </div>
   146	                  <div className="space-y-1.5 max-h-[140px] overflow-y-auto">
   147	                    {logs.map(log => (
   148	                      <div
   149	                        key={log.id}
   150	                        className="flex items-center justify-between bg-white/[0.03] rounded-xl px-3 py-2"
   151	                      >
   152	                        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
   153	                          <Droplets size={12} style={{ color: NUTRITION_UI_COLORS.water }} className="opacity-60" />
   154	                          <span className="text-[13px] font-bold text-white tabular-nums">{log.amount_ml} ml</span>
   155	                          <span className="text-[10px] text-white/25">{formatTime(log.logged_at)}</span>
   156	                        </div>
   157	                        <button
   158	                          onClick={() => deleteLog(log)}
   159	                          disabled={deletingId === log.id}
   160	                          className="h-7 w-7 flex items-center justify-center rounded-lg bg-white/[0.06] text-white/40 hover:text-white/70 active:scale-95 transition-all disabled:opacity-40"
   161	                        >
   162	                          <Trash2 size={12} />
   163	                        </button>
   164	                      </div>
   165	                    ))}
   166	                  </div>
   167	                  <div className="h-px bg-white/[0.06] mt-3 mb-4" />
   168	                </div>
   169	              )}
   170	
   171	              {/* Quick pills */}
   172	              <div className="grid grid-cols-4 gap-2 mb-4">
   173	                {QUICK_AMOUNTS.map(a => (
   174	                  <button
   175	                    key={a}
   176	                    onClick={() => setMl(a)}
   177	                    className={`h-10 rounded-xl text-[12px] font-bold transition-all active:scale-95 ${
   178	                      ml === a
   179	                        ? 'bg-white/[0.10] text-white'
   180	                        : 'bg-white/[0.04] text-white/40'
   181	                    }`}
   182	                  >
   183	                    {a}ml
   184	                  </button>
   185	                ))}
   186	              </div>
   187	
   188	              {/* Fine-tune */}
   189	              <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-5">
   190	                <button
   191	                  onClick={() => setMl(m => Math.max(50, m - 50))}
   192	                  className="h-10 w-10 flex items-center justify-center bg-white/[0.06] rounded-xl text-white active:scale-95 shrink-0"
   193	                >
   194	                  <Minus size={15} />
   195	                </button>
   196	                <div className="flex-1 text-center">
   197	                  <p className="text-[28px] font-black text-white leading-none tabular-nums">{ml}</p>
   198	                  <p className="text-[10px] text-white/30 font-barlow-condensed uppercase tracking-wider mt-0.5">millilitres</p>
   199	                </div>
   200	                <button
   201	                  onClick={() => setMl(m => Math.min(2000, m + 50))}
   202	                  className="h-10 w-10 flex items-center justify-center bg-white/[0.06] rounded-xl text-white active:scale-95 shrink-0"
   203	                >
   204	                  <Plus size={15} />
   205	                </button>
   206	              </div>
   207	
   208	              {error && (
   209	                <p className="text-[11px] text-red-400 text-center mb-3">{error}</p>
   210	              )}
   211	
   212	              <button
   213	                onClick={log}
   214	                disabled={saving && !done}
   215	                className={`w-full h-12 flex items-center justify-center gap-2 rounded-xl font-barlow-condensed font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-[12px] transition-all active:scale-[0.98] ${
   216	                  done
   217	                    ? 'bg-white/[0.06] text-white/50'
   218	                    : 'disabled:opacity-60'
   219	                }`}
   220	                style={done ? undefined : { background: '#f2f2f2', color: '#080808' }}
   221	              >
   222	                <Droplets size={15} />
   223	                {done ? t('water.logged', { ml: String(ml) }) : saving ? t('water.saving') : t('water.log', { ml: String(ml) })}
   224	              </button>
   225	            </div>
   226	          </motion.div>
   227	        </>
   228	      )}
   229	    </AnimatePresence>
   230	  )
   231	}

------------------------------------------------------------
FILE: components/client/smart/SmartNutritionWidget.tsx
------------------------------------------------------------
     1	'use client'
     2	
     3	import { useState } from 'react'
     4	import Link from 'next/link'
     5	import { Plus } from 'lucide-react'
     6	import QuickWaterModal from '../QuickWaterModal'
     7	import { useClientT } from '@/components/client/ClientI18nProvider'
     8	import { getNutritionProgressMeta, type NutritionProgressState } from '@/lib/nutrition/progress'
     9	import { NUTRITION_UI_COLORS } from '@/lib/nutrition/ui-colors'
    10	
    11	export type NutritionMacros = {
    12	  kcal: number
    13	  protein_g: number
    14	  carbs_g: number
    15	  fat_g: number
    16	  water_ml: number
    17	  caffeine_mg?: number
    18	}
    19	
    20	export type SmartNutritionWidgetProps = {
    21	  consumed: NutritionMacros
    22	  target: NutritionMacros
    23	  proteinStreakDays?: number
    24	}
    25	
    26	function formatOverflow(value: number, unit: 'g' | 'L'): string | null {
    27	  if (value <= 0) return null
    28	  return unit === 'L'
    29	    ? `+${value.toFixed(1)} ${unit} au-dessus`
    30	    : `+${Math.round(value)}${unit} au-dessus`
    31	}
    32	
    33	export default function SmartNutritionWidget({ consumed, target, proteinStreakDays }: SmartNutritionWidgetProps) {
    34	  const { t } = useClientT()
    35	  const MACROS = [
    36	    { key: 'protein_g' as const, label: t('smart.nutrition.protein'), color: NUTRITION_UI_COLORS.protein },
    37	    { key: 'carbs_g'   as const, label: t('smart.nutrition.carbs'),   color: NUTRITION_UI_COLORS.carbs },
    38	    { key: 'fat_g'     as const, label: t('smart.nutrition.fat'),     color: NUTRITION_UI_COLORS.fat },
    39	  ]
    40	  const [waterOpen, setWaterOpen] = useState(false)
    41	  const [waterDelta, setWaterDelta] = useState(0)
    42	  const effectiveWaterMl = consumed.water_ml + waterDelta
    43	
    44	  function getStateColor(state: NutritionProgressState, baseColor: string): string {
    45	    if (state === 'over')       return '#ef4444'
    46	    if (state === 'near_limit') return '#f59e0b'
    47	    return baseColor
    48	  }
    49	
    50	  const kcalMeta = getNutritionProgressMeta(consumed.kcal, target.kcal)
    51	  const waterMeta = getNutritionProgressMeta(effectiveWaterMl, target.water_ml)
    52	  const waterOverflowLabel = formatOverflow((effectiveWaterMl - target.water_ml) / 1000, 'L')
    53	  const kcalPct = Math.min(kcalMeta.ratio, 1)
    54	  const r = 80
    55	  const arcTotal = Math.PI * r
    56	  const arcOffset = arcTotal * (1 - kcalPct)
    57	  const kcalStroke = getStateColor(kcalMeta.state, NUTRITION_UI_COLORS.calories)
    58	
    59	  return (
    60	    <>
    61	      <QuickWaterModal
    62	        open={waterOpen}
    63	        onClose={() => setWaterOpen(false)}
    64	        onLogged={ml => setWaterDelta(d => d + ml)}
    65	        onDeleted={ml => setWaterDelta(d => d - ml)}
    66	      />
    67	      <Link
    68	        href="/client/nutrition"
    69	        className="block bg-[#111111] rounded-2xl p-5 active:scale-[0.99] transition-transform"
    70	      >
    71	        <div className="flex items-baseline justify-between mb-3">
    72	          <span className="font-barlow-condensed font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-[11px] text-white/30">Nutrition</span>
    73	          <span className="text-[10px] font-semibold text-[#f2f2f2]">→</span>
    74	        </div>
    75	
    76	        {/* Arc demi-cercle */}
    77	        <div className="relative" style={{ height: 110 }}>
    78	          <svg viewBox="0 0 200 110" className="w-full h-full">
    79	            <path
    80	              d={`M ${100 - r} 100 A ${r} ${r} 0 0 1 ${100 + r} 100`}
    81	              fill="none"
    82	              stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.08)"
    83	              strokeWidth={12}
    84	              strokeLinecap="round"
    85	            />
    86	            <path
    87	              d={`M ${100 - r} 100 A ${r} ${r} 0 0 1 ${100 + r} 100`}
    88	              fill="none"
    89	              stroke={kcalStroke}
    90	              strokeWidth={12}
    91	              strokeLinecap="round"
    92	              strokeDasharray={arcTotal}
    93	              strokeDashoffset={arcOffset}
    94	              style={{ transition: 'stroke-dashoffset 0.6s ease' }}
    95	            />
    96	          </svg>
    97	          <div className="absolute inset-0 flex flex-col items-center justify-end pb-1">
    98	            <div className="font-black leading-none text-white tabular-nums text-[28px]">
    99	              {Math.round(consumed.kcal)}
   100	            </div>
   101	            <div className="text-[9px] uppercase tracking-[0.12em] text-white/35 mt-1">Calories consommées</div>
   102	            <div className="text-[10px] text-white/50 tabular-nums">/ {target.kcal} kcal</div>
   103	          </div>
   104	        </div>
   105	
   106	        {/* Barres macros */}
   107	        <div className="flex flex-col gap-2 mt-3">
   108	          {MACROS.map(m => {
   109	            const c = (consumed[m.key] as number) ?? 0
   110	            const tg = (target[m.key] as number) ?? 0
   111	            const meta = getNutritionProgressMeta(c, tg)
   112	            const fillColor = getStateColor(meta.state, m.color)
   113	            const overflowLabel = formatOverflow(c - tg, 'g')
   114	            return (
   115	              <div key={m.key}>
   116	                <div className="flex justify-between text-[10px] mb-1">
   117	                  <span className="text-white/50 uppercase tracking-[0.1em] font-bold">{m.label}</span>
   118	                  <span className="font-bold tabular-nums" style={{ color: fillColor }}>
   119	                    {Math.round(c)}/{tg}g
   120	                  </span>
   121	                </div>
   122	                <div className="h-1.5 bg-white/[0.06] rounded-full overflow-hidden">
   123	                  <div
   124	                    className="h-full rounded-full"
   125	                    style={{
   126	                      width: `${meta.clampedPercent}%`,
   127	                      background: fillColor,
   128	                      transition: 'width 0.4s ease',
   129	                    }}
   130	                  />
   131	                </div>
   132	                <div className="mt-1 min-h-[14px] text-[9px] font-bold tabular-nums" style={{ color: meta.state === 'over' ? '#ef4444' : 'rgba(255,255,255,0.28)' }}>
   133	                  {overflowLabel ?? '\u00A0'}
   134	                </div>
   135	              </div>
   136	            )
   137	          })}
   138	        </div>
   139	
   140	        {/* Eau */}
   141	        <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mt-4 pt-3">
   142	          <div className="flex-1">
   143	            <div className="flex justify-between text-[10px] mb-1">
   144	              <span className="text-white/50 uppercase tracking-[0.1em] font-bold">Hydratation</span>
   145	              <span className="text-white font-bold tabular-nums">
   146	                {(effectiveWaterMl / 1000).toFixed(1)} / {(target.water_ml / 1000).toFixed(1)} L
   147	              </span>
   148	            </div>
   149	            <div className="h-1.5 bg-white/[0.06] rounded-full overflow-hidden">
   150	              <div
   151	                className="h-full rounded-full"
   152	                style={{
   153	                  width: `${waterMeta.clampedPercent}%`,
   154	                  background: getStateColor(waterMeta.state, NUTRITION_UI_COLORS.water),
   155	                  transition: 'width 0.4s ease',
   156	                }}
   157	              />
   158	            </div>
   159	            <div className="mt-1 min-h-[14px] text-[9px] font-bold tabular-nums" style={{ color: waterMeta.state === 'over' ? '#ef4444' : 'rgba(255,255,255,0.28)' }}>
   160	              {waterOverflowLabel ?? '\u00A0'}
   161	            </div>
   162	          </div>
   163	          <button
   164	            onClick={e => { e.preventDefault(); setWaterOpen(true) }}
   165	            className="w-9 h-9 rounded-xl bg-[#f2f2f2] flex items-center justify-center text-[#080808] active:scale-95 transition-transform shrink-0"
   166	          >
   167	            <Plus size={16} strokeWidth={2.5} />
   168	          </button>
   169	        </div>
   170	
   171	        {consumed.caffeine_mg != null && consumed.caffeine_mg > 0 && (
   172	          <div className="mt-2 flex items-center justify-between rounded-xl bg-white/[0.03] px-3 py-2 text-[10px]">
   173	            <span className="text-white/40 uppercase tracking-[0.1em] font-bold">Caféine / théine</span>
   174	            <span className="text-white font-bold tabular-nums">{Math.round(consumed.caffeine_mg)} mg</span>
   175	          </div>
   176	        )}
   177	
   178	        {/* Régularité protéines */}
   179	        {proteinStreakDays !== undefined && target.protein_g > 0 && (
   180	          <div className="mt-3 pt-3">
   181	            <div className="flex justify-between text-[10px] mb-1.5">
   182	              <span className="text-white/40 uppercase tracking-[0.1em] font-bold">{t('nutrition.consistency')}</span>
   183	              <span className="text-white/60 tabular-nums font-bold">{proteinStreakDays}/7j</span>
   184	            </div>
   185	            <div className="h-1 bg-white/[0.06] rounded-full overflow-hidden">
   186	              <div
   187	                className="h-full rounded-full bg-[#f2f2f2]"
   188	                style={{ width: `${(proteinStreakDays / 7) * 100}%`, transition: 'width 0.6s ease' }}
   189	              />
   190	            </div>
   191	          </div>
   192	        )}
   193	      </Link>
   194	    </>
   195	  )
   196	}

    47	}

    50	  return (
    51	    <div>
    52	      <p className="text-[9px] font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.16em] text-white/35 mb-3">Phase du cycle menstruel</p>

    58	            className={`flex flex-col items-start gap-1 p-3 rounded-xl border-[0.3px] text-left transition-all ${

    62	            }`}

    64	            <div className="flex items-center justify-between w-full">
    65	              <span className="text-[12px] font-bold">{p.label}</span>
    66	              <span className="text-[9px] opacity-60">{p.days}</span>
    67	            </div>

    69	          </button>
    70	        ))}
    71	      </div>
    72	    </div>
    73	  )
    74	}

    97	
    98	function calculateCyclePhase(dayOfCycle: number, cycleLength: number): CyclePhase {
    99	  if (dayOfCycle >= 1 && dayOfCycle <= 5) return 'menstrual'
   100	  if (dayOfCycle >= 6 && dayOfCycle <= Math.floor(cycleLength / 2) - 1) return 'follicular'
   101	  if (dayOfCycle >= Math.floor(cycleLength / 2) && dayOfCycle <= Math.floor(cycleLength / 2) + 1) return 'ovulatory'
   102	  return 'luteal'
   103	}

   107	function FieldLabel({ children }: { children: React.ReactNode }) {
   108	  return <label className="block text-[9px] font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.16em] text-white/35 mb-1">{children}</label>
   109	}
   110	
   111	function NumInput({ value, onChange, placeholder, step, min, max, className = '' }: {
   112	  value: string; onChange: (v: string) => void; placeholder?: string
   113	  step?: string; min?: string; max?: string; className?: string
   114	}) {
   115	  return (
   116	    <input
   117	      type="number" value={value} step={step} min={min} max={max}
   118	      onChange={e => onChange(e.target.value)} placeholder={placeholder}
   119	      className={`w-full h-8 rounded-lg bg-white/[0.04] border-[0.3px] border-white/[0.06] px-3 text-[12px] font-semibold text-white placeholder:text-white/20 outline-none focus:border-white/[0.12] transition-colors ${className}`}
   120	    />
   121	  )
   122	}

   124	function DSSelect<T extends string>({ value, onChange, options }: {
   125	  value: T; onChange: (v: T) => void; options: { value: T; label: string }[]
   126	}) {
   127	  return (
   128	    <select value={value} onChange={e => onChange(e.target.value as T)}
   129	      className="w-full h-8 rounded-lg bg-white/[0.04] border-[0.3px] border-white/[0.06] px-3 text-[12px] font-semibold text-white outline-none focus:border-white/[0.12] transition-colors appearance-none cursor-pointer"
   130	    >
   131	      {options.map(o => <option key={o.value} value={o.value} className="bg-[#181818]">{o.label}</option>)}
   132	    </select>
   133	  )
   134	}

   137	  return (
   138	    <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-3">
   139	      {Icon && <Icon size={11} className="text-white/30" strokeWidth={1.75} />}

   141	    </div>

   145	function ModuleBlock({
   146	  title, icon: Icon, badge, defaultOpen = false, accent, children,
   147	}: {
   148	  title: string; icon?: React.ElementType; badge?: string; defaultOpen?: boolean
   149	  accent?: string; children: React.ReactNode
   150	}) {
   151	  const [open, setOpen] = useState(defaultOpen)
   152	  return (
   153	    <div className="bg-white/[0.02] border-[0.3px] border-white/[0.06] rounded-2xl overflow-hidden">
   154	      <button
   155	        onClick={() => setOpen(o => !o)}
   156	        className="w-full flex items-center justify-between px-4 py-3 hover:bg-white/[0.02] transition-colors"
   157	      >
   158	        <div className="flex items-center gap-2.5">
   159	          {Icon && <Icon size={13} className={accent ?? 'text-white/30'} strokeWidth={1.75} />}
   160	          <span className="text-[11px] font-semibold text-white/70">{title}</span>
   161	          {badge && (
   162	            <span className="px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full text-[9px] font-bold bg-white/[0.06] text-white/30">
   163	              {badge}
   164	            </span>
   165	          )}
   166	        </div>
   167	        {open ? <ChevronUp size={13} className="text-white/30" /> : <ChevronDown size={13} className="text-white/30" />}
   168	      </button>
   169	      {open && <div className="px-4 pb-4 border-t-[0.3px] border-white/[0.04] pt-3">{children}</div>}
   170	    </div>
   171	  )
   172	}
