  1271	                  <DSSelect value={ccOccupation} onChange={setCcOccupation}
  1272	                    options={[
  1273	                      { value: 'sedentaire', label: 'Sédentaire (bureau)' }, { value: 'debout', label: 'Debout (commerce)' },
  1274	                      { value: 'physique', label: 'Physique (chantier)' },
  1275	                    ]}
  1276	                  />
  1277	                </div>
  1278	              </div>
  1279	              <button onClick={computeCarbCycling}
  1280	                disabled={!weight || !height || !age}
  1281	                className="w-full h-10 rounded-xl bg-violet-500/15 border-[0.3px] border-violet-500/25 text-[11px] font-bold text-violet-400 hover:bg-violet-500/25 transition-all disabled:opacity-40 flex items-center justify-center gap-2">
  1282	                <RefreshCw size={13} />
  1283	                Calculer le Carb Cycling
  1284	              </button>
  1285	            </div>
  1286	
  1287	            {/* Résultats carb cycling */}
  1288	            {ccResult ? (
  1289	              <div className="space-y-3">
  1290	                <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-2 text-center">
  1291	                  {[
  1292	                    { label: 'TDEE', value: `${ccResult.tdee} kcal` }, { label: 'BF%', value: `${ccResult.bf}%` },
  1293	                    { label: 'LBM', value: `${ccResult.lbm} kg` }, { label: 'Moy./sem', value: `${ccResult.weeklyAvg} kcal` },
  1294	                  ].map(s => (
  1295	                    <div key={s.label} className="bg-white/[0.02] rounded-lg p-3 border-[0.3px] border-white/[0.04]">
  1296	                      <p className="text-[9px] text-white/35 mb-0.5">{s.label}</p>
  1297	                      <p className="text-[13px] font-black text-white">{s.value}</p>
  1298	                    </div>
  1299	                  ))}
  1300	                </div>
  1301	                <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3">
  1302	                  {/* High day */}
  1303	                  <div className="bg-emerald-500/[0.06] border-[0.3px] border-emerald-500/20 rounded-xl p-3">
  1304	                    <p className="text-[9px] font-bold uppercase tracking-wide text-emerald-400/70 mb-2">Jour HAUT</p>
  1305	                    <p className="text-[20px] font-black text-emerald-400 tabular-nums leading-none mb-1">{ccResult.high.kcal}<span className="text-[10px] text-emerald-400/50 font-normal ml-1">kcal</span></p>
  1306	                    <div className="space-y-0.5 text-[10px] text-white/50">
  1307	                      <p>P: {ccResult.high.p}g · L: {ccResult.high.f}g · G: {ccResult.high.c}g</p>
  1308	                    </div>
  1309	                    <button onClick={applyCarbCyclingHighDay}
  1310	                      className="mt-2 w-full h-7 rounded-lg bg-emerald-500/10 border-[0.3px] border-emerald-500/20 text-[10px] font-bold text-emerald-400 hover:bg-emerald-500/20 transition-all">
  1311	                      Appliquer à &quot;{activeDay?.name}&quot;
  1312	                    </button>
  1313	                  </div>
  1314	                  {/* Low day */}
  1315	                  <div className="bg-red-500/[0.06] border-[0.3px] border-red-500/20 rounded-xl p-3">
  1316	                    <p className="text-[9px] font-bold uppercase tracking-wide text-red-400/70 mb-2">Jour BAS</p>
  1317	                    <p className="text-[20px] font-black text-red-400 tabular-nums leading-none mb-1">{ccResult.low.kcal}<span className="text-[10px] text-red-400/50 font-normal ml-1">kcal</span></p>
  1318	                    <div className="space-y-0.5 text-[10px] text-white/50">
  1319	                      <p>P: {ccResult.low.p}g · L: {ccResult.low.f}g · G: {ccResult.low.c}g</p>
  1320	                    </div>
  1321	                    <button onClick={applyCarbCyclingLowDay}
  1322	                      className="mt-2 w-full h-7 rounded-lg bg-red-500/10 border-[0.3px] border-red-500/20 text-[10px] font-bold text-red-400 hover:bg-red-500/20 transition-all">
  1323	                      Appliquer à &quot;{activeDay?.name}&quot;
  1324	                    </button>
  1325	                  </div>
  1326	                </div>
  1327	                <div className="text-[10px] text-white/30">
  1328	                  Protocole {ccResult.days.high}j hauts / {ccResult.days.low}j bas · {ccResult.deficit > 0 ? `Déficit ${ccResult.deficit} kcal/j` : 'Surplus'}
  1329	                </div>
  1330	                {ccResult.warnings.map((w, i) => (
  1331	                  <div key={i} className="flex items-start gap-2 px-3 py-2 rounded-lg bg-amber-500/[0.06] border-[0.3px] border-amber-500/20">
  1332	                    <AlertTriangle size={11} className="text-amber-400 shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
  1333	                    <span className="text-[10px] text-amber-300/80">{w}</span>
  1334	                  </div>
  1335	                ))}
  1336	              </div>
  1337	            ) : (
  1338	              <div className="h-full min-h-[200px] flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-2 border-[0.3px] border-dashed border-white/[0.06] rounded-xl">
  1339	                <RefreshCw size={22} className="text-white/10" />
  1340	                <p className="text-[11px] text-white/20">Lance le calcul pour voir les résultats</p>
  1341	              </div>
  1342	            )}
  1343	          </div>
  1344	        </ModuleBlock>
  1345	
  1346	        {/* ── Hydratation ── */}
  1347	        <ModuleBlock title="Hydratation" icon={Droplets} badge="Module" accent="text-sky-400">
  1348	          <div className="grid grid-cols-1 xl:grid-cols-2 gap-5">
  1349	            <div className="space-y-3">
  1350	              <p className="text-[10px] text-white/30 leading-relaxed">
  1351	                Utilise le poids et le sexe déjà renseignés. Sélectionne le climat.
  1352	              </p>
  1353	              <div>
  1354	                <FieldLabel>Climat actuel</FieldLabel>
  1355	                <DSSelect value={hydClimate} onChange={setHydClimate}
  1356	                  options={[
  1357	                    { value: 'cold', label: '❄️ Froid (< 10°C)' }, { value: 'temperate', label: '🌤 Tempéré (10–25°C)' },
  1358	                    { value: 'hot', label: '☀️ Chaud (25–35°C)' }, { value: 'veryHot', label: '🔥 Très chaud (> 35°C)' },
  1359	                  ]}
  1360	                />
  1361	              </div>
  1362	              <div className="bg-white/[0.02] border-[0.3px] border-white/[0.06] rounded-xl p-3 text-[10px] text-white/35 space-y-0.5">
  1363	                <p>Poids : <span className="text-white/60 font-semibold">{weight || '—'} kg</span></p>
  1364	                <p>Sexe : <span className="text-white/60 font-semibold">{gender === 'female' ? 'Femme' : 'Homme'}</span></p>
  1365	                <p>Activité : <span className="text-white/60 font-semibold">{ACTIVITY_LABELS[activityLevel]}</span></p>
  1366	              </div>
  1367	              <button onClick={computeHydration} disabled={!weight}
  1368	                className="w-full h-10 rounded-xl bg-sky-500/15 border-[0.3px] border-sky-500/25 text-[11px] font-bold text-sky-400 hover:bg-sky-500/25 transition-all disabled:opacity-40 flex items-center justify-center gap-2">
  1369	                <Droplets size={13} />
  1370	                Calculer l&apos;hydratation
  1371	              </button>
  1372	            </div>
  1373	
  1374	            {hydResult ? (
  1375	              <div className="space-y-3">
  1376	                <div className="bg-sky-500/[0.08] border-[0.3px] border-sky-500/20 rounded-xl p-4 text-center">
  1377	                  <p className="text-[11px] text-sky-400/60 mb-1">Apport quotidien recommandé</p>
  1378	                  <p className="text-[36px] font-black text-sky-400 tabular-nums leading-none">{hydResult.liters.toFixed(1)}<span className="text-[16px] font-semibold ml-1">L</span></p>
  1379	                  <p className="text-[11px] text-sky-400/50 mt-1">{hydResult.glasses} verres de 250ml</p>
  1380	                </div>
  1381	                <div className="bg-white/[0.02] border-[0.3px] border-white/[0.06] rounded-xl p-3 space-y-1.5">
  1382	                  <p className="text-[9px] font-bold uppercase tracking-wide text-white/25 mb-2">Décomposition</p>
  1383	                  {[
  1384	                    { label: 'Base (35ml/kg)', value: hydResult.breakdown.base },
  1385	                    { label: 'Ajustement sexe', value: hydResult.breakdown.gender },
  1386	                    { label: 'Activité physique', value: hydResult.breakdown.activity },
  1387	                    { label: 'Climat', value: hydResult.breakdown.climate },
  1388	                  ].map(b => (
  1389	                    <div key={b.label} className="flex items-center justify-between">
  1390	                      <span className="text-[10px] text-white/35">{b.label}</span>
  1391	                      <span className={`text-[10px] font-semibold ${b.value > 0 ? 'text-sky-400' : b.value < 0 ? 'text-red-400' : 'text-white/30'}`}>
  1392	                        {b.value > 0 ? '+' : ''}{(b.value / 1000).toFixed(2)} L
  1393	                      </span>
  1394	                    </div>
  1395	                  ))}
  1396	                </div>
  1397	                <button onClick={applyHydrationToDay}
  1398	                  className="w-full flex items-center justify-center gap-2 h-9 rounded-xl bg-sky-500/10 border-[0.3px] border-sky-500/20 text-[11px] font-bold text-sky-400 hover:bg-sky-500/20 transition-all">
  1399	                  <ArrowRight size={12} />
  1400	                  Appliquer à &quot;{activeDay?.name}&quot; ({Math.round(hydResult.liters * 1000)}ml)

    79	
    80	function parseNumber(value: string) {
    81	  if (value.trim() === '') return null;
    82	  const parsed = Number(value);
    83	  return Number.isFinite(parsed) ? parsed : null;
    84	}
    85	
    86	function toStringValue(value: number | null | undefined) {
    87	  return value == null ? '' : String(value);
    88	}
    89	
    90	function useCopyState() {
    91	  const [copied, setCopied] = useState(false);
    92	
    93	  async function copy(text: string) {
    94	    await navigator.clipboard.writeText(text);
    95	    setCopied(true);
    96	    window.setTimeout(() => setCopied(false), 1500);
    97	  }
    98	
    99	  return { copied, copy };
   100	}
   101	
   102	function FieldLabel({ children }: { children: React.ReactNode }) {
   103	  return <label className="mb-1 block text-[9px] font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.16em] text-white/35">{children}</label>;
   104	}
   105	
   106	function TextField({
   107	  value,
   108	  onChange,
   109	  placeholder,
   110	  type = 'text',
   111	  min,
   112	  max,
   113	  step,
   114	}: {
   115	  value: string;
   116	  onChange: (value: string) => void;
   117	  placeholder?: string;
   118	  type?: string;
   119	  min?: string;
   120	  max?: string;
   121	  step?: string;
   122	}) {
   123	  return (
   124	    <input
   125	      value={value}
   126	      onChange={(e) => onChange(e.target.value)}
   127	      type={type}
   128	      min={min}
   129	      max={max}
   130	      step={step}
   131	      placeholder={placeholder}
   132	      className="h-9 w-full rounded-lg border-[0.3px] border-white/[0.06] bg-white/[0.04] px-3 text-[12px] font-semibold text-white outline-none transition-colors placeholder:text-white/20 focus:border-white/[0.12]"
   133	    />
   134	  );
   135	}
   136	
   137	function SelectField<T extends string>({
   138	  value,
   139	  onChange,
   140	  options,
   141	}: {
   142	  value: T;
   143	  onChange: (value: T) => void;
   144	  options: Array<{ value: T; label: string }>;
   145	}) {
   146	  return (
   147	    <select
   148	      value={value}
   149	      onChange={(e) => onChange(e.target.value as T)}
   150	      className="h-9 w-full cursor-pointer appearance-none rounded-lg border-[0.3px] border-white/[0.06] bg-white/[0.04] px-3 text-[12px] font-semibold text-white outline-none transition-colors focus:border-white/[0.12]"
   151	    >
   152	      {options.map((option) => (
   153	        <option key={option.value} value={option.value} className="bg-[#181818]">
   154	          {option.label}
   155	        </option>
   156	      ))}
   157	    </select>
   158	  );
   159	}
   160	
   161	function MetricCard({
   162	  label,
   163	  value,
   164	  suffix,
   165	  tone = 'white',
   166	}: {
   167	  label: string;
   168	  value: string | number;
   169	  suffix?: string;
   170	  tone?: 'white' | 'green' | 'amber';
   171	}) {
   172	  const toneCls =
   173	    tone === 'green' ? 'text-[#1f8a65]' : tone === 'amber' ? 'text-amber-400' : 'text-white';
   174	
   175	  return (
   176	    <div className="rounded-2xl border border-white/[0.06] bg-white/[0.03] p-3">
   177	      <p className="text-[10px] uppercase tracking-[0.16em] text-white/35">{label}</p>
   178	      <div className="mt-2 flex items-end gap-1">
   179	        <span className={`text-[22px] font-semibold leading-none ${toneCls}`}>{value}</span>
   180	        {suffix && <span className="pb-0.5 text-[10px] text-white/35">{suffix}</span>}
   181	      </div>
   182	    </div>
   183	  );
   184	}
   185	
   186	function Disclosure({
   187	  title,
   188	  children,
   189	  defaultOpen = false,
   190	  icon: Icon,
   191	}: {
   192	  title: string;
   193	  children: React.ReactNode;
   194	  defaultOpen?: boolean;
   195	  icon?: React.ElementType;
   196	}) {
   197	  const [open, setOpen] = useState(defaultOpen);
   198	
   199	  return (
   200	    <div className="rounded-2xl border border-white/[0.06] bg-white/[0.02]">
   201	      <button
   202	        type="button"
   203	        onClick={() => setOpen((value) => !value)}
   204	        className="flex w-full items-center justify-between px-4 py-3 text-left"
   205	      >
   206	        <span className="flex items-center gap-2 text-[11px] font-semibold text-white/70">
   207	          {Icon && <Icon size={13} className="text-white/35" />}
   208	          {title}
   209	        </span>
   210	        {open ? (
   211	          <ChevronUp size={13} className="text-white/30" />
   212	        ) : (
   213	          <ChevronDown size={13} className="text-white/30" />
   214	        )}
   215	      </button>
   216	      {open && <div className="border-t border-white/[0.05] px-4 py-3">{children}</div>}
   217	    </div>
   218	  );
   219	}
   220	
   221	function parsePlanFromSearch(searchParams: ReturnType<typeof useSearchParams>) {
   222	  const gender = searchParams.get('gender');
   223	  const goal = searchParams.get('goal');
   224	  const age = parseNumber(searchParams.get('age') ?? '');
   225	  const height = parseNumber(searchParams.get('height') ?? '');
   226	  const weight = parseNumber(searchParams.get('weight') ?? '');
   227	
   228	  if (gender !== 'male' && gender !== 'female') return null;
   229	  if (goal !== 'deficit' && goal !== 'maintenance' && goal !== 'surplus') return null;
   230	  if (age == null || height == null || weight == null) return null;
   231	
   232	  const occupation = parseNumber(searchParams.get('occupation') ?? '');
   233	  const phase = searchParams.get('cycle');
   234	
   235	  return {
   236	    gender,
   237	    goal,
   238	    age,
   239	    height,
   240	    weight,
   241	    steps: parseNumber(searchParams.get('steps') ?? ''),
   242	    occupation,
   243	    workouts: parseNumber(searchParams.get('workouts') ?? ''),
   244	    duration: parseNumber(searchParams.get('duration') ?? ''),
   245	    cardio: parseNumber(searchParams.get('cardio') ?? ''),
   246	    cardioDuration: parseNumber(searchParams.get('cardioDuration') ?? ''),
   247	    bodyFat: parseNumber(searchParams.get('bodyFat') ?? ''),
   248	    bmr: parseNumber(searchParams.get('bmr') ?? ''),
   249	    sleep: parseNumber(searchParams.get('sleep') ?? ''),
   250	    stress: parseNumber(searchParams.get('stress') ?? ''),
   251	    caffeine: parseNumber(searchParams.get('caffeine') ?? ''),
   252	    alcohol: parseNumber(searchParams.get('alcohol') ?? ''),
   253	    phase: phase === 'follicular' || phase === 'luteal' ? phase : 'unknown',
   254	  };
   255	}
   256	
   257	export default function PublicTdeeWizard() {
   258	  const router = useRouter();
   259	  const searchParams = useSearchParams();
   260	  const hydratedFromQuery = useRef(false);
   261	
   262	  const [step, setStep] = useState<Step>(1);
   263	  const [advancedOpen, setAdvancedOpen] = useState(false);
   264	  const [plan, setPlan] = useState<PublicTdeePlan | null>(null);
   265	  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);
   266	  const { copied, copy } = useCopyState();
   267	
   268	  const [gender, setGender] = useState<PublicTdeeInput['gender']>('male');
   269	  const [goal, setGoal] = useState<PublicTdeeInput['goal']>('deficit');
   270	  const [age, setAge] = useState('30');
   271	  const [heightCm, setHeightCm] = useState('180');
   272	  const [weightKg, setWeightKg] = useState('80');
   273	  const [dailySteps, setDailySteps] = useState('8000');
   274	  const [occupationMultiplier, setOccupationMultiplier] = useState('1.00');
   275	  const [workoutsPerWeek, setWorkoutsPerWeek] = useState('4');
   276	  const [sessionDurationMin, setSessionDurationMin] = useState('60');
   277	  const [cardioSessionsPerWeek, setCardioSessionsPerWeek] = useState('');
   278	  const [cardioDurationMin, setCardioDurationMin] = useState('');
   279	  const [bodyFatPct, setBodyFatPct] = useState('');
   280	  const [bmrMeasuredKcal, setBmrMeasuredKcal] = useState('');
   281	  const [sleepHours, setSleepHours] = useState('');
   282	  const [stressLevel, setStressLevel] = useState('');
   283	  const [caffeineDailyMg, setCaffeineDailyMg] = useState('');
   284	  const [alcoholWeekly, setAlcoholWeekly] = useState('');
   285	  const [menstrualPhase, setMenstrualPhase] = useState<PublicTdeeMenstrualPhase>('unknown');
   286	
   287	  useEffect(() => {
   288	    if (hydratedFromQuery.current) return;
   289	    const seeded = parsePlanFromSearch(searchParams);
   290	    hydratedFromQuery.current = true;
   291	    if (!seeded) return;
   292	
   293	    setGender(seeded.gender as PublicTdeeInput['gender']);
   294	    setGoal(seeded.goal as PublicTdeeInput['goal']);
   295	    setAge(String(seeded.age));
   296	    setHeightCm(String(seeded.height));
   297	    setWeightKg(String(seeded.weight));
   298	    setDailySteps(toStringValue(seeded.steps));
   299	    setOccupationMultiplier(toStringValue(seeded.occupation));
   300	    setWorkoutsPerWeek(toStringValue(seeded.workouts));
   301	    setSessionDurationMin(toStringValue(seeded.duration));
   302	    setCardioSessionsPerWeek(toStringValue(seeded.cardio));
   303	    setCardioDurationMin(toStringValue(seeded.cardioDuration));
   304	    setBodyFatPct(toStringValue(seeded.bodyFat));
   305	    setBmrMeasuredKcal(toStringValue(seeded.bmr));
   306	    setSleepHours(toStringValue(seeded.sleep));
   307	    setStressLevel(toStringValue(seeded.stress));
   308	    setCaffeineDailyMg(toStringValue(seeded.caffeine));
   309	    setAlcoholWeekly(toStringValue(seeded.alcohol));
   310	    setMenstrualPhase(seeded.phase as PublicTdeeMenstrualPhase);
   311	
   312	    try {
   313	      const computed = computePublicTdeePlan({
   314	        gender: seeded.gender as PublicTdeeInput['gender'],
   315	        goal: seeded.goal as PublicTdeeInput['goal'],
   316	        age: seeded.age,
   317	        heightCm: seeded.height,
   318	        weightKg: seeded.weight,
   319	        dailySteps: seeded.steps ?? undefined,
   320	        occupationMultiplier: seeded.occupation ?? undefined,
   321	        workoutsPerWeek: seeded.workouts ?? undefined,
   322	        sessionDurationMin: seeded.duration ?? undefined,
   323	        cardioSessionsPerWeek: seeded.cardio ?? undefined,
   324	        cardioDurationMin: seeded.cardioDuration ?? undefined,
   325	        bodyFatPct: seeded.bodyFat ?? undefined,
   326	        bmrMeasuredKcal: seeded.bmr ?? undefined,
   327	        sleepHours: seeded.sleep ?? undefined,
   328	        stressLevel: seeded.stress ?? undefined,
   329	        caffeineDailyMg: seeded.caffeine ?? undefined,
   330	        alcoholWeekly: seeded.alcohol ?? undefined,
   331	        menstrualPhase: seeded.phase,
   332	      });
   333	      setPlan(computed);
   334	      setStep(4);
   335	    } catch {
   336	      setStep(3);
   337	    }
   338	  }, [searchParams]);
   339	
   340	  const topLeft = useMemo(
   341	    () => (
   342	      <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
   343	        <button
   344	          type="button"
   345	          onClick={() => router.push('/outils')}
   346	          className="flex h-8 w-8 items-center justify-center rounded-lg border border-white/[0.06] bg-white/[0.04] text-white/40 transition-all hover:bg-white/[0.08] hover:text-white/75"
   347	        >
   348	          <ArrowLeft size={14} />
   349	        </button>
   350	        <div>
   351	          <p className="text-[9px] font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.16em] text-white/30">Nutrition · CALC_02</p>
   352	          <p className="text-[13px] font-semibold text-white">TDEE Expert</p>
   353	        </div>
   354	      </div>
   355	    ),
   356	    [router],
   357	  );
   358	
   359	  useSetTopBar(topLeft, null);
   360	
   361	  const sharePath = useMemo(() => {
   362	    if (!plan) return '';
   363	    return `/outils/tdee?${plan.shareQuery}`;
   364	  }, [plan]);
   365	
   366	  function buildInput(): PublicTdeeInput {
   367	    return {
   368	      gender,
   369	      goal,
   370	      age: Number(age),
   371	      heightCm: Number(heightCm),
   372	      weightKg: Number(weightKg),
   373	      dailySteps: parseNumber(dailySteps) ?? undefined,
   374	      occupationMultiplier: parseNumber(occupationMultiplier) ?? undefined,
   375	      workoutsPerWeek: parseNumber(workoutsPerWeek) ?? undefined,
   376	      sessionDurationMin: parseNumber(sessionDurationMin) ?? undefined,
   377	      cardioSessionsPerWeek: parseNumber(cardioSessionsPerWeek) ?? undefined,
   378	      cardioDurationMin: parseNumber(cardioDurationMin) ?? undefined,
   379	      bodyFatPct: parseNumber(bodyFatPct) ?? undefined,
   380	      bmrMeasuredKcal: parseNumber(bmrMeasuredKcal) ?? undefined,
   381	      sleepHours: parseNumber(sleepHours) ?? undefined,
   382	      stressLevel: parseNumber(stressLevel) ?? undefined,
   383	      caffeineDailyMg: parseNumber(caffeineDailyMg) ?? undefined,
   384	      alcoholWeekly: parseNumber(alcoholWeekly) ?? undefined,
   385	      menstrualPhase,
   386	    };
   387	  }
   388	
   389	  function handleCompute() {
   390	    const input = buildInput();
   391	    const issues = validatePublicTdeeInput(input);
   392	    if (issues.length > 0) {
   393	      setError(issues[0]?.message ?? 'Champs invalides.');
   394	      setPlan(null);
   395	      return false;
   396	    }
   397	
   398	    try {
   399	      const computed = computePublicTdeePlan(input);
   400	      setPlan(computed);
   401	      setError(null);
   402	      setStep(4);
   403	      return true;
   404	    } catch (err) {
   405	      setError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Impossible de calculer le plan.');
   406	      setPlan(null);
   407	      return false;
   408	    }
   409	  }
   410	
   411	  function handleNext() {
   412	    if (step === 3) {
   413	      handleCompute();
   414	      return;
   415	    }
   416	    const issues = validatePublicTdeeInput(buildInput());
   417	    if (issues.length > 0) {
   418	      setError(issues[0]?.message ?? 'Champs invalides.');
   419	      return;
   420	    }
   421	    setError(null);
   422	    setStep((current) => Math.min(4, (current + 1) as Step));
   423	  }
   424	
   425	  function handleBack() {
   426	    if (step === 4 && plan) {
   427	      setStep(3);
   428	      return;
   429	    }
   430	    setStep((current) => Math.max(1, (current - 1) as Step));
   431	  }
   432	
   433	  async function copySummary() {
   434	    if (!plan) return;
   435	    await copy(plan.exportText);
   436	  }
   437	
   438	  async function copyShareLink() {
   439	    if (!plan) return;
   440	    await copy(`${window.location.origin}${sharePath}`);
   441	  }
   442	
   443	  async function downloadJson() {
   444	    if (!plan) return;
   445	    const blob = new Blob([JSON.stringify(plan, null, 2)], { type: 'application/json' });
   446	    const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
   447	    const a = document.createElement('a');
   448	    a.href = url;
   449	    a.download = 'stryv-tdee-plan.json';
   450	    a.click();
   451	    URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
   452	  }
   453	
   454	  const currentInput = buildInput();
   455	  const validationPreview = validatePublicTdeeInput(currentInput);
   456	
   457	  return (
   458	    <main className="min-h-screen bg-[#121212] text-white">
   459	      <div className="mx-auto max-w-6xl px-6 pb-24 pt-8 md:px-8">
   460	        <section className="mb-6 rounded-[28px] border border-white/[0.06] bg-[#181818] p-5 shadow-[0_20px_60px_rgba(0,0,0,0.18)] md:p-6">
   461	          <div className="flex flex-col gap-4 md:flex-row md:items-start md:justify-between">
   462	            <div className="max-w-3xl space-y-4">
   463	              <div className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 rounded-full border border-[#1f8a65]/20 bg-[#1f8a65]/10 px-3 py-1 text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-[#1f8a65]">
   464	                <Sparkles size={12} />
   465	                Outil public expert
   466	              </div>
   467	              <div>
   468	                <h1 className="text-3xl font-semibold tracking-tight md:text-4xl">Calcule ton TDEE réel, puis programme tes jours</h1>
   469	                <p className="mt-3 max-w-2xl text-sm leading-relaxed text-white/55">
   470	                  Un wizard hybride minimaliste avec BMR, NEAT, EAT, TEF, différenciation training/rest et sortie premium dépliable.
   471	                </p>
   472	              </div>
   473	              <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2 text-[10px] font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-white/35">
   474	                <span className="rounded-full border border-white/[0.06] bg-white/[0.03] px-3 py-1">2 min</span>
   475	                <span className="rounded-full border border-white/[0.06] bg-white/[0.03] px-3 py-1">Mobile first</span>
   476	                <span className="rounded-full border border-white/[0.06] bg-white/[0.03] px-3 py-1">Open source ready</span>
   477	              </div>
   478	            </div>
   479	
   480	            <div className="grid w-full max-w-sm gap-2 rounded-2xl border border-white/[0.06] bg-white/[0.03] p-3 md:grid-cols-3">
   481	              <MetricCard label="Étape" value={step} suffix="/4" tone="green" />
   482	              <MetricCard label="Focus" value="Plan" suffix="complet" tone="amber" />
   483	              <MetricCard label="Sortie" value="Premium" suffix="dépliable" />
   484	            </div>
   485	          </div>
   486	        </section>
   487	
   488	        <section className="rounded-[28px] border border-white/[0.06] bg-[#181818] p-4 shadow-[0_20px_60px_rgba(0,0,0,0.16)] md:p-6">
   489	          <div className="mb-4 flex items-center justify-between gap-4">
   490	            <div>
   491	              <p className="text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-white/30">{STEP_META[step].label}</p>
   492	              <h2 className="mt-2 text-[18px] font-semibold text-white">{STEP_META[step].title}</h2>
   493	              <p className="mt-1 text-[13px] leading-relaxed text-white/52">{STEP_META[step].desc}</p>
   494	            </div>
   495	            <div className="hidden items-center gap-2 md:flex">
   496	              {[1, 2, 3, 4].map((value) => (
   497	                <div key={value} className={`h-2 w-12 rounded-full ${value <= step ? 'bg-[#1f8a65]' : 'bg-white/[0.06]'}`} />
   498	              ))}
   499	            </div>
   500	          </div>
   501	
   502	          {step !== 4 && (
   503	            <div className="mb-5 grid gap-2 text-[11px] font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.14em] md:grid-cols-4">
   504	              {([1, 2, 3, 4] as Step[]).map((value) => (
   505	                <button
   506	                  key={value}
   507	                  type="button"
   508	                  onClick={() => setStep(value)}
   509	                  className={`rounded-xl border px-3 py-2 text-left transition-colors ${
   510	                    value === step
   511	                      ? 'border-[#1f8a65]/25 bg-[#1f8a65]/10 text-white'
   512	                      : 'border-white/[0.06] bg-white/[0.03] text-white/40 hover:bg-white/[0.05] hover:text-white/70'
   513	                  }`}
   514	                >
   515	                  {STEP_META[value].label}
   516	                </button>
   517	              ))}
   518	            </div>
   519	          )}
   520	
   521	          {error && (
   522	            <div className="mb-4 rounded-2xl border border-red-500/20 bg-red-500/10 px-4 py-3 text-sm text-red-200">
   523	              {error}
   524	            </div>
   525	          )}
   526	
   527	          {step === 1 && (
   528	            <div className="grid gap-4 md:grid-cols-2">
   529	              <div>
   530	                <FieldLabel>Sexe</FieldLabel>
   531	                <SelectField value={gender} onChange={setGender} options={GENDER_OPTIONS} />
   532	              </div>
   533	              <div>
   534	                <FieldLabel>Objectif</FieldLabel>
   535	                <SelectField value={goal} onChange={setGoal} options={GOAL_OPTIONS} />
   536	              </div>
   537	              <div>
   538	                <FieldLabel>Âge</FieldLabel>
   539	                <TextField value={age} onChange={setAge} type="number" min="15" max="85" placeholder="30" />
   540	              </div>
   541	              <div>
   542	                <FieldLabel>Taille</FieldLabel>
   543	                <TextField value={heightCm} onChange={setHeightCm} type="number" min="140" max="220" placeholder="180" />
   544	              </div>
   545	              <div>
   546	                <FieldLabel>Poids</FieldLabel>
   547	                <TextField value={weightKg} onChange={setWeightKg} type="number" min="40" max="250" placeholder="80" />
   548	              </div>
   549	              <div>
   550	                <FieldLabel>Masse grasse estimée</FieldLabel>
   551	                <TextField value={bodyFatPct} onChange={setBodyFatPct} type="number" min="3" max="45" placeholder="Optionnel" />
   552	              </div>
   553	
   554	              <div className="md:col-span-2 rounded-2xl border border-white/[0.06] bg-white/[0.02] p-4">
   555	                <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
   556	                  <CheckCircle2 size={16} className="mt-0.5 text-[#1f8a65]" />
   557	                  <div>
   558	                    <p className="text-[12px] font-semibold text-white">Le calcul reste possible sans masse grasse.</p>
   559	                    <p className="mt-1 text-[12px] leading-relaxed text-white/45">
   560	                      Si tu ne la renseignes pas, le moteur s’appuie sur une estimation conservatrice pour garder un plan exploitable.
   561	                    </p>
   562	                  </div>
   563	                </div>
   564	              </div>
   565	            </div>
   566	          )}
   567	
   568	          {step === 2 && (
   569	            <div className="grid gap-4 md:grid-cols-2">
   570	              <div>
   571	                <FieldLabel>Pas par jour</FieldLabel>
   572	                <TextField value={dailySteps} onChange={setDailySteps} type="number" min="0" max="40000" placeholder="8000" />
   573	              </div>
   574	              <div>
   575	                <FieldLabel>Type de travail</FieldLabel>
   576	                <SelectField value={occupationMultiplier} onChange={setOccupationMultiplier} options={ACTIVITY_OPTIONS} />
   577	              </div>
   578	              <div>
   579	                <FieldLabel>Séances / semaine</FieldLabel>
   580	                <TextField value={workoutsPerWeek} onChange={setWorkoutsPerWeek} type="number" min="0" max="14" placeholder="4" />
   581	              </div>
   582	              <div>
   583	                <FieldLabel>Durée moyenne</FieldLabel>
   584	                <TextField value={sessionDurationMin} onChange={setSessionDurationMin} type="number" min="0" max="240" placeholder="60" />
   585	              </div>
   586	
   587	              <div className="md:col-span-2">
   588	                <button
   589	                  type="button"
   590	                  onClick={() => setAdvancedOpen((value) => !value)}
   591	                  className="mb-3 inline-flex items-center gap-2 rounded-full border border-white/[0.06] bg-white/[0.03] px-3 py-1.5 text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.16em] text-white/45 transition-colors hover:text-white/75"
   592	                >
   593	                  {advancedOpen ? <ChevronUp size={12} /> : <ChevronDown size={12} />}
   594	                  Affiner l’activité
   595	                </button>
   596	
   597	                {advancedOpen && (
   598	                  <div className="grid gap-4 rounded-2xl border border-white/[0.06] bg-white/[0.02] p-4 md:grid-cols-2">
   599	                    <div>
   600	                      <FieldLabel>Cardio / semaine</FieldLabel>
   601	                      <TextField value={cardioSessionsPerWeek} onChange={setCardioSessionsPerWeek} type="number" min="0" max="14" placeholder="Optionnel" />
   602	                    </div>
   603	                    <div>
   604	                      <FieldLabel>Durée cardio</FieldLabel>
   605	                      <TextField value={cardioDurationMin} onChange={setCardioDurationMin} type="number" min="0" max="240" placeholder="Optionnel" />
   606	                    </div>
   607	                  </div>
   608	                )}
   609	              </div>
   610	            </div>
   611	          )}
   612	
   613	          {step === 3 && (
   614	            <div className="grid gap-4 md:grid-cols-2">
   615	              <div>
   616	                <FieldLabel>BMR mesuré</FieldLabel>
   617	                <TextField value={bmrMeasuredKcal} onChange={setBmrMeasuredKcal} type="number" min="1000" max="4000" placeholder="Optionnel" />
   618	              </div>
   619	              <div>
   620	                <FieldLabel>Phase menstruelle</FieldLabel>
   621	                <SelectField value={menstrualPhase} onChange={setMenstrualPhase} options={PHASE_OPTIONS} />
   622	              </div>
   623	              <div>
   624	                <FieldLabel>Sommeil moyen</FieldLabel>
   625	                <TextField value={sleepHours} onChange={setSleepHours} type="number" min="0" max="16" placeholder="Optionnel" />
   626	              </div>
   627	              <div>
   628	                <FieldLabel>Stress ressenti</FieldLabel>
   629	                <TextField value={stressLevel} onChange={setStressLevel} type="number" min="1" max="10" placeholder="1 à 10" />
   630	              </div>
   631	              <div>
   632	                <FieldLabel>Caféine quotidienne</FieldLabel>
   633	                <TextField value={caffeineDailyMg} onChange={setCaffeineDailyMg} type="number" min="0" max="1200" placeholder="mg / jour" />
   634	              </div>
   635	              <div>
   636	                <FieldLabel>Alcool hebdo</FieldLabel>
   637	                <TextField value={alcoholWeekly} onChange={setAlcoholWeekly} type="number" min="0" max="30" placeholder="verres / semaine" />
   638	              </div>
   639	
   640	              <div className="md:col-span-2 rounded-2xl border border-white/[0.06] bg-white/[0.02] p-4">
   641	                <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
   642	                  <BrainCircuit size={16} className="mt-0.5 text-[#1f8a65]" />
   643	                  <div>
   644	                    <p className="text-[12px] font-semibold text-white">Les champs experts améliorent la précision, ils ne bloquent pas le plan.</p>
   645	                    <p className="mt-1 text-[12px] leading-relaxed text-white/45">
   646	                      Le moteur applique les signaux utiles seulement s’ils existent. Sinon il reste conservateur et explicable.
   647	                    </p>
   648	                  </div>
   649	                </div>
   650	              </div>
   651	
   652	              <div className="md:col-span-2 flex items-center gap-2 rounded-2xl border border-white/[0.06] bg-white/[0.02] px-4 py-3 text-[11px] text-white/50">
   653	                <ShieldCheck size={14} className="text-[#1f8a65]" />
   654	                Validation minimale actuelle: {validationPreview.length === 0 ? 'OK' : validationPreview[0]?.message}
   655	              </div>
   656	            </div>
   657	          )}
   658	
   659	          {step === 4 && plan && (
   660	            <div className="space-y-5">
   661	              <div className="grid gap-3 md:grid-cols-3">
   662	                <MetricCard label="Calories training" value={plan.split.trainingDayCalories} suffix="kcal" tone="green" />
   663	                <MetricCard label="Calories repos" value={plan.split.restDayCalories} suffix="kcal" tone="amber" />
   664	                <MetricCard label="Moyenne hebdo" value={plan.split.averageCalories} suffix="kcal" />
   665	              </div>
   666	
   667	              <div className="grid gap-3 md:grid-cols-4">
   668	                <MetricCard label="BMR" value={plan.result.breakdown.bmr} suffix="kcal" />
   669	                <MetricCard label="NEAT" value={plan.result.breakdown.neat} suffix="kcal" />
   670	                <MetricCard label="EAT" value={plan.result.breakdown.eat + plan.result.breakdown.eatCardio} suffix="kcal" />
   671	                <MetricCard label="TEF" value={Math.round(plan.result.breakdown.tef)} suffix="kcal" />
   672	              </div>
   673	
   674	              <section className="grid gap-4 lg:grid-cols-2">
   675	                <div className="rounded-[24px] border border-white/[0.06] bg-white/[0.03] p-5">
   676	                  <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-4">
   677	                    <div>
   678	                      <p className="text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-white/30">Plan complet</p>
   679	                      <h3 className="mt-2 text-[24px] font-semibold text-white">{plan.split.averageCalories} kcal</h3>
   680	                      <p className="mt-2 text-[13px] leading-relaxed text-white/50">
   681	                        {plan.input.goal === 'deficit'
   682	                          ? 'Programme orienté déficit avec jours training plus hauts et repos plus bas.'
   683	                          : plan.input.goal === 'surplus'
   684	                            ? 'Programme orienté surplus avec lissage hebdomadaire.'
   685	                            : 'Programme de maintenance avec répartition contrôlée des jours.'}
   686	                      </p>
   687	                    </div>
   688	                    <div className="rounded-full border border-[#1f8a65]/20 bg-[#1f8a65]/10 px-3 py-1 text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.16em] text-[#1f8a65]">
   689	                      {plan.confidence.label}
   690	                    </div>
   691	                  </div>
   692	
   693	                  <div className="mt-4 grid gap-3 md:grid-cols-3">
   694	                    <div className="rounded-2xl bg-white/[0.02] p-3">
   695	                      <p className="text-[10px] uppercase tracking-[0.16em] text-white/35">Protéines</p>
   696	                      <p className="mt-2 text-2xl font-semibold text-white">{plan.result.macros.p}g</p>
   697	                    </div>
   698	                    <div className="rounded-2xl bg-white/[0.02] p-3">
   699	                      <p className="text-[10px] uppercase tracking-[0.16em] text-white/35">Glucides</p>
   700	                      <p className="mt-2 text-2xl font-semibold text-white">{plan.result.macros.c}g</p>
   701	                    </div>
   702	                    <div className="rounded-2xl bg-white/[0.02] p-3">
   703	                      <p className="text-[10px] uppercase tracking-[0.16em] text-white/35">Lipides</p>
   704	                      <p className="mt-2 text-2xl font-semibold text-white">{plan.result.macros.f}g</p>
   705	                    </div>
   706	                  </div>
   707	                </div>
   708	
   709	                <div className="space-y-3 rounded-[24px] border border-white/[0.06] bg-white/[0.03] p-5">
   710	                  <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-white/30">
   711	                    <Flame size={13} className="text-[#1f8a65]" />
   712	                    Répartition hebdo
   713	                  </div>
   714	                  <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3">
   715	                    <MetricCard label="Jours training" value={plan.split.trainingDays} suffix="/7" />
   716	                    <MetricCard label="Jours repos" value={plan.split.restDays} suffix="/7" />
   717	                  </div>
   718	                  <div className="rounded-2xl border border-white/[0.06] bg-white/[0.02] p-4">
   719	                    <p className="text-[11px] font-semibold text-white/75">Macros training</p>
   720	                    <p className="mt-1 text-[12px] text-white/45">
   721	                      {plan.split.trainingMacros.protein_g}g P · {plan.split.trainingMacros.carbs_g}g G · {plan.split.trainingMacros.fat_g}g L
   722	                    </p>
   723	                  </div>
   724	                  <div className="rounded-2xl border border-white/[0.06] bg-white/[0.02] p-4">
   725	                    <p className="text-[11px] font-semibold text-white/75">Macros repos</p>
   726	                    <p className="mt-1 text-[12px] text-white/45">
   727	                      {plan.split.restMacros.protein_g}g P · {plan.split.restMacros.carbs_g}g G · {plan.split.restMacros.fat_g}g L
   728	                    </p>
   729	                  </div>
   730	                </div>
   731	              </section>
   732	
   733	              <div className="grid gap-3 lg:grid-cols-2">
   734	                <Disclosure title="Déroulement premium" defaultOpen icon={BarChart3}>
   735	                  <div className="space-y-2 text-[12px] leading-relaxed text-white/55">
   736	                    {plan.premiumSummary.map((line) => (
   737	                      <p key={line}>{line}</p>
   738	                    ))}
   739	                  </div>
   740	                </Disclosure>
   741	
   742	                <Disclosure title="Garde-fous et hypothèses" defaultOpen icon={ShieldCheck}>
   743	                  <div className="space-y-3">
   744	                    <div>
   745	                      <p className="text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.16em] text-white/35">Hypothèses</p>
   746	                      <ul className="mt-2 space-y-2 text-[12px] leading-relaxed text-white/55">
   747	                        {plan.assumptions.map((item) => (
   748	                          <li key={item} className="flex gap-2">
   749	                            <span className="mt-1 h-1.5 w-1.5 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-white/30" />
   750	                            <span>{item}</span>
   751	                          </li>
   752	                        ))}
   753	                      </ul>
   754	                    </div>
   755	                    <div>
   756	                      <p className="text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.16em] text-white/35">Garde-fous</p>
   757	                      <ul className="mt-2 space-y-2 text-[12px] leading-relaxed text-white/55">
   758	                        {plan.guardrails.map((item) => (
   759	                          <li key={item} className="flex gap-2">
   760	                            <span className="mt-1 h-1.5 w-1.5 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-[#1f8a65]" />
   761	                            <span>{item}</span>
   762	                          </li>
   763	                        ))}
   764	                      </ul>
   765	                    </div>
   766	                  </div>
   767	                </Disclosure>
   768	              </div>
   769	
   770	              <div className="grid gap-3 md:grid-cols-3">
   771	                <button
   772	                  type="button"
   773	                  onClick={copySummary}
   774	                  className="inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-2 rounded-xl border border-white/[0.06] bg-white/[0.04] px-4 py-3 text-[12px] font-semibold text-white/70 transition-colors hover:bg-white/[0.08] hover:text-white"
   775	                >
   776	                  <Copy size={14} />
   777	                  Copier le résumé
   778	                </button>
   779	                  <button
   780	                  type="button"
   781	                  onClick={copyShareLink}
   782	                  className="inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-2 rounded-xl border border-white/[0.06] bg-white/[0.04] px-4 py-3 text-[12px] font-semibold text-white/70 transition-colors hover:bg-white/[0.08] hover:text-white"
   783	                >
   784	                  <Download size={14} />
   785	                  Copier le lien
   786	                </button>
   787	                <button
   788	                  type="button"
   789	                  onClick={downloadJson}
   790	                  className="inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-2 rounded-xl border border-white/[0.06] bg-white/[0.04] px-4 py-3 text-[12px] font-semibold text-white/70 transition-colors hover:bg-white/[0.08] hover:text-white"
   791	                >
   792	                  <Download size={14} />
   793	                  Export JSON
   794	                </button>
   795	              </div>
   796	
   797	              <div className="rounded-[24px] border border-[#1f8a65]/20 bg-[#1f8a65]/10 p-5">
   798	                <div className="flex flex-col gap-4 md:flex-row md:items-center md:justify-between">
   799	                  <div>
   800	                    <p className="text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-[#1f8a65]">Passerelle finale</p>
   801	                    <h3 className="mt-2 text-lg font-semibold text-white">Recevoir un cadrage plus poussé avec STRYV</h3>
   802	                    <p className="mt-1 text-[13px] leading-relaxed text-white/55">
   803	                      Tu as déjà le plan. Si tu veux le niveau au-dessus, passe à l’admission stratégique.
   804	                    </p>
   805	                  </div>
   806	                  <Link
   807	                    href="/omni/admission"
   808	                    className="inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-2 rounded-xl bg-[#1f8a65] px-4 py-3 text-[12px] font-semibold text-white transition-colors hover:bg-[#197155]"
   809	                  >
   810	                    Aller plus loin avec STRYV
   811	                    <ArrowRight size={14} />
   812	                  </Link>
   813	                </div>
   814	              </div>
   815	
   816	              {copied && (
   817	                <div className="rounded-2xl border border-[#1f8a65]/20 bg-[#1f8a65]/10 px-4 py-3 text-sm text-[#1f8a65]">
   818	                  Copié dans le presse-papiers.
   819	                </div>
   820	              )}
   821	            </div>
   822	          )}
   823	
   824	          <div className="mt-6 flex items-center justify-between gap-3">
   825	            <button
   826	              type="button"
   827	              onClick={handleBack}
   828	              className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 rounded-xl border border-white/[0.06] bg-white/[0.03] px-4 py-3 text-[12px] font-semibold text-white/60 transition-colors hover:bg-white/[0.06] hover:text-white"
   829	            >
   830	              <ArrowLeft size={14} />
   831	              Retour
   832	            </button>
   833	
   834	            {step !== 4 ? (
   835	              <button
   836	                type="button"
   837	                onClick={handleNext}
   838	                className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 rounded-xl bg-[#1f8a65] px-4 py-3 text-[12px] font-semibold text-white transition-colors hover:bg-[#197155]"
   839	              >
   840	                {step === 3 ? 'Calculer mon plan' : 'Continuer'}
   841	                <ArrowRight size={14} />
   842	              </button>
   843	            ) : (
   844	              <button
   845	                type="button"
   846	                onClick={() => setStep(3)}
   847	                className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 rounded-xl bg-white/[0.04] px-4 py-3 text-[12px] font-semibold text-white/70 transition-colors hover:bg-white/[0.08] hover:text-white"
   848	              >
   849	                Modifier les données
   850	              </button>
   851	            )}
   852	          </div>
   853	        </section>
   854	
   855	        {step !== 4 && (
   856	          <div className="mt-5 rounded-2xl border border-white/[0.06] bg-white/[0.03] p-4 text-[12px] text-white/45">
   857	            Le calcul reste exploitable avec un profil partiel. Les champs expert augmentent la précision mais ne bloquent pas la sortie.
   858	          </div>
   859	        )}
   860	      </div>
   861	    </main>
   862	  );
   863	}

FILE: components/nutrition/studio/NutritionAnalysisPanel.tsx

     1	"use client";
     2	
     3	import {
     4	  CartesianGrid,
     5	  Line,
     6	  LineChart,
     7	  ResponsiveContainer,
     8	  Tooltip,
     9	  XAxis,
    10	  YAxis,
    11	} from "recharts";
    12	import { NUTRITION_UI_COLORS } from "@/lib/nutrition/ui-colors";
    13	import NutritionEnergyAnalytics from "@/components/clients/nutrition-hub/NutritionEnergyAnalytics";
    14	import NutritionRealityMiniDay from "./NutritionRealityMiniDay";
    15	import type { NutritionRealityView } from "./useNutritionReality";
    16	
    17	type NutritionAnalysisPanelProps = {
    18	  loading: boolean;
    19	  error: string | null;
    20	  activeWindow: 3 | 7;
    21	  onWindowChange: (window: 3 | 7) => void;
    22	  onOpenHub: () => void;
    23	  view: NutritionRealityView | null;
    24	};
    25	
    26	function formatPercent(value: number | null) {
    27	  return value == null ? "N/A" : `${Math.round(value * 100)}%`;
    28	}
    29	
    30	function getMetricTone(value: number | null) {
    31	  if (value == null) return "text-white";
    32	  if (value > 1.05) return "text-[#ff8660]";
    33	  if (value < 0.9) return "text-[#ffd15e]";
    34	  return "text-[#8ef0c7]";
    35	}
    36	
    37	function MetricCard({
    38	  label,
    39	  value,
    40	  accent,
    41	}: {
    42	  label: string;
    43	  value: number | null;
    44	  accent: string;
    45	}) {
    46	  return (
    47	    <div className="rounded-xl border border-white/[0.06] bg-white/[0.03] p-3">
    48	      <p className="text-[10px] uppercase tracking-[0.14em]" style={{ color: accent }}>
    49	        {label}
    50	      </p>
    51	      <p className={`mt-2 text-[22px] font-semibold ${getMetricTone(value)}`}>
    52	        {formatPercent(value)}
    53	      </p>
    54	    </div>
    55	  );
    56	}
    57	
    58	type TrendPoint = NutritionRealityView["trendPoints"][number];
    59	
    60	function formatShortDate(value: string) {
    61	  return new Date(value).toLocaleDateString("fr-FR", {
    62	    day: "numeric",
    63	    month: "short",
    64	  });
    65	}
    66	
    67	function MiniTooltip({
    68	  active,
    69	  payload,
    70	  label,
    71	  unit,
    72	  targetLabel,
    73	  consumedLabel,
    74	  accent,
    75	}: {
    76	  active?: boolean;
    77	  payload?: Array<{ dataKey?: string; value?: number; payload?: any }>;
    78	  label?: string;
    79	  unit: string;
    80	  targetLabel: string;
    81	  consumedLabel: string;
    82	  accent: string;
    83	}) {
    84	  if (!active || !payload?.length) return null;
    85	
    86	  const consumed = payload.find((entry) => entry.dataKey === "consumed");
    87	  const target = payload.find((entry) => entry.dataKey === "target");
    88	
    89	  return (
    90	    <div className="min-w-[180px] rounded-2xl border border-white/[0.08] bg-[#121212]/96 p-3 shadow-[0_18px_40px_rgba(0,0,0,0.45)]">
    91	      <p className="text-[11px] font-semibold text-white/85">{label}</p>
    92	      <div className="mt-3 space-y-2 text-[11px]">
    93	        <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-3">
    94	          <span className="text-white/55">{consumedLabel}</span>
    95	          <span className="font-medium text-white">
    96	            {Math.round(consumed?.value ?? 0)}
    97	            {unit}
    98	          </span>
    99	        </div>
   100	        <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-3">
   101	          <span className="text-white/55">{targetLabel}</span>
   102	          <span className="font-medium" style={{ color: accent }}>
   103	            {Math.round(target?.value ?? 0)}
   104	            {unit}
   105	          </span>
   106	        </div>
   107	      </div>
   108	    </div>
   109	  );
   110	}
   111	
   112	function buildTrendRows(points: TrendPoint[], metric: keyof TrendPoint["consumed"]) {
   113	  return points.map((point) => ({
   114	    date: formatShortDate(point.date),
   115	    rawDate: point.date,
   116	    consumed: point.consumed[metric] ?? 0,
   117	    target: point.target[metric] ?? 0,
   118	  }));
   119	}
   120	
   121	function TrendMiniCard({
   122	  label,
   123	  accent,
   124	  unit,
   125	  targetLabel,
   126	  consumedLabel,
   127	  points,
   128	  metric,
   129	  tall = false,
   130	}: {
   131	  label: string;
   132	  accent: string;
   133	  unit: string;
   134	  targetLabel: string;
   135	  consumedLabel: string;
   136	  points: TrendPoint[];
   137	  metric: keyof TrendPoint["consumed"];
   138	  tall?: boolean;
   139	}) {
   140	  const data = buildTrendRows(points, metric);
   141	
   142	  return (
   143	    <div className="rounded-xl border border-white/[0.06] bg-white/[0.03] p-3">
   144	      <p className="text-[10px] uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-white/35">
   145	        Consommé vs réel
   146	      </p>
   147	      <p className="mt-1 text-[18px] font-semibold text-white">{label}</p>
   148	      <div className={tall ? "mt-3 h-44" : "mt-3 h-28"}>
   149	        <ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height="100%">
   150	          <LineChart data={data}>
   151	            <CartesianGrid stroke="#ffffff10" vertical={false} />
   152	            <XAxis
   153	              dataKey="date"
   154	              stroke="#ffffff45"
   155	              tickLine={false}
   156	              axisLine={false}
   157	              tick={{ fontSize: 10 }}
   158	            />
   159	            <YAxis
   160	              stroke="#ffffff45"
   161	              tickLine={false}
   162	              axisLine={false}
   163	              tick={{ fontSize: 10 }}
   164	              width={34}
   165	            />
   166	            <Tooltip
   167	              content={
   168	                <MiniTooltip
   169	                  unit={unit}
   170	                  targetLabel={targetLabel}
   171	                  consumedLabel={consumedLabel}
   172	                  accent={accent}
   173	                />
   174	              }
   175	            />
   176	            <Line
   177	              type="monotone"
   178	              dataKey="consumed"
   179	              stroke={accent}
   180	              strokeWidth={2.4}
   181	              dot={false}
   182	            />
   183	            <Line
   184	              type="monotone"
   185	              dataKey="target"
   186	              stroke="#d9f3e5"
   187	              strokeWidth={1.8}
   188	              dot={false}
   189	            />
   190	          </LineChart>
   191	        </ResponsiveContainer>
   192	      </div>
   193	    </div>
   194	  );
   195	}

   383	          <p className="text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-white/35">
   384	            Signaux clés
   385	          </p>
   386	          <div className="mt-4 space-y-2">
   387	            {view.topInsights.length > 0 ? (
   388	              view.topInsights.map((insight) => (
   389	                <div key={insight.id} className="rounded-xl bg-white/[0.03] px-3 py-2.5">
   390	                  <p className="text-[11px] font-semibold text-white">{insight.title}</p>
   391	                  <p className="mt-1 text-[10px] text-white/50">{insight.message}</p>
   392	                </div>
   393	              ))
   394	            ) : (
   395	              <div className="rounded-xl border border-dashed border-white/[0.08] bg-white/[0.03] px-3 py-3">
   396	                <p className="text-[11px] font-semibold text-white">
   397	                  Aucun signal prioritaire sur la fenêtre active.
   398	                </p>
   399	                <p className="mt-1 text-[10px] leading-relaxed text-white/50">
   400	                  Les données observées ne montrent pas d’alerte nutritionnelle majeure à
   401	                  ce stade.
   402	                </p>
   403	              </div>
   404	            )}
   405	          </div>
   406	        </section>
   407	
   408	        <section className="rounded-2xl border border-white/[0.06] bg-white/[0.03] p-4">
   409	          <p className="text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-white/35">
   410	            Consommé vs réel
   411	          </p>
   412	          <div className="mt-4 grid grid-cols-2 gap-3">
   413	            <TrendMiniCard
   414	              label="Calories"
   415	              accent={NUTRITION_UI_COLORS.calories}
   416	              unit=" kcal"
   417	              targetLabel="Cible"
   418	              consumedLabel="Consommé"
   419	              points={view.trendPoints}
   420	              metric="calories"
   421	            />
   422	            <TrendMiniCard
   423	              label="Protéines"
   424	              accent={NUTRITION_UI_COLORS.protein}
   425	              unit=" g"
   426	              targetLabel="Cible"
   427	              consumedLabel="Consommé"
   428	              points={view.trendPoints}
   429	              metric="protein_g"
   430	            />
   431	            <TrendMiniCard
   432	              label="Glucides"
   433	              accent={NUTRITION_UI_COLORS.carbs}
   434	              unit=" g"
   435	              targetLabel="Cible"
   436	              consumedLabel="Consommé"
   437	              points={view.trendPoints}
   438	              metric="carbs_g"
   439	            />
   440	            <TrendMiniCard

   466	            Dernières journées observées

   471	            ))}
   472	          </div>
   473	        </section>
   474	      </div>
