FILE: components/nutrition/studio/ParameterAdjustmentPanel.tsx
------------------------------------------------------------
     1	"use client";
     2	
     3	import { motion, AnimatePresence } from "framer-motion";
     4	import { ChevronLeft, X, Calculator, Check, AlertTriangle } from "lucide-react";
     5	import { useState, useRef, useEffect } from "react";
     6	import type { NutritionClientData } from "@/lib/nutrition/types";
     7	import type { TrainingConfig, LifestyleConfig } from "./useNutritionStudio";
     8	import type { BMRSource } from "@/lib/nutrition/calculators";
     9	import {
    10	  calculateBMRKatchMcArdle,
    11	  calculateBMRMifflin,
    12	  calculateLBMFromBF,
    13	  describeBMRFormula,
    14	} from "@/lib/nutrition/calculators";
    15	
    16	interface BiometricsConfig {
    17	  weight_kg: number | null;
    18	  height_cm: number | null;
    19	  body_fat_pct: number | null;
    20	  lean_mass_kg: number | null;
    21	  muscle_mass_kg: number | null;
    22	  visceral_fat_level: number | null;
    23	  bmr_kcal_measured: number | null;
    24	  bmr_source: BMRSource;
    25	}
    26	
    27	interface Props {
    28	  isOpen: boolean;
    29	  onClose: () => void;
    30	  clientData: NutritionClientData | null;
    31	  onUpdateTraining: (field: string, value: string) => void;
    32	  onUpdateLifestyle: (field: string, value: string) => void;
    33	  onUpdateBiometrics: (field: string, value: string | BMRSource) => void;
    34	  trainingConfig: TrainingConfig;
    35	  lifestyleConfig: LifestyleConfig;
    36	  biometricsConfig: BiometricsConfig;
    37	}
    38	
    39	function NumberInput({
    40	  label,
    41	  value,
    42	  onChange,
    43	  unit,
    44	  onBlur,
    45	}: {
    46	  label: string;
    47	  value: string | number | null;
    48	  onChange: (v: string) => void;
    49	  unit?: string;
    50	  onBlur?: () => void;
    51	}) {
    52	  return (
    53	    <div className="flex items-center justify-between py-2 border-b border-white/[0.03]">
    54	      <span className="text-[10px] font-semibold text-white/50">{label}</span>
    55	      <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
    56	        <input
    57	          type="number"
    58	          value={value ?? ""}
    59	          onChange={(e) => onChange(e.target.value)}
    60	          onBlur={onBlur}
    61	          placeholder="—"
    62	          className="w-20 rounded-lg bg-white/[0.04] border-[0.3px] border-white/[0.06] px-2 py-1 text-[11px] text-white text-right outline-none placeholder:text-white/20 focus:border-[#1f8a65]/40"
    63	        />
    64	        {unit && <span className="text-[9px] text-white/35 w-6">{unit}</span>}
    65	      </div>
    66	    </div>
    67	  );
    68	}
    69	
    70	function SectionLabel({ children }: { children: React.ReactNode }) {
    71	  return (
    72	    <p className="text-[9px] font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.16em] text-white/35 mt-4 mb-2">
    73	      {children}
    74	    </p>
    75	  );
    76	}
    77	
    78	function SourceBadge({ source }: { source: BMRSource }) {
    79	  const colors = {
    80	    measured: "bg-green-500/20 text-green-400",
    81	    estimated: "bg-gray-500/20 text-gray-400",
    82	    calculated: "bg-blue-500/20 text-blue-400",
    83	  };
    84	  const labels = {
    85	    measured: "Mesurée",
    86	    estimated: "Estimée",
    87	    calculated: "Calculée",
    88	  };
    89	  return (
    90	    <span
    91	      className={`inline-block px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded-md text-[8px] font-semibold ${colors[source]}`}
    92	    >
    93	      {labels[source]}
    94	    </span>
    95	  );
    96	}
    97	
    98	export default function ParameterAdjustmentPanel({
    99	  isOpen,
   100	  onClose,
   101	  clientData,
   102	  onUpdateTraining,
   103	  onUpdateLifestyle,
   104	  onUpdateBiometrics,
   105	  trainingConfig,
   106	  lifestyleConfig,
   107	  biometricsConfig,
   108	}: Props) {
   109	  const [showBMRCalculator, setShowBMRCalculator] = useState(false);
   110	  const [bmrFormula, setBMRFormula] = useState<
   111	    "katch-mcardle" | "mifflin-st-jeor"
   112	  >("katch-mcardle");
   113	  const [bmrResult, setBMRResult] = useState<number | null>(null);
   114	  const [saved, setSaved] = useState(false);
   115	  const [heightInput, setHeightInput] = useState<string>(
   116	    biometricsConfig.height_cm?.toString() ?? ""
   117	  );
   118	  const saveTimeoutRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout> | null>(null);
   119	
   120	  // Auto-save debounce 500ms
   121	  const triggerAutoSave = () => {
   122	    setSaved(false);
   123	    if (saveTimeoutRef.current) clearTimeout(saveTimeoutRef.current);
   124	    saveTimeoutRef.current = setTimeout(() => {
   125	      setSaved(true);
   126	      setTimeout(() => setSaved(false), 2000);
   127	    }, 500);
   128	  };
   129	
   130	  // Cleanup timeout on unmount
   131	  useEffect(() => {
   132	    return () => {
   133	      if (saveTimeoutRef.current) clearTimeout(saveTimeoutRef.current);
   134	    };
   135	  }, []);
   136	
   137	  // Update height input when biometricsConfig changes
   138	  useEffect(() => {
   139	    setHeightInput(biometricsConfig.height_cm?.toString() ?? "");
   140	  }, [biometricsConfig.height_cm]);
   141	
   142	  const handleCalculateBMR = () => {
   143	    let result: number | null = null;
   144	
   145	    if (
   146	      bmrFormula === "katch-mcardle" &&
   147	      biometricsConfig.weight_kg &&
   148	      biometricsConfig.body_fat_pct !== null
   149	    ) {
   150	      result = calculateBMRKatchMcArdle(
   151	        biometricsConfig.weight_kg,
   152	        biometricsConfig.body_fat_pct,
   153	      );
   154	    } else if (
   155	      bmrFormula === "mifflin-st-jeor" &&
   156	      biometricsConfig.weight_kg &&
   157	      biometricsConfig.height_cm &&
   158	      clientData?.age
   159	    ) {
   160	      result = calculateBMRMifflin(
   161	        biometricsConfig.weight_kg,
   162	        biometricsConfig.height_cm,
   163	        clientData.age,
   164	        clientData.gender === "female"
   165	          ? "F"
   166	          : clientData.gender === "male"
   167	            ? "M"
   168	            : null,
   169	      );
   170	    }
   171	
   172	    if (result) {
   173	      setBMRResult(result);
   174	    }
   175	  };
   176	
   177	  const handleApplyBMR = () => {
   178	    if (bmrResult) {
   179	      onUpdateBiometrics("bmr_kcal_measured", bmrResult.toString());
   180	      onUpdateBiometrics("bmr_source", "calculated");
   181	      setShowBMRCalculator(false);
   182	      setBMRResult(null);
   183	    }
   184	  };
   185	
   186	  return (
   187	    <AnimatePresence>
   188	      {isOpen && (
   189	        <>
   190	          {/* Backdrop */}
   191	          <motion.div
   192	            initial={{ opacity: 0 }}
   193	            animate={{ opacity: 1 }}
   194	            exit={{ opacity: 0 }}
   195	            onClick={onClose}
   196	            className="fixed inset-0 bg-black/50 z-40"
   197	          />
   198	
   199	          {/* Panel */}
   200	          <motion.div
   201	            initial={{ x: 400, opacity: 0 }}
   202	            animate={{ x: 0, opacity: 1 }}
   203	            exit={{ x: 400, opacity: 0 }}
   204	            transition={{ type: "spring", stiffness: 300, damping: 30 }}
   205	            className="fixed right-0 top-0 bottom-0 w-[400px] bg-[#181818] z-50 flex flex-col border-l border-white/[0.06]"
   206	          >
   207	            {/* Header */}
   208	            <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-4 border-b border-white/[0.06]">
   209	              <h3 className="text-[13px] font-semibold text-white">
   210	                Ajuster les paramètres
   211	              </h3>
   212	              <button
   213	                onClick={onClose}
   214	                className="text-white/40 hover:text-white/70 transition-colors"
   215	              >
   216	                <X size={16} />
   217	              </button>
   218	            </div>
   219	
   220	            {/* Scrollable content */}
   221	            <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto scrollbar-hide p-4 space-y-0">
   222	              {/* Height quick-add if missing */}
   223	              {!biometricsConfig.height_cm && (
   224	                <div className="bg-amber-500/15 border-[0.3px] border-amber-500/30 rounded-lg p-3 mb-4">
   225	                  <div className="flex items-start gap-2">
   226	                    <AlertTriangle size={14} className="text-amber-400 mt-0.5 shrink-0" />
   227	                    <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
   228	                      <p className="text-[11px] font-semibold text-amber-300 mb-2">
   229	                        Taille manquante
   230	                      </p>
   231	                      <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
   232	                        <input
   233	                          type="number"
   234	                          value={heightInput}
   235	                          onChange={(e) => setHeightInput(e.target.value)}
   236	                          placeholder="170"
   237	                          className="flex-1 rounded-lg bg-white/[0.04] border-[0.3px] border-amber-500/40 px-2 py-1 text-[10px] text-white outline-none placeholder:text-white/20 focus:border-amber-500/60"
   238	                        />
   239	                        <span className="text-[9px] text-white/35">cm</span>
   240	                        <button
   241	                          onClick={() => {
   242	                            if (heightInput) {
   243	                              onUpdateBiometrics("height_cm", heightInput);
   244	                              triggerAutoSave();
   245	                            }
   246	                          }}
   247	                          className="rounded-lg bg-amber-500/30 border-[0.3px] border-amber-500/50 px-2 py-1 text-[9px] font-medium text-amber-300 hover:bg-amber-500/40 transition-all"
   248	                        >
   249	                          ✓
   250	                        </button>
   251	                      </div>
   252	                    </div>
   253	                  </div>
   254	                </div>
   255	              )}
   256	
   257	              {/* Training Section */}
   258	              <SectionLabel>Entraînement</SectionLabel>
   259	              <NumberInput
   260	                label="Fréquence hebdomadaire"
   261	                value={trainingConfig.weeklyFrequency ?? ""}
   262	                onChange={(v) => {
   263	                  onUpdateTraining("weekly_frequency", v);
   264	                  triggerAutoSave();
   265	                }}
   266	                onBlur={triggerAutoSave}
   267	                unit="jours"
   268	              />
   269	              <NumberInput
   270	                label="Durée séance"
   271	                value={trainingConfig.sessionDurationMin ?? ""}
   272	                onChange={(v) => {
   273	                  onUpdateTraining("session_duration_min", v);
   274	                  triggerAutoSave();
   275	                }}
   276	                onBlur={triggerAutoSave}
   277	                unit="min"
   278	              />
   279	              <NumberInput
   280	                label="Calories entraînement"
   281	                value={trainingConfig.trainingCaloriesWeekly ?? ""}
   282	                onChange={(v) => {
   283	                  onUpdateTraining("training_calories_weekly", v);
   284	                  triggerAutoSave();
   285	                }}
   286	                onBlur={triggerAutoSave}
   287	                unit="kcal"
   288	              />
   289	              <NumberInput
   290	                label="Fréquence cardio"
   291	                value={trainingConfig.cardioFrequency ?? ""}
   292	                onChange={(v) => {
   293	                  onUpdateTraining("cardio_frequency", v);
   294	                  triggerAutoSave();
   295	                }}
   296	                onBlur={triggerAutoSave}
   297	                unit="séances"
   298	              />
   299	              <NumberInput
   300	                label="Durée cardio"
   301	                value={trainingConfig.cardioDurationMin ?? ""}
   302	                onChange={(v) => {
   303	                  onUpdateTraining("cardio_duration_min", v);
   304	                  triggerAutoSave();
   305	                }}
   306	                onBlur={triggerAutoSave}
   307	                unit="min"
   308	              />
   309	              <NumberInput
   310	                label="Étapes quotidiennes"
   311	                value={trainingConfig.dailySteps ?? ""}
   312	                onChange={(v) => {
   313	                  onUpdateTraining("daily_steps", v);
   314	                  triggerAutoSave();
   315	                }}
   316	                onBlur={triggerAutoSave}
   317	                unit="pas"
   318	              />
   319	
   320	              {/* Lifestyle Section */}
   321	              <SectionLabel>Hygiène de vie</SectionLabel>
   322	              <NumberInput
   323	                label="Heures sommeil"
   324	                value={lifestyleConfig.sleepDurationH ?? ""}
   325	                onChange={(v) => {
   326	                  onUpdateLifestyle("sleep_duration_h", v);
   327	                  triggerAutoSave();
   328	                }}
   329	                onBlur={triggerAutoSave}
   330	                unit="h"
   331	              />
   332	              <NumberInput
   333	                label="Qualité sommeil"
   334	                value={lifestyleConfig.sleepQuality ?? ""}
   335	                onChange={(v) => {
   336	                  onUpdateLifestyle("sleep_quality", v);
   337	                  triggerAutoSave();
   338	                }}
   339	                onBlur={triggerAutoSave}
   340	                unit="/ 10"
   341	              />
   342	              <NumberInput
   343	                label="Niveau de stress"
   344	                value={lifestyleConfig.stressLevel ?? ""}
   345	                onChange={(v) => {
   346	                  onUpdateLifestyle("stress_level", v);
   347	                  triggerAutoSave();
   348	                }}
   349	                onBlur={triggerAutoSave}
   350	                unit="/ 10"
   351	              />
   352	              <NumberInput
   353	                label="Heures travail"
   354	                value={lifestyleConfig.workHoursPerWeek ?? ""}
   355	                onChange={(v) => {
   356	                  onUpdateLifestyle("work_hours_per_week", v);
   357	                  triggerAutoSave();
   358	                }}
   359	                onBlur={triggerAutoSave}
   360	                unit="h"
   361	              />
   362	              <NumberInput
   363	                label="Caféine quotidienne"
   364	                value={lifestyleConfig.caffeineDailyMg ?? ""}
   365	                onChange={(v) => {
   366	                  onUpdateLifestyle("caffeine_daily_mg", v);
   367	                  triggerAutoSave();
   368	                }}
   369	                onBlur={triggerAutoSave}
   370	                unit="mg"
   371	              />
   372	              <NumberInput
   373	                label="Alcool hebdomadaire"
   374	                value={lifestyleConfig.alcoholWeekly ?? ""}
   375	                onChange={(v) => {
   376	                  onUpdateLifestyle("alcohol_weekly", v);
   377	                  triggerAutoSave();
   378	                }}
   379	                onBlur={triggerAutoSave}
   380	                unit="verre"
   381	              />
   382	
   383	              {/* Biometrics Section */}
   384	              <SectionLabel>Composition corporelle</SectionLabel>
   385	              <NumberInput
   386	                label="Poids"
   387	                value={biometricsConfig.weight_kg ?? ""}
   388	                onChange={(v) => {
   389	                  onUpdateBiometrics("weight_kg", v);
   390	                  triggerAutoSave();
   391	                }}
   392	                onBlur={triggerAutoSave}
   393	                unit="kg"
   394	              />
   395	              <NumberInput
   396	                label="Taille"
   397	                value={biometricsConfig.height_cm ?? ""}
   398	                onChange={(v) => {
   399	                  onUpdateBiometrics("height_cm", v);
   400	                  triggerAutoSave();
   401	                }}
   402	                onBlur={triggerAutoSave}
   403	                unit="cm"
   404	              />
   405	              <NumberInput
   406	                label="Graisse corporelle"
   407	                value={biometricsConfig.body_fat_pct ?? ""}
   408	                onChange={(v) => {
   409	                  onUpdateBiometrics("body_fat_pct", v);
   410	                  triggerAutoSave();
   411	                }}
   412	                onBlur={triggerAutoSave}
   413	                unit="%"
   414	              />
   415	              <NumberInput
   416	                label="Masse maigre"
   417	                value={biometricsConfig.lean_mass_kg ?? ""}
   418	                onChange={(v) => {
   419	                  onUpdateBiometrics("lean_mass_kg", v);
   420	                  triggerAutoSave();
   421	                }}
   422	                onBlur={triggerAutoSave}
   423	                unit="kg"
   424	              />
   425	              <NumberInput
   426	                label="Masse musculaire"
   427	                value={biometricsConfig.muscle_mass_kg ?? ""}
   428	                onChange={(v) => {
   429	                  onUpdateBiometrics("muscle_mass_kg", v);
   430	                  triggerAutoSave();
   431	                }}
   432	                onBlur={triggerAutoSave}
   433	                unit="kg"
   434	              />
   435	              <NumberInput
   436	                label="Graisse viscérale"
   437	                value={biometricsConfig.visceral_fat_level ?? ""}
   438	                onChange={(v) => {
   439	                  onUpdateBiometrics("visceral_fat_level", v);
   440	                  triggerAutoSave();
   441	                }}
   442	                onBlur={triggerAutoSave}
   443	                unit="level"
   444	              />
   445	
   446	              {/* Metabolism Section */}
   447	              <SectionLabel>Métabolisme</SectionLabel>
   448	              <div className="flex items-center justify-between py-2 border-b border-white/[0.03]">
   449	                <div className="flex flex-col gap-1">
   450	                  <span className="text-[10px] font-semibold text-white/50">
   451	                    BMR
   452	                  </span>
   453	                  <SourceBadge source={biometricsConfig.bmr_source} />
   454	                </div>
   455	                <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
   456	                  <input
   457	                    type="number"
   458	                    value={biometricsConfig.bmr_kcal_measured ?? ""}
   459	                    onChange={(e) => {
   460	                      onUpdateBiometrics("bmr_kcal_measured", e.target.value);
   461	                      triggerAutoSave();
   462	                    }}
   463	                    onBlur={triggerAutoSave}
   464	                    placeholder="—"
   465	                    className="w-20 rounded-lg bg-white/[0.04] border-[0.3px] border-white/[0.06] px-2 py-1 text-[11px] text-white text-right outline-none placeholder:text-white/20 focus:border-[#1f8a65]/40"
   466	                  />
   467	                  <span className="text-[9px] text-white/35 w-6">kcal</span>
   468	                </div>
   469	              </div>
   470	
   471	              {/* Calculate Button */}
   472	              <button
   473	                onClick={() => setShowBMRCalculator(true)}
   474	                className="mt-3 w-full flex items-center justify-center gap-2 py-2 px-3 rounded-lg bg-blue-500/20 border-[0.3px] border-blue-500/40 text-[11px] font-medium text-blue-300 hover:bg-blue-500/30 transition-all"
   475	              >
   476	                <Calculator size={14} />
   477	                Calculer le BMR
   478	              </button>
   479	            </div>
   480	
   481	            {/* Footer */}
   482	            <div className="border-t border-white/[0.06] p-4 flex gap-2">
   483	              <button
   484	                onClick={onClose}
   485	                className="flex-1 flex items-center justify-center gap-2 py-2.5 rounded-xl bg-white/[0.04] border-[0.3px] border-white/[0.06] text-[11px] font-medium text-white/60 hover:text-white/80 transition-all"
   486	              >
   487	                <X size={12} />
   488	                Fermer
   489	              </button>
   490	              <button
   491	                onClick={onClose}
   492	                className={`flex-1 flex items-center justify-center gap-2 py-2.5 rounded-xl text-[11px] font-medium transition-all ${
   493	                  saved
   494	                    ? "bg-green-500/20 border-[0.3px] border-green-500/40 text-green-300"
   495	                    : "bg-[#1f8a65] border-[0.3px] border-[#1f8a65] text-white hover:bg-[#217356]"
   496	                }`}
   497	              >
   498	                {saved ? (
   499	                  <>
   500	                    <Check size={12} />
   501	                    Enregistré
   502	                  </>
   503	                ) : (
   504	                  <>
   505	                    <ChevronLeft size={12} />
   506	                    Fait, retour
   507	                  </>
   508	                )}
   509	              </button>
   510	            </div>
   511	          </motion.div>
   512	
   513	          {/* BMR Calculator Modal */}
   514	          {showBMRCalculator && (
   515	            <motion.div
   516	              initial={{ opacity: 0, scale: 0.95 }}
   517	              animate={{ opacity: 1, scale: 1 }}
   518	              exit={{ opacity: 0, scale: 0.95 }}
   519	              className="fixed inset-0 z-[60] flex items-center justify-center p-4"
   520	              onClick={() => setShowBMRCalculator(false)}
   521	            >
   522	              <div
   523	                className="bg-[#181818] rounded-2xl p-6 max-w-sm w-full border-[0.3px] border-white/[0.06]"
   524	                onClick={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}
   525	              >
   526	                <h4 className="text-[13px] font-semibold text-white mb-4">
   527	                  Calculer le BMR
   528	                </h4>
   529	
   530	                {/* Formula selection */}
   531	                <div className="space-y-2 mb-4">
   532	                  <label className="text-[10px] font-semibold text-white/50 uppercase">
   533	                    Formule
   534	                  </label>
   535	                  <div className="flex gap-2">
   536	                    {(["katch-mcardle", "mifflin-st-jeor"] as const).map(
   537	                      (formula) => (
   538	                        <button
   539	                          key={formula}
   540	                          onClick={() => setBMRFormula(formula)}
   541	                          className={`flex-1 py-1.5 px-2 rounded-lg text-[10px] font-medium transition-all ${
   542	                            bmrFormula === formula
   543	                              ? "bg-blue-500/30 border-[0.3px] border-blue-500/60 text-blue-300"
   544	                              : "bg-white/[0.04] border-[0.3px] border-white/[0.06] text-white/60 hover:text-white/80"
   545	                          }`}
   546	                        >
   547	                          {formula === "katch-mcardle"
   548	                            ? "Katch-McArdle"
   549	                            : "Mifflin-St Jeor"}
   550	                        </button>
   551	                      ),
   552	                    )}
   553	                  </div>
   554	                  <p className="text-[9px] text-white/40 mt-1">
   555	                    {describeBMRFormula(bmrFormula)}
   556	                  </p>
   557	                </div>
   558	
   559	                {/* Result display */}
   560	                {bmrResult && (
   561	                  <div className="bg-white/[0.04] rounded-lg p-3 mb-4 border-[0.3px] border-white/[0.06]">
   562	                    <p className="text-[10px] text-white/50 mb-1">
   563	                      Résultat estimé
   564	                    </p>
   565	                    <p className="text-[18px] font-bold text-green-400">
   566	                      {bmrResult} kcal
   567	                    </p>
   568	                  </div>
   569	                )}
   570	
   571	                {/* Buttons */}
   572	                <div className="flex gap-2">
   573	                  <button
   574	                    onClick={() => {
   575	                      handleCalculateBMR();
   576	                    }}
   577	                    className="flex-1 py-2 px-3 rounded-lg bg-blue-500/20 border-[0.3px] border-blue-500/40 text-[11px] font-medium text-blue-300 hover:bg-blue-500/30 transition-all"
   578	                  >
   579	                    Calculer
   580	                  </button>
   581	                  <button
   582	                    onClick={handleApplyBMR}
   583	                    disabled={!bmrResult}
   584	                    className="flex-1 py-2 px-3 rounded-lg bg-green-500/20 border-[0.3px] border-green-500/40 text-[11px] font-medium text-green-300 hover:bg-green-500/30 disabled:opacity-50 transition-all"
   585	                  >
   586	                    Appliquer
   587	                  </button>
   588	                  <button
   589	                    onClick={() => {
   590	                      setShowBMRCalculator(false);
   591	                      setBMRResult(null);
   592	                    }}
   593	                    className="flex-1 py-2 px-3 rounded-lg bg-white/[0.04] border-[0.3px] border-white/[0.06] text-[11px] font-medium text-white/60 hover:text-white/80 transition-all"
   594	                  >
   595	                    Fermer
   596	                  </button>
   597	                </div>
   598	              </div>
   599	            </motion.div>
   600	          )}
   601	        </>
   602	      )}
   603	    </AnimatePresence>
   604	  );
   605	}

FILE: lib/client/nutrition/drinks.ts
------------------------------------------------------------
     1	export type DrinkType = "water" | "espresso" | "coffee" | "lungo" | "tea"
     2	export type DrinkLogKind = "all" | "water" | "caffeine"
     3	
     4	export type DrinkPreset = {
     5	  drinkType: DrinkType
     6	  label: string
     7	  shortLabel: string
     8	  baseAmountMl: number
     9	  baseCaffeineMg: number
    10	  accent: string
    11	  cupCount: 1 | 2 | 3
    12	  strengthLabel: string
    13	}
    14	
    15	export const DRINK_PRESETS: Record<DrinkType, DrinkPreset> = {
    16	  water: {
    17	    drinkType: "water",
    18	    label: "Eau",
    19	    shortLabel: "Eau",
    20	    baseAmountMl: 250,
    21	    baseCaffeineMg: 0,
    22	    accent: "#60a5fa",
    23	    cupCount: 1,
    24	    strengthLabel: "hydratation",
    25	  },
    26	  espresso: {
    27	    drinkType: "espresso",
    28	    label: "Espresso",
    29	    shortLabel: "Espresso",
    30	    baseAmountMl: 40,
    31	    baseCaffeineMg: 80,
    32	    accent: "#c08457",
    33	    cupCount: 1,
    34	    strengthLabel: "concentré",
    35	  },
    36	  coffee: {
    37	    drinkType: "coffee",
    38	    label: "Café",
    39	    shortLabel: "Café",
    40	    baseAmountMl: 180,
    41	    baseCaffeineMg: 95,
    42	    accent: "#c08457",
    43	    cupCount: 2,
    44	    strengthLabel: "classique",
    45	  },
    46	  lungo: {
    47	    drinkType: "lungo",
    48	    label: "Lungo",
    49	    shortLabel: "Lungo",
    50	    baseAmountMl: 120,
    51	    baseCaffeineMg: 110,
    52	    accent: "#c08457",
    53	    cupCount: 3,
    54	    strengthLabel: "allongé",
    55	  },
    56	  tea: {
    57	    drinkType: "tea",
    58	    label: "Thé",
    59	    shortLabel: "Thé",
    60	    baseAmountMl: 250,
    61	    baseCaffeineMg: 35,
    62	    accent: "#34d399",
    63	    cupCount: 1,
    64	    strengthLabel: "infusé",
    65	  },
    66	}
    67	
    68	const CAFFEINATED_TYPES: Exclude<DrinkType, "water">[] = ["espresso", "coffee", "lungo", "tea"]
    69	
    70	export function isCaffeinatedDrinkType(type: DrinkType): type is Exclude<DrinkType, "water"> {
    71	  return CAFFEINATED_TYPES.includes(type as Exclude<DrinkType, "water">)
    72	}
    73	
    74	export function getDrinkPreset(drinkType: DrinkType): DrinkPreset {
    75	  return DRINK_PRESETS[drinkType]
    76	}
    77	
    78	export function estimateCaffeineMg(drinkType: DrinkType, amountMl: number): number {
    79	  if (drinkType === "water") return 0
    80	  const preset = DRINK_PRESETS[drinkType]
    81	  const safeAmount = Math.max(1, amountMl)
    82	  return Math.max(0, Math.round(preset.baseCaffeineMg * (safeAmount / preset.baseAmountMl)))
    83	}
    84	
    85	export function inferDrinkTypeFromFoodItem(input: { name_fr: string; category_l1: string; category_l2: string | null }): DrinkType {
    86	  const name = input.name_fr.toLowerCase()
    87	  const category = `${input.category_l1 ?? ""} ${input.category_l2 ?? ""}`.toLowerCase()
    88	
    89	  if (input.category_l1 !== "drinks") return "water"
    90	  if (/espresso|expresso/.test(name)) return "espresso"
    91	  if (/lungo/.test(name)) return "lungo"
    92	  if (/(th[eé]|tisane|infusion|rooibos|camomille)/.test(name) || /(th[eé]|tisane|infusion|rooibos|camomille)/.test(category)) return "tea"
    93	  if (/cafe|coffee|cappuccino|latte|macchiato|ristretto/.test(name)) return "coffee"
    94	  if (/chauds?/.test(category)) return "coffee"
    95	  return "water"
    96	}

------------------------------------------------------------
FILE: lib/client/smart/nutritionAlerts.ts
------------------------------------------------------------
     1	export type NutritionAlertCode =
     2	  | 'protein_low'
     3	  | 'carbs_limit'
     4	  | 'hydration_low'
     5	  | 'lunch_missing'
     6	
     7	export type NutritionAlertSeverity = 'info' | 'warning' | 'critical'
     8	
     9	export type NutritionAlert = {
    10	  code: NutritionAlertCode
    11	  severity: NutritionAlertSeverity
    12	  title: string
    13	  body?: string
    14	  delta?: number
    15	}
    16	
    17	export type NutritionConsumed = {
    18	  kcal: number
    19	  protein_g: number
    20	  carbs_g: number
    21	  fat_g: number
    22	  water_ml: number
    23	  caffeine_mg?: number
    24	}
    25	
    26	export type NutritionInput = {
    27	  consumed: NutritionConsumed
    28	  target: NutritionConsumed
    29	  currentHour: number
    30	  hasLunchLog: boolean
    31	}
    32	
    33	export function computeNutritionAlerts(input: NutritionInput): NutritionAlert[] {
    34	  const alerts: NutritionAlert[] = []
    35	  const { consumed, target, currentHour, hasLunchLog } = input
    36	
    37	  // Rule 1: protein_low (warning) — after 14h, behind schedule
    38	  if (currentHour >= 14) {
    39	    const expected = target.protein_g * (currentHour / 22)
    40	    const threshold = expected * 0.8
    41	    if (consumed.protein_g < threshold) {
    42	      const delta = Math.round(target.protein_g - consumed.protein_g)
    43	      alerts.push({
    44	        code: 'protein_low',
    45	        severity: 'warning',
    46	        title: 'PROTÉINES EN RETARD',
    47	        body: `il te reste ${delta}g pour atteindre ${target.protein_g}g`,
    48	        delta,
    49	      })
    50	    }
    51	  }
    52	
    53	  // Rule 2: carbs_limit (critical) — over target
    54	  if (consumed.carbs_g > target.carbs_g) {
    55	    const delta = Math.round(consumed.carbs_g - target.carbs_g)
    56	    alerts.push({
    57	      code: 'carbs_limit',
    58	      severity: 'critical',
    59	      title: 'LIMITE GLUCIDES ATTEINTE',
    60	      body: `-${delta}g sur ta cible`,
    61	      delta,
    62	    })
    63	  }
    64	
    65	  // Rule 3: hydration_low (warning) — after 14h, <50% of target
    66	  if (currentHour >= 14) {
    67	    const ratio = target.water_ml > 0 ? consumed.water_ml / target.water_ml : 1
    68	    if (ratio < 0.5) {
    69	      const deltaMl = target.water_ml - consumed.water_ml
    70	      const deltaL = (deltaMl / 1000).toFixed(1)
    71	      alerts.push({
    72	        code: 'hydration_low',
    73	        severity: 'warning',
    74	        title: 'HYDRATATION FAIBLE',
    75	        body: `il manque ${deltaL}L`,
    76	        delta: deltaMl,
    77	      })
    78	    }
    79	  }
    80	
    81	  // Rule 4: lunch_missing (info) — between 13-14h, no lunch log
    82	  if (currentHour >= 13 && currentHour < 15 && !hasLunchLog) {
    83	    alerts.push({
    84	      code: 'lunch_missing',
    85	      severity: 'info',
    86	      title: 'PAS DE DÉJEUNER LOGUÉ',
    87	    })
    88	  }
    89	
    90	  return alerts
    91	}

------------------------------------------------------------
FILE: lib/client/smart/waterAggregation.ts
------------------------------------------------------------
     1	export type WaterLog = {
     2	  logged_at: string
     3	  amount_ml: number
     4	}
     5	
     6	export type WaterByTimeOfDay = {
     7	  morning: number
     8	  midday: number
     9	  afternoon: number
    10	  evening: number
    11	}
    12	
    13	function getHourInTz(iso: string, tz = 'Europe/Paris'): number {
    14	  const d = new Date(iso)
    15	  const fmt = new Intl.DateTimeFormat('en-US', {
    16	    timeZone: tz,
    17	    hour: 'numeric',
    18	    hour12: false,
    19	  })
    20	  const parts = fmt.formatToParts(d)
    21	  const h = parts.find(p => p.type === 'hour')?.value ?? '0'
    22	  return parseInt(h, 10)
    23	}
    24	
    25	export function groupWaterByTimeOfDay(
    26	  logs: WaterLog[],
    27	  tz: string = 'Europe/Paris'
    28	): WaterByTimeOfDay {
    29	  const out: WaterByTimeOfDay = { morning: 0, midday: 0, afternoon: 0, evening: 0 }
    30	  for (const log of logs) {
    31	    const hour = getHourInTz(log.logged_at, tz)
    32	    if (hour >= 5 && hour < 12) out.morning += log.amount_ml
    33	    else if (hour >= 12 && hour < 15) out.midday += log.amount_ml
    34	    else if (hour >= 15 && hour < 19) out.afternoon += log.amount_ml
    35	    else if (hour >= 19 && hour < 24) out.evening += log.amount_ml
    36	  }
    37	  return out
    38	}

   313	
   314	export function getNutritionSignalGovernance(key: NutritionSignalKey) {
   315	  return NUTRITION_SIGNAL_GOVERNANCE[key];
   316	}
   317	
   318	export function getNutritionSignalWindowDays(
   319	  key: NutritionSignalKey,
   320	  mode: NutritionDataMode,
   321	): number | null {
   322	  const governance = getNutritionSignalGovernance(key);
   323	  return mode === "realtime"
   324	    ? governance.realtime.windowDays
   325	    : governance.bilan.overlayWindowDays;
   326	}
   327	
   328	export function canUseRealtimeSignal(
   329	  key: NutritionSignalKey,
   330	  mode: NutritionDataMode,
   331	): boolean {
   332	  const governance = getNutritionSignalGovernance(key);
   333	  return mode === "realtime"
   334	    ? governance.realtime.enabled
   335	    : governance.bilan.allowAnchoredRealtimeOverlay;
   336	}
   337	
   338	export function getNutritionSignalSourceLabel(
   339	  key: NutritionSignalKey,
   340	  mode: NutritionDataMode,
   341	  dataSource?: "selected" | "fallback" | "manual",
   342	): string {
   343	  if (dataSource === "manual") {
   344	    return "saisie manuelle";
   345	  }
   346	  if (dataSource === "fallback") {
   347	    return mode === "realtime" ? "dernier bilan" : "valeur héritée";
   348	  }
   349	  if (mode === "realtime") {
   350	    if (key === "weight_kg") return "mesure récente";
   351	    if (
   352	      key === "daily_steps" ||
   353	      key === "sleep_duration_h" ||
   354	      key === "sleep_quality" ||
   355	      key === "stress_level" ||
   356	      key === "energy_level"
   357	    ) {
   358	      return "moyenne récente";
   359	    }
   360	    if (key === "bmr_kcal_measured") return "mesure ancienne";
   361	    return canUseRealtimeSignal(key, mode) ? "temps réel" : "base stable";
   362	  }
   363	  return "bilan";
   364	}
   365	
   366	export function getNutritionSignalLabel(key: NutritionSignalKey): string {
   367	  const labels: Record<NutritionSignalKey, string> = {
   368	    weight_kg: "poids",
   369	    height_cm: "taille",
   370	    body_fat_pct: "masse grasse",
   371	    lean_mass_kg: "masse maigre",
   372	    muscle_mass_kg: "masse musculaire",
   373	    visceral_fat_level: "graisse viscérale",
   374	    bmr_kcal_measured: "métabolisme de base",
   375	    weekly_frequency: "fréquence d'entraînement",
   376	    session_duration_min: "durée des séances",
   377	    training_calories_weekly: "calories d'entraînement",
   378	    daily_steps: "nombre de pas",
   379	    cardio_frequency: "fréquence cardio",
   380	    cardio_duration_min: "durée cardio",
   381	    sleep_duration_h: "durée de sommeil",
   382	    sleep_quality: "qualité du sommeil",
   383	    stress_level: "niveau de stress",
   384	    energy_level: "niveau d'énergie",
   385	    caffeine_daily_mg: "caféine",
   386	    alcohol_weekly: "alcool",
   387	    work_hours_per_week: "temps de travail",
   388	    occupation_multiplier: "activité quotidienne",
   389	  };
   390	
   391	  return labels[key];
   392	}

     1	import { computeMacroEnergy } from '@/lib/nutrition/energy'

     3	export type CategoryL1 =
     4	  | "proteins"
     5	  | "carbs"

    71	/** Profil pour scaling portions anatomiques */
    72	export interface PortionScalingProfile {
    73	  hand_length_cm?: number | null
    74	  height_cm?: number | null
    75	}
    76	
    77	export interface PortionSize {
    78	  key: string
    79	  label: string
    80	  baseG: number
    81	  /** 'hand' = scale avec longueur main user, 'fixed' = ustensile/unité produit, taille constante */
    82	  scales: "hand" | "fixed"
    83	  description: string
    84	}
    85	
    86	/**
    87	 * Portions visuelles standard.
    88	 * Référence main adulte: 18cm (longueur poignet → bout majeur).
    89	 * Anatomique (paume/poing/pouce) → scale × (handCm / 18).
    90	 * Fixed (cuillère/verre/œuf) → constant.
    91	 */
    92	export const PORTION_SIZES: PortionSize[] = [
    93	  // Anatomiques (scale hand)
    94	  { key: "palm",            label: "Paume",                baseG: 100, scales: "hand",  description: "Viande, poisson (sans doigts)" },
    95	  { key: "half-palm",       label: "Demi-paume",           baseG: 50,  scales: "hand",  description: "Petits snacks, fromage tranché" },
    96	  { key: "fist",            label: "Poing fermé",          baseG: 150, scales: "hand",  description: "Féculents cuits" },
    97	  { key: "fist-dry",        label: "Poing (féculents secs)", baseG: 50,  scales: "hand",  description: "Riz/pâtes crus, flocons" },
    98	  { key: "thumb",           label: "Pouce entier",         baseG: 15,  scales: "hand",  description: "Lipides denses, fromage" },
    99	  { key: "pinch",           label: "Pince pouce-index",    baseG: 1,   scales: "hand",  description: "Sel, épices" },
   100	  { key: "cupped-hands",    label: "Deux mains en coupe",  baseG: 50,  scales: "hand",  description: "Légumes feuilles" },
   101	  { key: "bowl-hands",      label: "Bol mains jointes",    baseG: 250, scales: "hand",  description: "Céréales, soupes" },
   102	  // Fixed (ustensiles + unités produit)
   103	  { key: "tbsp",            label: "Cuillère à soupe",     baseG: 12,  scales: "fixed", description: "Huiles, sauces" },
   104	  { key: "tbsp-heaped",     label: "Cuillère bombée",      baseG: 18,  scales: "fixed", description: "Beurre noix, compote" },
   105	  { key: "tsp",             label: "Cuillère à café",      baseG: 4,   scales: "fixed", description: "Condiments, épices" },
   106	  { key: "plate",           label: "Assiette standard",    baseG: 300, scales: "fixed", description: "Légumes cuits" },
   107	  { key: "bread-slice",     label: "Tranche de pain",      baseG: 35,  scales: "fixed", description: "Pain standard" },
   108	  { key: "egg-medium",      label: "Œuf moyen",            baseG: 55,  scales: "fixed", description: "Œuf entier moyen" },
   109	  { key: "glass",           label: "Verre standard",       baseG: 200, scales: "fixed", description: "Liquides (eau/lait/jus)" },
   110	]
   111	
   112	/** Référence adulte (longueur main poignet → majeur, cm) */
   113	export const REFERENCE_HAND_CM = 18.0
   114	/** Ratio Pheasant 2003 — longueur main ≈ taille × 0.108 */
   115	export const HEIGHT_TO_HAND_RATIO = 0.108
   116	/** Multiplicateurs disponibles dans l'UI (×1 à ×5) */
   117	export const PORTION_MULTIPLIERS = [1, 1.5, 2, 2.5, 3, 4, 5] as const
   118	
   119	/**
   120	 * Retourne longueur main estimée (cm) : override user → dérivée taille → défaut 18.
   121	 */
   122	export function resolveHandLengthCm(profile: PortionScalingProfile | null | undefined): number {
   123	  if (!profile) return REFERENCE_HAND_CM
   124	  if (profile.hand_length_cm && profile.hand_length_cm > 0) return profile.hand_length_cm
   125	  if (profile.height_cm && profile.height_cm > 0) return profile.height_cm * HEIGHT_TO_HAND_RATIO
   126	  return REFERENCE_HAND_CM
   127	}
   128	
   129	/**
   130	 * Calcule grammes scalés d'une portion selon profil + multiplicateur.
   131	 * Multiplicateur appliqué après scaling main (×2 = deux fois la portion).
   132	 */
   133	export function getScaledPortionG(
   134	  portion: PortionSize,
   135	  profile: PortionScalingProfile | null | undefined,
   136	  multiplier: number = 1
   137	): number {
   138	  const mult = Math.max(0.5, Math.min(multiplier, 10))
   139	  if (portion.scales === "fixed") return Math.round(portion.baseG * mult)
   140	  const handCm = resolveHandLengthCm(profile)
   141	  const factor = handCm / REFERENCE_HAND_CM
   142	  return Math.round(portion.baseG * factor * mult)
   143	}
   144	
   145	/** True si profil a override main explicite (badge UI "ajusté à ta main") */
   146	export function isHandOverrideSet(profile: PortionScalingProfile | null | undefined): boolean {
   147	  return !!(profile?.hand_length_cm && profile.hand_length_cm > 0)
   148	}
   149

   174	  frais: "Fruits frais",
   175	  secs: "Fruits secs",
   176	  huiles: "Huiles",
   177	  "noix-graines": "Noix & Graines",
   178	  "autres-lipides": "Autres",
   179	  sauces: "Sauces & Condiments",
   180	  boissons: "Boissons",
   181	  divers: "Divers",
   182	  "snacks-sales": "Snacks salés",
   183	  "snacks-sucres": "Snacks & Sucreries",
   184	  "fast-food": "Fast-food",
   185	  // drinks subcategories
   186	  eau: "Eau & Hydratation",
   187	  chauds: "Boissons chaudes",
   188	  "jus-smoothies": "Jus & Smoothies",
   189	  "laits-vegetaux": "Laits végétaux",
   190	  "sports-drinks": "Boissons sportives",
   191	  alcools: "Alcools",
   192	}
   193	
   194	/** Calcule les macros d'une entrée depuis food_item + quantité */
   195	export function calcEntryMacros(
   196	  item: FoodItem,
   197	  quantity_g: number
   198	): Pick<NutritionEntry, "calories_kcal" | "protein_g" | "carbs_g" | "fat_g" | "fiber_g"> {
   199	  const factor = quantity_g / 100
   200	  const protein_g = Math.round(item.protein_per_100g * factor * 10) / 10
   201	  const carbs_g = Math.round(item.carbs_per_100g * factor * 10) / 10
   202	  const fat_g = Math.round(item.fat_per_100g * factor * 10) / 10
   203	  const fiber_g = Math.round(item.fiber_per_100g * factor * 10) / 10
   204	  return {
   205	    calories_kcal: computeMacroEnergy({ protein_g, carbs_g, fat_g, fiber_g }),
   206	    protein_g,
   207	    carbs_g,
   208	    fat_g,
   209	    fiber_g,
   210	  }
   211	}
   212	
   213	/** Somme les macros d'une liste d'entrées draft */
   214	export function sumDraftMacros(entries: EntryDraft[]): {
   215	  calories: number
   216	  protein: number
   217	  carbs: number
   218	  fat: number
   219	  fiber: number
   220	} {
   221	  return entries.reduce(
   222	    (acc, e) => {
   223	      const m = calcEntryMacros(e.food_item, e.quantity_g)
   224	      return {
   225	        calories: Math.round((acc.calories + m.calories_kcal) * 10) / 10,
   226	        protein: Math.round((acc.protein + m.protein_g) * 10) / 10,
   227	        carbs: Math.round((acc.carbs + m.carbs_g) * 10) / 10,
   228	        fat: Math.round((acc.fat + m.fat_g) * 10) / 10,
   229	        fiber: Math.round((acc.fiber + m.fiber_g) * 10) / 10,
   230	      }
   231	    },
   232	    { calories: 0, protein: 0, carbs: 0, fat: 0, fiber: 0 }
   233	  )
   234	}

   114	function normalizeText(value: string): string {
   115	  return value
   116	    .toLowerCase()
   117	    .normalize("NFD")
   118	    .replace(/[̀-ͯ]/g, "")
   119	    .replace(/œ/g, "oe")
   120	    .replace(/æ/g, "ae")
   121	}
   122	
   123	function nameHasAny(item: Pick<FoodItem, "name_fr">, keywords: string[]): boolean {
   124	  const name = normalizeText(item.name_fr)
   125	  return keywords.some((keyword) => name.includes(normalizeText(keyword)))
   126	}
   127	
   128	function hasAnyText(value: string, keywords: string[]): boolean {
   129	  const text = normalizeText(value)
   130	  return keywords.some((keyword) => text.includes(normalizeText(keyword)))
   131	}
   132	
   133	function hasWordText(value: string, keywords: string[]): boolean {
   134	  const text = ` ${normalizeText(value)} `
   135	  return keywords.some((keyword) => {
   136	    const normalized = normalizeText(keyword)
   137	    return normalized ? text.includes(` ${normalized} `) : false
   138	  })
   139	}
   140	
   141	function hasWordPrefixText(value: string, keywords: string[]): boolean {
   142	  const text = normalizeText(value)
   143	  return keywords.some((keyword) => {
   144	    const normalized = normalizeText(keyword)
   145	    return normalized ? text === normalized || text.startsWith(`${normalized} `) || text.includes(` ${normalized} `) : false
   146	  })
   147	}
   148

   275	function isSweetSauce(item: FoodItem): boolean {
   276	  const name = normalizeText(item.name_fr)
   277	
   278	  if (hasAnyText(item.name_fr, [
   279	    "barre",
   280	    "biscuit",
   281	    "beignet",
   282	    "brioche",
   283	    "brownie",
   284	    "céréales",
   285	    "cereales",
   286	    "chocolat au lait",
   287	    "chocolat noir",
   288	    "chocolat blanc",
   289	    "cookie",
   290	    "gaufre",
   291	    "muffin",
   292	    "pétales",
   293	    "petales",
   294	    "pain au chocolat",
   295	    "pâtisserie",
   296	    "patisserie",
   297	    "tarte",
   298	    "rocher",
   299	    "sablé",
   300	    "sable"
   301	  ])) {
   302	    return false
   303	  }
   304	
   305	  return hasAnyText(item.name_fr, [
   306	    "ketchup",
   307	    "sauce barbecue",
   308	    "sauce bbq",
   309	    "sauce au chocolat",
   310	    "sirop",
   311	    "sirop d'agave",
   312	    "sirop d'érable",
   313	    "sirop d'erable",
   314	    "coulis",
   315	    "nappage",
   316	    "caramel liquide",
   317	    "miel",
   318	    "confiture"
   319	  ])
   320	}
   321	
   322	function isCompositeMeal(item: FoodItem): boolean {
   323	  return hasAnyText(item.name_fr, COMPOSITE_MEAL_BLOCKERS)
   324	}
   325	
   326	function isSweetProduct(item: FoodItem): boolean {
   327	  const name = normalizeText(item.name_fr)
   328	
   329	  if (item.category_l2 === "snacks-sales" || item.category_l2 === "boissons" || item.category_l2 === "sauces") {
   330	    return false
   331	  }
   332	
   333	  if (hasAnyText(item.name_fr, [
   334	    "apéritif",
   335	    "aperitif",
   336	    "salé",
   337	    "sale",
   338	    "crackers",
   339	    "chips",
   340	    "eau minérale",
   341	    "eau minerale",
   342	    "boisson à l'eau",
   343	    "boisson a l'eau",
   344	    "boisson préparée",
   345	    "boisson preparee"
   346	  ])) {
   347	    return false
   348	  }
   349	
   350	  return SWEET_PRODUCT_TERMS.some((term) => name.includes(normalizeText(term)))
   351	    && !SWEET_SNACK_BLOCKERS.some((term) => name.includes(normalizeText(term)))
   352	}
   353	
   354	function isSpecificProtein(item: FoodItem): boolean {
   355	  return (
   356	    nameHasAny(item, ["poulet", "chicken", "dinde", "turkey"]) ||
   357	    nameHasAny(item, ["boeuf", "bœuf", "veau", "agneau", "mouton", "porc", "jambon", "lard", "bacon", "saucisse", "chorizo", "saucisson", "pancetta", "bresaola"]) ||
   358	    nameHasAny(item, ["poisson", "saumon", "thon", "sardine", "maquereau", "truite", "brochet", "cabillaud", "morue", "merlan", "hareng", "anchois", "anguille", "brème", "breme"]) || hasWordPrefixText(item.name_fr, ["bar"]) ||
   359	    nameHasAny(item, ["crabe", "araignee de mer", "araignée de mer", "homard", "langouste", "crevette", "moule", "huitre", "huître", "calamar", "seiche"]) ||
   360	    isEggFood(item) ||
   361	    nameHasAny(item, ["fromage", "yaourt", "skyr", "lait", "whey", "protéine", "protein"])
   362	  )
   363	}
   364	
   365	function isEggFood(item: FoodItem): boolean {
   366	  const name = normalizeText(item.name_fr)
   367	  return /\boeufs?\b/.test(name) || name.includes("blanc d'oeuf") || name.includes("blanc d œuf")
   368	}
   369	
   370	function isFreshFruitFood(item: FoodItem): boolean {
   371	  return item.category_l1 === "fruits"
   372	    && isFruitFamilyHint(item)
   373	    && !nameHasAny(item, FRUIT_BLOCKERS)
   374	    && !hasAnyText(item.name_fr, [
   375	      "sec",
   376	      "sèche",
   377	      "seche",
   378	      "séchée",
   379	      "sechee",
   380	      "secs",
   381	      "sèches",
   382	      "seches",
   383	      "moelleux",
   384	      "réhydraté",
   385	      "rehydrate",
   386	      "compote",
   387	      "coulis",
   388	      "chips",
   389	      "confit",
   390	      "appertisé",
   391	      "appertise",
   392	      "sirop"
   393	    ])
   394	}
   395	
   396	function isDriedFruitFood(item: FoodItem): boolean {
   397	  const name = normalizeText(item.name_fr)
   398	
   399	  if (item.category_l1 !== "fruits") return false
   400	  if (hasAnyText(item.name_fr, ["compote", "coulis", "chips", "sirop", "appertisé", "appertise"])) return false
   401	  if (hasAnyText(item.name_fr, ["cru", "crue", "pulpe, cru", "pulpe, crue"])) {
   402	    return hasAnyText(item.name_fr, ["datte", "pruneau"])
   403	  }
   404	
   405	  return (
   406	    /\bsecs?\b/.test(name) ||
   407	    /\bseches?\b/.test(name) ||
   408	    name.includes("sechee") ||
   409	    name.includes("séché") ||
   410	    name.includes("seche") ||
   411	    hasAnyText(item.name_fr, [
   412	      "abricot sec",
   413	      "abricots secs",
   414	      "figue sèche",
   415	      "figue seche",
   416	      "figues sèches",
   417	      "figues seches",
   418	      "raisin sec",
   419	      "raisins secs",
   420	      "datte",
   421	      "dattes",
   422	      "pruneau",
   423	      "pruneaux",
   424	      "cranberry séchée",
   425	      "cranberry sechee",
   426	      "canneberge séchée",
   427	      "canneberge sechee"
   428	    ])
   429	  )
   430	}
   431	
   432	export function matchesVisibleLeaf(item: FoodItem, leaf: VisibleLeafKey): boolean {
   433	  switch (leaf) {
   434	    case "chicken":
   435	      return item.category_l1 === "proteins"
   436	        && nameHasAny(item, ["poulet", "volaille"])
   437	        && !hasAnyText(item.name_fr, [
   438	          "chop suey",
   439	          "quenelle",
   440	          "saucisse",
   441	          "knack",
   442	          "rillettes",
   443	          "pâté",
   444	          "pate",
   445	          "confit de foie",
   446	          "préemballé",
   447	          "preemballe"
   448	        ])
   449	        && !isCompositeMeal(item)
   450	    case "beef":
   451	      return item.category_l1 === "proteins"
   452	        && nameHasAny(item, ["boeuf", "bœuf", "veau"])
   453	        && !hasAnyText(item.name_fr, [
   454	          "boeuf aux carottes",
   455	          "bœuf aux carottes",
   456	          "bourguignon",
   457	          "blanquette",
   458	          "brick",
   459	          "fond de veau",
   460	          "boulette",
   461	          "farce",
   462	          "merguez",
   463	          "mouton",
   464	          "agneau",
   465	          "porc",
   466	          "meloukhia",
   467	          "plat à base",
   468	          "plat a base",
   469	          "sauce",
   470	          "préemballé",
   471	          "preemballe"
   472	        ])
   473	        && !isCompositeMeal(item)
   474	    case "pork":
   475	      return item.category_l1 === "proteins"
   476	        && nameHasAny(item, [
   477	          "porc",
   478	          "filet mignon",
   479	          "bacon",
   480	          "lardon",
   481	          "lardons",
   482	          "jambon",
   483	          "échine",
   484	          "echine",
   485	          "palette",
   486	          "poitrine de porc",
   487	          "travers de porc"
   488	        ])
   489	        && !hasAnyText(item.name_fr, [
   490	          "boeuf",
   491	          "bœuf",
   492	          "veau",
   493	          "mouton",
   494	          "agneau",
   495	          "volaille",
   496	          "poulet",
   497	          "dinde",
   498	          "jambon de poulet",
   499	          "jambon de dinde",
   500	          "pélardon",
   501	          "pelardon",
   502	          "omelette",
   503	          "oeuf",
   504	          "œuf",
   505	          "gelée",
   506	          "gelee",
   507	          "merguez",
   508	          "mortadelle, porc et boeuf",
   509	          "farce",
   510	          "potée",
   511	          "potee",
   512	          "cassoulet",
   513	          "porc au caramel",
   514	          "saucisse",
   515	          "chair à saucisse",
   516	          "chair a saucisse",
   517	          "pâté",
   518	          "pate",
   519	          "rillettes",
   520	          "terrine",
   521	          "préemballé",
   522	          "preemballe"
   523	        ])
   524	        && !isCompositeMeal(item)
   525	    case "turkey":
   526	      return item.category_l1 === "proteins" && nameHasAny(item, ["dinde", "turkey"]) && !isCompositeMeal(item)
   527	    case "fish":
   528	      return item.category_l1 === "proteins"
   529	        && item.category_l2 === "poissons"
   530	        && !matchesVisibleLeaf(item, "seafood")
   531	        && !hasAnyText(item.name_fr, [
   532	          "bigorneau",
   533	          "buccin",
   534	          "clam",
   535	          "palourde",
   536	          "praire",
   537	          "écrevisse",
   538	          "ecrevisse",
   539	          "escargot",
   540	          "moule",
   541	          "huître",
   542	          "huitre",
   543	          "crevette",
   544	          "crabe",
   545	          "calmar",
   546	          "calamar",
   547	          "encornet",
   548	          "poulpe",
   549	          "homard",
   550	          "langouste",
   551	          "sauce",
   552	          "quenelle",
   553	          "salade",
   554	          "beignet",
   555	          "brandade",
   556	          "gratin",
   557	          "préemballé",
   558	          "preemballe"
   559	        ])
   560	        && !isCompositeMeal(item)
   561	    case "seafood":
   562	      return item.category_l1 === "proteins"
   563	        && item.category_l2 === "poissons"
   564	        && nameHasAny(item, [
   565	          "crevette",
   566	          "crabe",
   567	          "moule",
   568	          "huître",
   569	          "huitre",
   570	          "calmar",
   571	          "calamar",
   572	          "encornet",
   573	          "poulpe",
   574	          "homard",
   575	          "langouste",
   576	          "coquille saint-jacques",
   577	          "saint jacques",
   578	          "bigorneau",
   579	          "buccin",
   580	          "clam",
   581	          "palourde",
   582	          "praire",
   583	          "écrevisse",
   584	          "ecrevisse"
   585	        ])
   586	        && !hasAnyText(item.name_fr, [
   587	          "beignet",
   588	          "à la romaine",
   589	          "a la romaine",
   590	          "rillettes",
   591	          "sauce",
   592	          "escabèche",
   593	          "escabeche",
   594	          "préemballé",
   595	          "preemballe"
   596	        ])
   597	        && !isCompositeMeal(item)
   598	    case "eggs":
   599	      return item.category_l1 === "proteins"
   600	        && item.category_l2 === "oeufs"
   601	        && nameHasAny(item, ["oeuf", "œuf", "oeufs", "œufs", "omelette"])
   602	        && !hasAnyText(item.name_fr, [
   603	          "crème",
   604	          "creme",
   605	          "flan",
   606	          "pâtissier",
   607	          "patissier",
   608	          "tarte",
   609	          "gâteau",
   610	          "gateau",
   611	          "biscuit",
   612	          "dessert",
   613	          "pommes",
   614	          "garniture farine",
   615	          "lardons",
   616	          "jambon",
   617	          "viande",
   618	          "pommes de terre",
   619	          "tortilla",
   620	          "garnitures diverses",
   621	          "pâtes",
   622	          "pates",
   623	          "nouilles"
   624	        ])
   625	    case "dairy-protein":
   626	      return item.category_l1 === "proteins"
   627	        && item.category_l2 === "laitiers"
   628	        && !hasAnyText(item.name_fr, [
   629	          "fromage de tête",
   630	          "fromage de tete",
   631	          "omelette",
   632	          "mousse au chocolat",
   633	          "dessert végétal",
   634	          "dessert vegetal"
   635	        ])
   636	    case "plant-protein":
   637	      return item.category_l1 === "proteins"
   638	        && (
   639	          item.category_l2 === "vegetales"
   640	          || nameHasAny(item, ["tofu", "tempeh", "seitan", "protéine de soja", "proteine de soja", "soja texturé", "soja texture", "bouchées végétales", "bouchees vegetales", "émincé végétal", "emince vegetal"])
   641	        )
   642	        && !hasAnyText(item.name_fr, [
   643	          "dessert",
   644	          "fromage",
   645	          "tartiner",
   646	          "sucré",
   647	          "sucre",
   648	          "aromatisé",
   649	          "aromatise"
   650	        ])
   651	    case "charcuterie":
   652	      return item.category_l1 === "proteins"
   653	        && nameHasAny(item, [
   654	          "jambon",
   655	          "salami",
   656	          "saucisson",
   657	          "chorizo",
   658	          "charcut",
   659	          "bresaola",
   660	          "pancetta",
   661	          "mortadelle",
   662	          "rosette",
   663	          "coppa"
   664	        ])
   665	        && !hasAnyText(item.name_fr, [
   666	          "oeuf",
   667	          "œuf",
   668	          "sandwich",
   669	          "baguette",
   670	          "beurre",
   671	          "spécialité végétale",
   672	          "specialite vegetale",
   673	          "végétale type jambon",
   674	          "vegetale type jambon",
   675	          "jambon en croûte",
   676	          "jambon en croute",
   677	          "préemballé",
   678	          "preemballe"
   679	        ])
   680	        && !isCompositeMeal(item)
   681	    case "other-proteins":
   682	      return item.category_l1 === "proteins"
   683	        && !isCompositeMeal(item)
   684	        && !["laitiers", "complements", "poissons", "oeufs", "vegetales"].includes(item.category_l2 ?? "")
   685	        && !hasAnyText(item.name_fr, [
   686	          "fromage",
   687	          "brie",
   688	          "camembert",
   689	          "comté",
   690	          "comte",
   691	          "gouda",
   692	          "cheddar",
   693	          "emmental",
   694	          "feta",
   695	          "chèvre",
   696	          "chevre",
   697	          "skyr",
   698	          "yaourt",
   699	          "lait",
   700	          "petit-suisse",
   701	          "petit suisse",
   702	          "whey",
   703	          "caseine",
   704	          "caséine",
   705	          "creatine",
   706	          "créatine",
   707	          "bcaa",
   708	          "collagene",
   709	          "collagène",
   710	          "dessert",
   711	          "crème",
   712	          "creme",
   713	          "gâteau",
   714	          "gateau"
   715	        ])
   716	        && !matchesVisibleLeaf(item, "chicken")
   717	        && !matchesVisibleLeaf(item, "beef")
   718	        && !matchesVisibleLeaf(item, "pork")
   719	        && !matchesVisibleLeaf(item, "turkey")
   720	        && !matchesVisibleLeaf(item, "fish")
   721	        && !matchesVisibleLeaf(item, "seafood")
   722	        && !matchesVisibleLeaf(item, "eggs")
   723	        && !matchesVisibleLeaf(item, "charcuterie")
   724	        && !matchesVisibleLeaf(item, "dairy-protein")
   725	        && !matchesVisibleLeaf(item, "plant-protein")
   726	    case "rice":
   727	      return item.category_l1 === "carbs"
   728	        && nameHasAny(item, ["riz"])
   729	        && !hasAnyText(item.name_fr, [
   730	          "pâtes",
   731	          "pates",
   732	          "riz soufflé chocolaté",
   733	          "riz souffle chocolate",
   734	          "galette",
   735	          "vermicelle"
   736	        ])
   737	    case "pasta":
   738	      return item.category_l1 === "carbs" && nameHasAny(item, ["pâtes", "pates", "spaghetti", "penne", "macaroni", "tagliatelle", "gnocchi", "nouille", "nouilles"]) && !nameHasAny(item, ["pate d'amande", "pâte d'amande", "beurre de cacahuete", "beurre de cacahuète", "pate a tartiner", "pâte à tartiner", "pate brisee", "pâte brisée", "pate sablée", "pâte sablée", "pate filo", "pâte filo", "pate phyllo", "pâte phyllo", "pate de foie", "pâte de fruits", "pâte à pizza", "pate a pizza", "pâte feuilletée", "pate feuilletee"]) && !isCompositeMeal(item) && !hasAnyText(item.name_fr, ["courge spaghetti", "gnocchi à la pomme de terre", "gnocchi a la pomme de terre"])
   739	    case "bread":
   740	      return item.category_l1 === "carbs"
   741	        && nameHasAny(item, ["pain", "baguette", "biscotte", "toast", "wrap", "tortilla", "bagel", "pita"])
   742	        && !hasAnyText(item.name_fr, [
   743	          "chips",
   744	          "tortilla chips",
   745	          "fruit à pain",
   746	          "fruit a pain",
   747	          "farine",
   748	          "pour pains",
   749	          "pour pain"
   750	        ])
   751	        && !isCompositeMeal(item)
   752	    case "cereals":
   753	      return item.category_l1 === "carbs"
   754	        && nameHasAny(item, [
   755	          "avoine",
   756	          "flocon",
   757	          "muesli",
   758	          "quinoa",
   759	          "boulgour",
   760	          "bulgur",
   761	          "semoule",
   762	          "couscous",
   763	          "polenta",
   764	          "sarrasin",
   765	          "orge",
   766	          "seigle",
   767	          "sorgho",
   768	          "mil",
   769	          "maïs",
   770	          "mais",
   771	          "blé",
   772	          "ble",
   773	          "épeautre",
   774	          "epeautre",
   775	          "céréales",
   776	          "cereales",
   777	          "corn flakes",
   778	          "granola"
   779	        ])
   780	        && !matchesVisibleLeaf(item, "rice")
   781	        && !matchesVisibleLeaf(item, "pasta")
   782	        && !matchesVisibleLeaf(item, "bread")
   783	        && !matchesVisibleLeaf(item, "potatoes")
   784	        && !matchesVisibleLeaf(item, "legumes")
   785	        && !hasAnyText(item.name_fr, [
   786	          "chips",
   787	          "tortilla",
   788	          "gnocchi",
   789	          "pain",
   790	          "salade de pommes de terre",
   791	          "tomate à la provençale",
   792	          "tomate a la provencale",
   793	          "dextrose",
   794	          "maltodextrine"
   795	        ])
   796	        && !isCompositeMeal(item)
   797	    case "potatoes":
   798	      return item.category_l1 === "carbs"
   799	        && nameHasAny(item, ["pomme de terre", "pommes de terre", "patate douce", "frite", "frites", "purée de pomme de terre", "puree de pomme de terre", "gratin dauphinois"])
   800	        && !hasAnyText(item.name_fr, [
   801	          "falafel",
   802	          "boulette",
   803	          "pois-chiche",
   804	          "pois chiche",
   805	          "brandade",
   806	          "gratin de poisson",
   807	          "parmentier de poisson",
   808	          "poêlée",
   809	          "poelee",

   811	          "poulet",
   812	          "préemballé",
   813	          "preemballe"
   814	        ])
   815	    case "legumes":
   816	      return item.category_l1 === "carbs"
   817	        && nameHasAny(item, [
   818	          "lentille",
   819	          "lentilles",
   820	          "pois chiche",
   821	          "pois chiches",
   822	          "pois-chiche",
   823	          "haricot blanc",

   835	        && !hasAnyText(item.name_fr, [
   836	          "pâtes",
   837	          "pates",
   838	          "vermicelle",
   839	          "saucisse",
   840	          "petit salé",
   841	          "petit sale",
   842	          "sauce tomate",
   843	          "préemballé",
   844	          "preemballe"
   845	        ])
   846	    case "fresh-fruits":
   847	      return isFreshFruitFood(item)
   848	        && !hasAnyText(item.name_fr, [
   849	          "datte",
   850	          "dattes",
   851	          "sec",
   852	          "sèche",
   853	          "seche",
   854	          "séché",
   855	          "seche",
   856	          "séchée",
   857	          "sechee",
   858	          "bouillie",
   859	          "cuite à l'eau",
   860	          "cuite a l'eau",
   861	          "rôtie",
   862	          "rotie",

   864	          "appertise",
   865	          "compote",
   866	          "coulis"
   867	        ])
   868	    case "dried-fruits":
   869	      return isDriedFruitFood(item)
   870	    case "sweet-products":
   871	      return (item.category_l1 === "carbs" || item.category_l1 === "extras") && isSweetProduct(item)
   872	    case "sweet-sauces":
   873	      return item.category_l2 === "sauces"
   874	        && nameHasAny(item, [
   875	          "ketchup",
   876	          "barbecue",
   877	          "bbq",
   878	          "sauce au chocolat",
   879	          "sirop",
   880	          "coulis",
   881	          "nappage",
   882	          "caramel liquide",
   883	          "miel",
