  1288	function getVisibleLeafSortScore(item: FoodItem, leaf: VisibleLeafKey): number {
  1289	  const name = normalizeText(item.name_fr)
  1290	  let score = 100
  1291	
  1292	  const source = (item as { source?: string | null }).source
  1293	  const isVerified = (item as { is_verified?: boolean }).is_verified
  1294	
  1295	  if (source === "internal") score -= 4
  1296	  if (isVerified) score -= 4
  1297	
  1298	  if (isCompositeMeal(item)) score += 80
  1299	
  1300	  switch (leaf) {
  1301	    case "rice":
  1302	      if (name.startsWith("riz ") || name.startsWith("riz,")) score -= 35
  1303	      if (hasAnyText(item.name_fr, [
  1304	        "riz basmati",
  1305	        "riz blanc",
  1306	        "riz complet",
  1307	        "riz brun",
  1308	        "riz rouge",
  1309	        "riz sauvage",
  1310	        "riz thai",
  1311	        "riz thaï",
  1312	        "riz jasmin",
  1313	        "mélange de variétés",
  1314	        "melange de varietes",
  1315	      ])) score -= 30
  1316	      if (hasAnyText(item.name_fr, ["cuit", "cuit, non salé", "cuite"])) score -= 8
  1317	      if (hasAnyText(item.name_fr, ["cru", "sec", "sèche", "seche"])) score += 6
  1318	      if (hasAnyText(item.name_fr, [
  1319	        "galette",
  1320	        "soufflé",
  1321	        "souffle",
  1322	        "vermicelle",
  1323	        "farine",
  1324	        "amidon",
  1325	        "pâtes",
  1326	        "pates",
  1327	      ])) score += 45
  1328	      break
  1329	
  1330	    case "chicken":
  1331	      if (hasAnyText(item.name_fr, [
  1332	        "poulet, filet",
  1333	        "filet de poulet",
  1334	        "blanc de poulet",
  1335	        "poulet blanc",
  1336	        "poulet, poitrine",
  1337	        "poulet, viande",
  1338	        "poulet, cuisse",
  1339	        "cuisse de poulet",
  1340	        "poulet, pilon",
  1341	        "poulet, aile",
  1342	        "haut de cuisse",
  1343	        "escalope",
  1344	      ])) score -= 40
  1345	      if (hasAnyText(item.name_fr, ["cuit", "rôti", "roti", "sauté", "saute", "poêlé", "poele"])) score -= 8
  1346	      if (hasAnyText(item.name_fr, [
  1347	        "coeur",
  1348	        "cœur",
  1349	        "foie",
  1350	        "gésier",
  1351	        "gesier",
  1352	        "abat",
  1353	        "graisse",
  1354	        "peau",
  1355	      ])) score += 55
  1356	      if (hasAnyText(item.name_fr, [
  1357	        "jambon",
  1358	        "allumette",
  1359	        "dés",
  1360	        "des",
  1361	        "haché",
  1362	        "hache",
  1363	        "rillettes",
  1364	        "nuggets",
  1365	        "croquette",
  1366	        "panée",
  1367	        "pane",
  1368	        "mariné",
  1369	        "marine",
  1370	      ])) score += 35
  1371	      break
  1372	
  1373	    case "pasta":
  1374	      if (hasAnyText(item.name_fr, ["pâtes", "pates", "spaghetti", "penne", "macaroni", "tagliatelle"])) score -= 25
  1375	      if (hasAnyText(item.name_fr, ["cuites", "cuit", "non salées", "non salees"])) score -= 8
  1376	      if (hasAnyText(item.name_fr, ["salade", "plat", "préemballé", "preemballe", "farcie", "farcies"])) score += 45
  1377	      break
  1378	
  1379	    case "eggs":
  1380	      if (hasAnyText(item.name_fr, ["oeuf, cru", "œuf, cru", "oeuf, cuit", "œuf, cuit", "blanc d'oeuf", "blanc d'œuf"])) score -= 35
  1381	      if (hasAnyText(item.name_fr, ["omelette", "brouillé", "brouille", "préemballé", "preemballe"])) score += 25
  1382	      break
  1383	
  1384	    case "beef":
  1385	    case "pork":
  1386	    case "turkey":
  1387	    case "fish":
  1388	    case "seafood":
  1389	      if (hasAnyText(item.name_fr, ["filet", "viande", "steak", "escalope", "pavé", "pave", "cuisse"])) score -= 25
  1390	      if (hasAnyText(item.name_fr, ["foie", "coeur", "cœur", "rognon", "abat", "graisse", "peau"])) score += 45
  1391	      if (hasAnyText(item.name_fr, ["pané", "pane", "nuggets", "rillettes", "saucisse", "jambon", "salami", "chorizo"])) score += 35
  1392	      break
  1393	
  1394	
  1395	    case "bread":
  1396	      if (hasAnyText(item.name_fr, [
  1397	        "pain blanc",
  1398	        "pain complet",
  1399	        "pain de campagne",
  1400	        "pain de seigle",

------------------------------------------------------------
FILE: lib/nutrition/voice.ts
------------------------------------------------------------
     1	import type { CategoryL1, MealType } from './food-items'
     2	
     3	export type VoiceConfidence = 'high' | 'medium' | 'low'
     4	
     5	export interface VoiceItem {
     6	  name: string
     7	  quantity_g: number
     8	  kcal: number
     9	  protein_g: number
    10	  carbs_g: number
    11	  fat_g: number
    12	  fiber_g: number
    13	  confidence: VoiceConfidence
    14	  food_item_id?: string
    15	  is_new: boolean
    16	  category_l1?: CategoryL1
    17	  category_l2?: string
    18	}
    19	
    20	export interface VoiceParseResult {
    21	  items: VoiceItem[]
    22	  meal_type: MealType
    23	  raw_transcript: string
    24	  clean_transcript: string
    25	}
    26	
    27	// ── Filler word maps ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    28	const FILLERS: Record<string, RegExp> = {
    29	  // Use (?:^|\s) / (?=\s|$) for accented words that break \b word boundaries
    30	  fr: /(?:^|\s)(?:euh|donc|voil[aà]|en fait|genre|alors|bon|ben)(?=\s|$)/gi,
    31	  en: /\b(um|uh|so|like|well|you know)\b/gi,
    32	  es: /(?:^|\s)(?:eh|bueno|pues|o sea)(?=\s|$)/gi,
    33	}
    34	
    35	// ── Written numbers → digits (French) ───────────────────────────────────────
    36	const FR_NUMBERS: Array<[RegExp, string]> = [
    37	  [/\bmille\b/gi, '1000'],
    38	  [/\bcinq cents\b/gi, '500'],
    39	  [/\bquatre cents\b/gi, '400'],
    40	  [/\btrois cents\b/gi, '300'],
    41	  [/\bdeux cents\b/gi, '200'],
    42	  [/\bcent cinquante\b/gi, '150'],
    43	  [/\bcent\b/gi, '100'],
    44	  [/\bquatre-vingt-dix\b/gi, '90'],
    45	  [/\bquatre-vingts?\b/gi, '80'],
    46	  [/\bsoixante-dix\b/gi, '70'],
    47	  [/\bsoixante\b/gi, '60'],
    48	  [/\bciquante\b/gi, '50'],
    49	  [/\bquarante\b/gi, '40'],
    50	  [/\btrente\b/gi, '30'],
    51	  [/\bvingt\b/gi, '20'],
    52	  [/\bdix\b/gi, '10'],
    53	  [/\bneuf\b/gi, '9'],
    54	  [/\bhuit\b/gi, '8'],
    55	  [/\bsept\b/gi, '7'],
    56	  [/\bsix\b/gi, '6'],
    57	  [/\bcinq\b/gi, '5'],
    58	  [/\bquatre\b/gi, '4'],
    59	  [/\btrois\b/gi, '3'],
    60	  [/\bdeux\b/gi, '2'],
    61	  [/\bun\b/gi, '1'],
    62	  [/\bune demi\b/gi, '0.5'],
    63	  [/\bun quart\b/gi, '0.25'],
    64	]
    65	
    66	// ── Unit normalizations ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    67	const UNITS: Array<[RegExp, string]> = [
    68	  [/\bkilogrammes?\b/gi, 'kg'],
    69	  [/\bgrammes?\b/gi, 'g'],
    70	  [/\bmillilitres?\b/gi, 'ml'],
    71	  [/\bcentilitres?\b/gi, 'cl'],
    72	  [/\blitres?\b/gi, 'L'],
    73	]
    74	
    75	export function cleanTranscript(raw: string, lang: string): string {
    76	  let text = raw.toLowerCase()
    77	
    78	  const fillerRe = FILLERS[lang] ?? FILLERS['fr']
    79	  text = text.replace(fillerRe, '')
    80	
    81	  if (lang === 'fr') {
    82	    for (const [re, digit] of FR_NUMBERS) {
    83	      text = text.replace(re, digit)
    84	    }
    85	  }
    86	
    87	  for (const [re, abbr] of UNITS) {
    88	    text = text.replace(re, abbr)
    89	  }
    90	
    91	  return text.replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim()
    92	}
    93	
    94	type VoiceCategorySuggestion = {
    95	  category_l1: CategoryL1
    96	  category_l2: string
    97	}
    98	
    99	const VOICE_CATEGORY_PATTERNS: Array<{
   100	  category_l1: CategoryL1
   101	  category_l2: string
   102	  patterns: RegExp[]
   103	}> = [
   104	  {
   105	    category_l1: "drinks",
   106	    category_l2: "eau",
   107	    patterns: [/\beau\b/i, /\bwater\b/i, /\bperrier\b/i, /\bsan pellegrino\b/i],
   108	  },
   109	  {
   110	    category_l1: "drinks",
   111	    category_l2: "chauds",
   112	    patterns: [/\bcafe\b/i, /\bcafé\b/i, /\bth[eé]\b/i, /\binfusion\b/i],
   113	  },
   114	  {
   115	    category_l1: "drinks",
   116	    category_l2: "jus-smoothies",
   117	    patterns: [/\bjus\b/i, /\bsmoothie\b/i, /\bshake\b/i],
   118	  },
   119	  {
   120	    category_l1: "drinks",
   121	    category_l2: "laits-vegetaux",
   122	    patterns: [/\blait\b/i, /\bsoy\b/i, /\bavoine\b/i, /\bamande\b/i],
   123	  },
   124	  {
   125	    category_l1: "fruits",
   126	    category_l2: "frais",
   127	    patterns: [/\bpomme\b/i, /\bbanane\b/i, /\bkiwi\b/i, /\bfraise\b/i, /\bframboise\b/i, /\borange\b/i],
   128	  },
   129	  {
   130	    category_l1: "vegetables",
   131	    category_l2: "feuilles",
   132	    patterns: [/\bsalade\b/i, /\bepinard\b/i, /\bépinard\b/i, /\broquette\b/i, /\blaitue\b/i],
   133	  },
   134	  {
   135	    category_l1: "vegetables",
   136	    category_l2: "cruciferes",
   137	    patterns: [/\bbrocoli\b/i, /\bchou\b/i, /\bchoux\b/i, /\bchou-fleur\b/i],
   138	  },
   139	  {
   140	    category_l1: "vegetables",
   141	    category_l2: "autres-legumes",
   142	    patterns: [/\bcarotte\b/i, /\bcourgette\b/i, /\btomate\b/i, /\bpoivron\b/i, /\bconcombre\b/i],
   143	  },
   144	  {
   145	    category_l1: "proteins",
   146	    category_l2: "oeufs",
   147	    patterns: [/\boeuf\b/i, /\bœuf\b/i, /\bomelette\b/i],
   148	  },
   149	  {
   150	    category_l1: "proteins",
   151	    category_l2: "viandes",
   152	    patterns: [/\bpoulet\b/i, /\bdinde\b/i, /\bsteak\b/i, /\bboeuf\b/i, /\bbœuf\b/i, /\bjambon\b/i],
   153	  },
   154	  {
   155	    category_l1: "proteins",
   156	    category_l2: "poissons",
   157	    patterns: [/\bsaumon\b/i, /\bthon\b/i, /\btruite\b/i, /\bcrevette\b/i, /\bpoisson\b/i],
   158	  },
   159	  {
   160	    category_l1: "proteins",
   161	    category_l2: "laitiers",
   162	    patterns: [/\byaourt\b/i, /\bskyr\b/i, /\bfromage blanc\b/i, /\bfromage\b/i],
   163	  },
   164	  {
   165	    category_l1: "carbs",
   166	    category_l2: "cereales",
   167	    patterns: [/\briz\b/i, /\bavoine\b/i, /\bquinoa\b/i, /\bsemoule\b/i, /\bcereale\b/i],
   168	  },
   169	  {
   170	    category_l1: "carbs",
   171	    category_l2: "fecules",
   172	    patterns: [/\bpomme de terre\b/i, /\bpates?\b/i, /\bpâtes?\b/i, /\bgnocchi\b/i],
   173	  },
   174	  {
   175	    category_l1: "carbs",
   176	    category_l2: "pain",
   177	    patterns: [/\bpain\b/i, /\btortilla\b/i, /\bwrap\b/i, /\bbaguette\b/i],
   178	  },
   179	  {
   180	    category_l1: "carbs",
   181	    category_l2: "legumineuses",
   182	    patterns: [/\blentille\b/i, /\bpois chiche\b/i, /\bharicot\b/i, /\bpois\b/i],
   183	  },
   184	  {
   185	    category_l1: "fats",
   186	    category_l2: "huiles",
   187	    patterns: [/\bhuile\b/i, /\bhuile d'?olive\b/i],
   188	  },
   189	  {
   190	    category_l1: "fats",
   191	    category_l2: "noix-graines",
   192	    patterns: [/\bamande\b/i, /\bnoix\b/i, /\bgraines?\b/i, /\bcajou\b/i, /\bnoisette\b/i],
   193	  },
   194	  {
   195	    category_l1: "fats",
   196	    category_l2: "autres-lipides",
   197	    patterns: [/\bavocat\b/i, /\bbeurre\b/i, /\bpur[eé]e d'amande\b/i, /\bpeanut butter\b/i],
   198	  },
   199	]
   200	
   201	export function guessVoiceFoodCategory(name: string): VoiceCategorySuggestion | null {
   202	  const label = name.trim().toLowerCase()
   203	  if (!label) return null
   204	
   205	  for (const group of VOICE_CATEGORY_PATTERNS) {
   206	    if (group.patterns.some((pattern) => pattern.test(label))) {
   207	      return {
   208	        category_l1: group.category_l1,
   209	        category_l2: group.category_l2,
   210	      }
   211	    }
   212	  }
   213	
   214	  return null
   215	}

============================================================
### 6. Route hydration source
============================================================
     1	import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server"
     2	import { createClient } from "@/utils/supabase/server"
     3	import { createClient as createServiceClient } from "@supabase/supabase-js"
     4	import { z } from "zod"
     5	import { computePhysiologicalDate } from "@/lib/nutrition/physiological-date"
     6	import { calcEntryMacros } from "@/lib/nutrition/food-items"
     7	import { computeMacroEnergy } from "@/lib/nutrition/energy"
     8	import { resolveClientTimezone } from "@/lib/client/checkin/resolveClientTimezone"
     9	import { estimateCaffeineMg, inferDrinkTypeFromFoodItem } from "@/lib/client/nutrition/drinks"
    10	
    11	function service() {
    12	  return createServiceClient(
    13	    process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL!,
    14	    process.env.SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY!
    15	  )
    16	}
    17	
    18	async function resolveClientId(userId: string): Promise<string | null> {
    19	  const { data } = await service().from("coach_clients").select("id").eq("user_id", userId).single()
    20	  return data?.id ?? null
    21	}
    22	
    23	const schema = z.object({
    24	  food_item_id: z.string().uuid(),
    25	  quantity_g: z.number().positive().max(5000),
    26	})
    27	
    28	/**
    29	 * POST /api/client/nutrition/hydration
    30	 * Loguer une boisson (eau, café...) sans créer une carte repas visible dans le journal.
    31	 * Crée ou réutilise un seul repas "Boissons" par jour physiologique.
    32	 * Ce repas n'apparaît PAS dans la liste des repas du journal (meal_type = "drinks").
    33	 * Les macros sont quand même comptabilisées dans le total du jour.
    34	 */
    35	export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {
    36	  const supabase = createClient()
    37	  const { data: { user } } = await supabase.auth.getUser()
    38	  if (!user) return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 })
    39	
    40	  const clientId = await resolveClientId(user.id)
    41	  if (!clientId) return NextResponse.json({ error: "Client not found" }, { status: 404 })
    42	
    43	  const body = schema.safeParse(await req.json())
    44	  if (!body.success) return NextResponse.json({ error: body.error }, { status: 400 })
    45	
    46	  const { food_item_id, quantity_g } = body.data
    47	  const db = service()
    48	  const timezone = await resolveClientTimezone(db, clientId)
    49	  const loggedAt = new Date()
    50	  const today = computePhysiologicalDate(loggedAt, timezone)
    51	
    52	  // Fetch food item
    53	  const { data: item } = await db
    54	    .from("food_items")
    55	    .select("id, name_fr, category_l1, category_l2, kcal_per_100g, protein_per_100g, carbs_per_100g, fat_per_100g, fiber_per_100g")
    56	    .eq("id", food_item_id)
    57	    .single()
    58	  if (!item) return NextResponse.json({ error: "Food item not found" }, { status: 404 })
    59	
    60	  const macros = calcEntryMacros(
    61	    { ...item, name_fr: "", category_l1: "drinks", category_l2: "eau", item_key: "", source: "internal", is_verified: true },
    62	    quantity_g
    63	  )
    64	
    65	  // Trouver ou créer un repas "drinks" pour aujourd'hui
    66	  let mealId: string
    67	  const { data: existing } = await db
    68	    .from("nutrition_meals")
    69	    .select("id, total_calories, total_protein_g, total_carbs_g, total_fat_g, total_fiber_g")
    70	    .eq("client_id", clientId)
    71	    .eq("physiological_date", today)
    72	    .eq("meal_type", "drinks" as any)
    73	    .maybeSingle()
    74	
    75	  if (existing) {
    76	    mealId = existing.id
    77	    // Mettre à jour les totaux
    78	    const nextTotals = {
    79	      total_protein_g: Math.round((Number(existing.total_protein_g) + macros.protein_g) * 10) / 10,
    80	      total_carbs_g: Math.round((Number(existing.total_carbs_g) + macros.carbs_g) * 10) / 10,
    81	      total_fat_g: Math.round((Number(existing.total_fat_g) + macros.fat_g) * 10) / 10,
    82	      total_fiber_g: Math.round((Number(existing.total_fiber_g) + macros.fiber_g) * 10) / 10,
    83	    }
    84	    await db.from("nutrition_meals").update({
    85	      ...nextTotals,
    86	      total_calories: computeMacroEnergy({
    87	        protein_g: nextTotals.total_protein_g,
    88	        carbs_g: nextTotals.total_carbs_g,
    89	        fat_g: nextTotals.total_fat_g,
    90	        fiber_g: nextTotals.total_fiber_g,
    91	      }),
    92	    }).eq("id", mealId)
    93	  } else {
    94	    const { data: newMeal, error: mealError } = await db
    95	      .from("nutrition_meals")
    96	      .insert({
    97	        client_id: clientId,
    98	        physiological_date: today,
    99	        meal_type: "drinks" as any,
   100	        logged_at: loggedAt.toISOString(),
   101	        total_calories:  macros.calories_kcal,
   102	        total_protein_g: macros.protein_g,
   103	        total_carbs_g:   macros.carbs_g,
   104	        total_fat_g:     macros.fat_g,
   105	        total_fiber_g:   macros.fiber_g,
   106	      })
   107	      .select("id")
   108	      .single()
   109	    if (mealError || !newMeal) return NextResponse.json({ error: mealError?.message }, { status: 500 })
   110	    mealId = newMeal.id
   111	  }
   112	
   113	  // Insérer l'entrée
   114	  await db.from("nutrition_entries").insert({
   115	    meal_id: mealId,
   116	    client_id: clientId,
   117	    food_item_id,
   118	    physiological_date: today,
   119	    quantity_g,
   120	    calories_kcal: macros.calories_kcal,
   121	    protein_g: macros.protein_g,
   122	    carbs_g: macros.carbs_g,
   123	    fat_g: macros.fat_g,
   124	    fiber_g: macros.fiber_g,
   125	    input_mode: "composer",
   126	    confidence_score: 0.85,
   127	  })
   128	
   129	  // Sync client_water_logs — source lue par home page et nutrition page
   130	  const drinkType = inferDrinkTypeFromFoodItem({
   131	    name_fr: item.name_fr ?? "",
   132	    category_l1: item.category_l1 ?? "drinks",
   133	    category_l2: item.category_l2 ?? null,
   134	  })
   135	  await db.from("client_water_logs").insert({
   136	    client_id: clientId,
   137	    amount_ml: quantity_g,
   138	    drink_type: drinkType,
   139	    caffeine_mg: estimateCaffeineMg(drinkType, quantity_g),
   140	    logged_at: loggedAt.toISOString(),
   141	  })
   142	
   143	  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true, meal_id: mealId, quantity_ml: quantity_g })
   144	}

============================================================
FIN CAFÉ MODAL SOURCE FINAL
============================================================
